_But then, I compare Florida freedom to big blue cities, and I’m absolutely horrified._

| | |
# Capitol Report

|

| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=dd1b0a0401&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Senator Steven Roberts sends $70 million in STL investment to Governor's desk**
JEFFERSON CITY — State Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, has secured $70 million for crucial St. Louis projects from the FY24 state budget. Projects to be funded include:
* Brickline Greenway: $25,000,000
* Access Point: $20,000,000
* Cortex MO First in Cybersecurity: $7,000,000
* Annie Malone Foundation: $4,000,000
* St. Louis Symphony Orchestra: $3,000,000
* House Everyone STL: $2,000,000
* Home Sweet Home: $1,000,000
* Employment Connection: $750,000
* Doorways – Cooper House: $757,180
* St. Louis Society for the Blind and Visually Impaired: $300,000
* Grove Retail Incubator – Park Street Development: $250,000
* 4 Walls and Beyond: $250,000
* Refugee Services re-appropriated: $5,000,000

For more information on individual projects funded, please contact Sen. Steven Roberts’ office at 573-751-4415.
---
|
---
| **Lawmakers race to pass $51 billion state budget by deadline**
Lawmakers raced to grant final passage to a $51.51 billion state operating budget for the 2024 fiscal year on May 5 ahead of a hard constitutional deadline to avoid starting the process over in a special legislative session. This year marks the fifth consecutive time the Republican-controlled General Assembly has teetered on the brink of busting the budget deadline – something that has only happened once, in 1997.

The final budget largely reflects the Senate’s more generous spending plan, which taps Missouri’s unprecedented multi-billion revenue surplus to address a host of long-neglected needs throughout the state. The original House version included about $3.2 billion less in spending authority.

A $2.8 billion plan to widen the entire length of Interstate 70 across Missouri is arguably the budget’s most ambitious feature. While Gov. Mike Parson had proposed a more limited $859 million plan to improve portions of the highway in the Columbia, Kansas City and St. Louis areas – a position backed by the House – the Senate insisted on the more expansive undertaking, as well as including funding to begin planning a similar expansion of Interstate 44.

The final budget also provides a substantial increase for Missouri’s public colleges and universities, achieves the funding minimum called for by the statutory formula for distributing state funding to local public school districts and, for the second year in a row, fully funds the state’s share of districts’ student transportation costs. The budget also increased funding to expand pre-K offerings at public schools.

Lawmakers also bumped state reimbursements for home care workers who assist elderly or disabled Missourians in an effort to boost their average pay from about $12 an hour to $14 an hour. However, the compromise funding level is substantially less than the amount sought by the Senate, which had hoped to pay the high-demand workers a more competitive $17 an hour.

Controversial language inserted by the House, but deleted in the Senate, to prohibit all state agencies and any individual or company that contracts with the state from promoting “diversity, equity and inclusion” remained excluded from the final appropriations bills.

Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, has until July 1 to act on the various bills that make up the state budget. Unlike with standard legislation, which the governor must either sign into law, veto or let become law without his signature, the governor has line-item veto power over appropriations bills that allows him to strike spending items he doesn’t like while signing the remainder of a bill into law. Parson issued 32 line-item vetoes last year and exactly 300 since taking office in 2018.
---
|
---
| **Judge signals rule targeting transgender care likely invalid**
A St. Louis County judge on May 1 issued a temporary restraining order blocking Attorney General Andrew Bailey from enforcing an emergency rule seeking to prohibit nearly all gender-affirming medical care for transgender Missourians, indicating Bailey’s action amounts to unconstitutional legislating by an executive branch official.

“This Court finds that the Plaintiffs have met their burden regarding their likelihood of success on the merits, as this is (a) novel use of the Attorney General’s power to promulgate emergency rules under the Missouri Merchandising Practices Act that has never previously been subjected to judicial scrutiny and may impermissibly invade a function reserved for the legislature,” Circuit Judge Ellen Ribaudo wrote in her order.

Bailey, a Republican, promulgated the administrative rule seeking to tightly restrict transgender medical care in early April, citing authority granted to his office under the Missouri Merchandising Practices Act, a consumer protection law traditionally used to crack down on deceptive business practices or the sale of defective products. A group of plaintiffs that includes transgender Missourians and medical providers sued to challenge the validity of the rule, arguing Bailey grossly overstepped his authority and is attempting to enact substantive law under the guise of an administrative rule.

Bailey’s rule was slated to take effect April 27, but Ribaudo placed it on pause a day earlier while she considered the temporary restraining order. The rule will remain on hold until at least July 24. Ribaudo has scheduled a hearing for July 20 on whether to issue a temporary injunction that would continue to block the rule’s enforcement while the lawsuit remains pending. The case is _Southhampton Community Healthcare, et al., v. Andrew Bailey_.

|

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fa71b71e42&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=1b440f79b9&e=a088917f89).

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Sign my petition: expand vote-by-mail nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | I want to make sure you saw my earlier message about voting at home. **Our democracy is stronger when everyone has equal access to the ballot box.** Expanding Oregon-style vote-by-mail nationwide is the way to do it. Here's the deal, voting shouldn't be the hardest thing you do on Election Day. **Every time I come home to Oregon, I see democracy thriving. Every time I vote, it's clear why: our state votes entirely by mail.**
Oregon was the first state to adopt vote-at-home, and we've been going strong for over 25 years. Each election, our state has some of the highest voter turnout rates in the country, because we make it so accessible.
Voting at home is safe, easy, and efficient.
With vote-by-mail, there's no need to wait in long polling lines, no need to pay for child care, and no taking off time from school or work. It allows every American that wants to make their voice heard in our democracy to do so. That's also why Republicans have spent years trying to crack down on mail-in voting.
But the American people know better. During the COVID-19 pandemic, millions of voters got to vote the Oregon Way: from the safety and comfort of their own homes. Now it's time to make it permanent for all federal elections, and I have the legislation to get it done.
**Vote-by-mail is the most democratic way to conduct elections, and everyone deserves access. That's why I've put forth a plan to make voting at home the law of the land in all 50 states.**

We've all heard the horror stories of voters waiting in line for hours to cast their ballots. And more often than not, those barriers are highest in underserved communities.
Here's the deal: voting shouldn't be the hardest thing you do all day. But Republican lawmakers and state legislatures are hellbent on making it harder for you to exercise your constitutional right to participate in our democratic process.

subject: Fwd: Urgent Pro-Life Request from the Shelby County Republican Party Chairman
body:
> **Shelby County Conservative Republicans** ,
>
> Please email Speaker of the House Jason Stephens requesting that he schedule a vote on the 60% Constitutional Amendment threshold WITH an August special election!
>
> We are told that it will pass if he schedules a vote by the May 10th deadline (this Wednesday).
>
> Planned Parenthood, the ACLU, and their allies in the Ohio House are putting tremendous pressure on him to NOT schedule a vote. We need to let him know that we want an opportunity for our voice to be heard on the floor of the Ohio House. Request he schedule a vote immediately!
>
> If this vote is not scheduled, the chances that our state constitution will be amended in November to enshrine abortion and other anti-parent language into our constitution increases astronomically. Ohio’s constitution will become one of the most “progressive”, pro-death, anti-parent constitutions in the nation! Our constitution has needed these protections for decades, but our “conservative” legislators have failed to make it happen. **Now** is our chance to protect both our constitution and the lives of Ohio babies all in one vote! But Jason Stephens must schedule it!
>
> Please email him multiple times between now and Wednesday.
>
> His email addresses are [Jason.Stephens@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:Jason.Stephens@ohiohouse.gov) and [Rep93@ohiohouse.gov](mailto:Rep93@ohiohouse.gov)
>
> Phone: (614) 466-1366
>
> Visit [protectwomenohio.com](http://protectwomenohio.com) and/or [ohiovaluevoters.org](http://ohiovaluevoters.org) for more info on this issue. The fight will not be over even if this amendment is passed, but the odds of protecting babies in our state will be **greatly** improved!
>
> Thanks in advance for your quick action!
>
> Dan Cecil
> (937) 206-2970
> [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
>
>

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Help Gen Z vote out gun-crazy Republicans and stop these massacres, like every other democracy has done.
body:
It happened again, in Allen, TX
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf90017a4-2ecf-4765-91a1-c2ae805ffc91/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The massacre in Allen, TX this weekend was horrifying & heartbreaking. Those who lost their lives include a five-year old child, just beginning life.** _I'm not gonna go into statistics. I don't have the heart to. So, just three things:_ **1)** [**_We can stop this any time we elect enough Democrats. Democrats support the measures that have ended these tragedies in every other democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d6955e2-e983-4268-8027-471b18d4a2ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **2) _Because of the GOP, we aren't safe anywhere._** **_Houses of worship. Malls. Schools. Dance clubs. It's only getting worse._** **3) _Gen Z is, sadly, the school-shooting-drill generation._** **_They've had enough of this, and the past two elections it's been a top issue turning them out in record numbers, breaking electoral records._** **_Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape. Continuing to swell their presence at the polls is our only way to stop this utter madness._** [**_Will you join a heartbroken Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Voters of Tomorrow?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3752db50-d36e-4dcd-aeb4-a4526078b77e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This. Must. End.** Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce7a75e4-8032-41d3-ad4b-632044adc850/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: NextGen America
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Get the first look at our Gen10 leaders!
body:
| | | We just launched our Gen10 leaders list. Meet the young changemakers leading the youth movement today.
---
| [Read now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62971188/405162940/-1227794584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmVmZjZhMy1hOGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4U6-HY4lBPV67ZHTKfwt5oYrKt1kdkuo2GDvC1j3pQw=&emci=2f4cef16-54eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=36eff6a3-a8ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) |

Friend,
**As a part of our incredible 10-year anniversary celebration, NextGen America is proud to announce Gen10** — 10 of our nation’s brightest, young leaders who are working in our key states to champion NextGen’s mission and bring generational change to our country!
**We’ve been waiting and building for this moment to shine a light on our trailblazers, and now, we can’t wait to share the great news.**
[First look: Read our full Gen10 list to learn more about our young leaders and what they’re fighting for.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62971191/405162947/-1987309471?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmVmZjZhMy1hOGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4U6-HY4lBPV67ZHTKfwt5oYrKt1kdkuo2GDvC1j3pQw=&emci=2f4cef16-54eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=36eff6a3-a8ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)

As the rising generations of Americans face a future threatened by climate change, economic inequality, and outright attacks on our democracy, our work is more important than ever. **We’re honored to be in this fight with this powerful group of leaders.**
**As one of the nation’s largest multiracial, multicultural, multigenerational organizations uplifting the voices of the youth civic engagement movement,** we’re proud to work alongside these leaders who reflect the diversity of our community. They bring with them a wealth of knowledge, expertise, and lived experiences as activists all across our nation, and we can’t wait to continue our civic education and engagement journey with them by our side.
[Read now: Meet our Gen10 leaders!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62971201/405162957/-824510057?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmVmZjZhMy1hOGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4U6-HY4lBPV67ZHTKfwt5oYrKt1kdkuo2GDvC1j3pQw=&emci=2f4cef16-54eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=36eff6a3-a8ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
Thank you,
NextGen America

subject: FREE Ben Stein Retirement Guide
body:
This report could be your ticket to a sound financial future for you and your family.

| | |
# **This New Report Could Save
Your Retirement!**
---
|
---
There's a new report just out from famed author, actor and economist Ben Stein...
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4b8d2daf75f54787bfd51cff3f6eb68b&_e=1wC0wmrOEwTxuz9hx_mn23PoOUA_JagYMVyXY2cq99SxGq04f9xQtoKbay82PdVYFJToXvT5ojk9Mg1-RSaqOFllceQl4STYtGdG2g7d-2LPLEQTGsTdKRwy7Hv1gTEGNgyUMNP6RHyUHs1NN3F7NYVZ2vlCLbVdUbhhqigBOZIykXYgd7A27gWhNUwk1yahOLC_vCJdVMnWlfGVGpkOYygcEG8-64KeivXXYCivTJw07rKIoXZJY6lCGGGx-fMDPRdq7DodVaD3ETjD62EZ1C5Q38fkFEDpPFAY9gsI5PZdFkA_X2esMLTHthqo-rCLxYOMdwTN5kStEgHOc5DJpi1tcA9micezgUT3qsVi69rjiYU5cgOkQ756vNTBYTONwjZwPh3YFtOjl01EoROFgUtT9JGNUa_ryLRDL2ay5MDbgj20s0NIikgKy3MguwJTYopxZzGWW3c3OYzr0PdzAg%3D%3D)
---
| | In this **FREE REPORT** , Ben reveals the lessons he learned from his late father and economist Herbert Stein. He covers...
---
* Two critical lessons from his father about the financial crises he was forced to overcome.
* How everyday Americans are currently ruining their retirements (and how they could stop the bleeding).
* The time-tested strategies he and his father have both used to battle recessions and depressions.
* Plus, so much more!

## Police Identify Dallas Mall Shooter
Police have [identified Mauricio Garcia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FygzAMgOGngc2ckMCFwUMXtnTtyCm2HNQzOAdOaN--l86d_-G7__MyX1iTbrcPXsWVmGf2RZ8yQ29gMEgz1sFFERSqxbV2oL6zAEO9uN6PFgfvQ-yuY2gJRoiRqQ-erfgr1uoQkKCHoQVoiRqwaLsrkUDXjyO9VR1I0JL35ivrVhaJ6Sc_ZW98XuvkllLuR0XvFU4VTud5NjF_b3Ier17h9DgqnAKnxIdZOSVzLDkX2c25ZLPyY1ev2dx498r17sL91JT0sC_3trKmP6f8v_0bAAD__0ClWik) as the man who killed eight people and wounded seven others at a suburban Dallas shopping mall this weekend. Garcia, who wore body armor and carried multiple weapons, was shot dead by police during the incident. Witnesses say the shooter [ pulled up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOnDAQhJ_GdKBl1xhTuEjj7tKmRAYvhyODT7B36N4-IvXfzDSfNJ_mz2N8hJTT_vwdNnaylDHMkj48QleDrZFGrKJbmJGpYtcaS502ALZaHc1TjByZp6BbtNYQLRqDpnnheeptlRwCEnRgW4CWqAGDRk9EDLobBuqVBo5JytH8LWmXlZf8LR8-mrlsVXaryOtU9EuhV-iv62reZ5ASw_cGFPpTyvFV6He-zruCpLIr9PesQg_dHeYG11Ik7c86hpzDWZe3ZJZ6Czkr9D20Q2sGA9Ar9NXh4utKOafT3IbPLaT830h-PuhfAAAA__8CRGQO) in front of the outlet mall and began firing at shoppers on the sidewalk. Police responded quickly, and efforts to evacuate shoppers were posted on Twitter. ([Watch here, discretion advised](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFP8zAQgOFf42ytLne2P3vw8DGEqayMkVuf20NuXSVHI_j1CFiZ3-HR-3qYD1ma3M4v-cpJa5_zSeXBM7gdhB3SjENJlRmZBk6jD-SsBwjDJfHJU84BjiVmrBYAa6kWy1gc0zG7QRICEjgII8BItAeP3h6JGKyLkf4ZC1xE-7J_63LTC9f20R-87E_9OrR0Ub2vhv4bnAxOuonqbzM4PfctP_XlU85yMzitmvV9NTiN3tkYvfOeyFIM1tthSeW-SWuy-m_yfM3Sfgj9-_grAAD__5xkVKI)). Very little [is known](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FygzAMgOGngc2ckMCFwUMXtnTtyCm2HNQzOAdOaN--l86d_-G7__MyX1iTbrcPXsWVmGf2RZ8yQ29gMEgz1sFFERSqxbV2oL6zAEO9uN6PFgfvQ-yuY2gJRoiRqQ-erfgr1uoQkKCHoQVoiRqwaLsrkUDXjyO9VR1I0JL35ivrVhaJ6Sc_ZW98XuvkllLuR0XvFU4VTud5NjF_b3Ier17h9DgqnAKnxIdZOSVzLDkX2c25ZLPyY1ev2dx498r17sL91JT0sC_3trKmP6f8v_0bAAD__0ClWik) about the assailant. FBI agents searched his motel room and spoke with his family at the Dallas home where Garcia, 33, lived with his parents. In Washington, the [White House](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQxvFPox0OgvhyBcXb2F3alM4Cq5Ig67jkvHz7zKVO_TS_5_9-n--QcirrG-zo6kIzhJoeOEsjpBVKz6qNbkFUqFt0_Wi1GUYpbbu5PhgfFnsLYLzpB9WDNVFaiL4HHxdok1NSaWmk7aXste7kqMbBa41yMLeb_tcMEmOqdHYflErdcMnf9MCzC7S32W21Htzo_42aGjVd19Ut9Cx48Wtv1HRQTjUFbtTkU8QiAuTMYqcTxesGFVHxCSx2yFnwRlRTWQXwJ4tAZT2RWQAzfOUqLoSDCgsPpT1dPK6Uc-LxZVx3SPnXVP9O9BMAAP__4xBrYw) called again for an "assault weapons" ban.
## Seven Dead Horses Overshadow Surprise Derby Win
Mage, a 15-1 long shot, [won a troubled Kentucky Derby](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFzhCAQBeBfgx3OuivqFRRp7C5tSoeDVUlQboA7x3-fMXXqV7zvva_7dDc--H35NBvrMsfJ2OLfPIGSMEikCSunZ2Zkqlg33UCq7QCGatWMYK1tewV974bGKeUskZ25BYMOm8prBCRQMDQADVENHXbtg4ihVbcb9aIFdr7EVH9Hv5eV53DGN6faxq0Kei3lmQV9CBwFjsdx1IlfhVO-coFjfsZUssBxjSmzTMb6fZGbWVgefs_yh_fysqd0nB6nvCzymtUJHKuk3fPwIfjcXYxlMz781Zb_X_gNAAD__9_EXOQ) this weekend after the favorite, Forte, was scratched the morning of the race due to "state veterinary concerns." The Derby went on despite the [deaths of seven thoroughbreds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwjAURp8m2YKu7_VfBg9d2OjaMTL2NXExMXJcEG9f0bnjp284R-frtJx8Lnm7fPobu57q4kPPD15ATWAnpAXH6BIzMo3shLakpAaw4-pmRAyGAqBCtoqsnKP3OqZklWCex-wQkECBFQCC6AAatTwTMUg1z2QGCRxzr-3wXfPWV07lVR_cDqHexuLW3u_7QB8DHgc8-vvGz_19vUfrORQe8Hjlrf-E62uK3M6vaa1t5ymy7-s-oZVJBJTasIw6JZOMFQnNGT2xEH5sLt6fuZS867fM5eZz-YP3_1v8BgAA__97UF3D) the week of the race, including two horses being put down after being injured in undercard races that day. Race officials are [continuing to investigate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCnMZ3RZhccUrj4G7r87ZXImAX2YnBkHBBvf-Lqa6aZYj7N17N7OgmyTv_dwjaPsXM-y84d1BoajdRhMdiRGZkKtjfTUF0ZgKaYLRAZ6KEy493XBMQDwdhUntiNrqdHIRYBCWpobgA3ohIMmqonYqjqx4PuqgIeJMdUfkdZ88xjOOPOqfRxKYKdc35viv4pbBW2x3GUm1yVwnaOaWOdnJd1UtheOwpbqK-4K2wXN7F-8Zo__nXqgVN_6l18junUOblJvD6YX9rPn-RnCUEP8Vi3ItnhfUgIsplLNy1Owq8m_33OTwAAAP__6j5k3w) the unprecedented spate of deaths. The Derby itself boasted an exciting finish on Saturday; [watch here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu8yAURp8Gtlg39wLBA8Ovv7W6JEOXjhaB65gKm8ghtvL2lTt3_T7pHJ2vc3_2Kaf5dvETuzqU3oeaVu5BH8AekHqU0Q3MyCTZHY0lrQyAlaNjrQMFz74dKADEgGhZUTxRHGJrQSaHgAQa7BHgSNSAQaOuRAxKty2dhAKOqZal-S5priMP-VVWXppQJpndWOv9IeifwE5gt21b8yrP-rzy_u-Lr2EU1K2C3vgDL7P5__mulFxcvG8p5_Qwu-I2-ZR_kfXvwp8AAAD__4FWUEc) if you missed it.
## Biden Falls to New Low in National Poll
President Biden's approval ratings [have fallen to 36%,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQxfGnMd2sxmPzVVDchm5vmxIZGNaTGBuBF7RvH22kdKmPdPTT_-M-3J0EiY__buUuL2lwU5aTBywBGyAzUDF3CzOxKbjTVWNKWyE2he90vcx61taaUdfTYsfSYmV4pLoacWp1IR0hGSyx0YjamBtWVNnRGEZbtq2plUWeJaf99pkkZs9LeKWT99uU1iJ0PuftUOafol5Rnz17CeG9Kep9WjnydSjqJ7duTh5RUW_alqw2MMrMEdy27el0AY4g2wE5QeQLQrpAIlzuiyEtQEgWfi8guGecPBzP_eSXor7Yu3m7JAQ5qjf3sTr5IRT571rfAQAA__8ZVmq1) a new low for his presidency, according to a Washington Post-ABC News survey. The share of those who strongly disapprove went up to 47%. The same poll found [Donald Trump leading Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_GdEbLGhtTuEjj7tKmRDYsxyYGI7AO3d9HpE7zqpHeaL4ewyNw4u35GVZyZc5DGAu_aAAtwUpUA1aTm4mQVEWuMVbp1gDYanHakok2Nk1E3WGwQTVmNP3YdGRjAFWxQ0AFGmwD0ChVg0HTRqUIWt33qhMt0MQlH_V35q0sNKd3ftFRj3mtkltK2U-hPgR6gf66rnrPiQuP-QYE-o2uM1EpdJwC_Z7CO-b8I9DfvwI96Hs6gT6GSd60nPMhI0-0yTGvdEreZFkOolMCQK-N7arDTfvFKfFpbsPnGjj9GZX_A_0GAAD__0_YZEg) in a head-to-head matchup by 6 points, with 44 percent for Trump and 38 percent for Biden. Biden faces a continuing set of problems as he pivots to the election, including the fallout from a [brace of investigations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDtuwzAQRE9DdRTW_FkuWKRR57QpBX6W1gaUKFC0hdw-kJEyzTRvgHmYr_t0d5RpfXy6BW1LZXKh0Qsn0BwGLuQkumgTokDZob2YQWplAIZutl4BqKtLMkRMUQ9aB5Xw6pWH6DFgR1aAkKBhuABcpOzBCKO8lAhK327yyhRgpFZq_11obTOm_FNeWPtQli7bubVtZ_KDiZGJ8TiOfiuZGoVyFpgYVzx2JsZzhYkR9BmGidFXF2h98FQqp2VzoXFPEVd-lJoj3ypu-xvOz7Vh_YPJ5VyejQPATRtpumrjdlDOtJtT9bE4ym-19v9TvwEAAP__IDdpNg) into his son Hunter Biden's activities. White House advisors say they worry about the toll this could take on the 80-year-old president.
➤ **Robert Kennedy Jr.** will make his debut as a presidential candidate at a Bitcoin conference in Miami this month. Kennedy is a prominent champion of cryptocurrency, though many Democrats have backed away from the industry after several high-profile failures. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHyoyAQgPGn0Q5n3VVCCopr7HLtlQ7CmmyC4CAXJ29_k6v_9df85vtzm29OoqT7b7exrWuena_y5hlGBUYhzdgGuzIjU8u214bGQQOY9mFNIKMvDgmJ_YIUwFxBu94w6N4htGIRkGAE0wP0RB1o1MNCxDCM1ytdmgE4SM2le2ZJ9cFr_OQ3l87nrY32Uet-NPSrwanB6TzPLi0-8Xl8e4PTnqNU8UeDEwIOiiP7Kjk1OJW8cKnqxSlx-KhnUZt7sfJu253ckwq8_K1qkeqzJOVzWrlw8qyKT85Qj9QWG_ZTYpRDf6H3zUn8D6s_f_oXAAD__7ouaWI)) ➤ **President Biden** named Neera Tanden as his new domestic policy advisor to replace outgoing Susan Rice. Republican senators had blocked the politically combative Tanden from being named head of the Office of Management and Budget, but her new role doesn't require Senate approval. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdEaLF_ugcJGG7tKmRMZejo2MfcLWofv7iEjp0kwxGs08zdd9vjuOnB6fbidb1zw7X_lFM2gJg1Q4qybYlUgRNmQ7M6DuDcDQbBaXACuOHd7AhcF5dKR8HxbSwaiFqGGrQCFoGDqADrEFo0y_IBL0ehzxJnqgwDUf7XfmVDda4zu_6Gh93ptot1qfReCHUJNQ03me7TNHruzzFRBqSnQWoaZrRagJ9J8sHCjJmmVyO8lEdDhZXbpMV-TGRYa8U6ns5dXo39KFFxc6JACMWhvTHDY8T46Ri7kwH7vj-ItV_3_pJwAA__8WSWcw)) ➤ **The California** reparations task force, as expected, approved a plan that could provide payments of up to $1.2 million to every qualifying Black resident. The state still has to vote on the plan; the amount of reparation payments could exceed California's total annual budget several times over. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGStCAQBOCn0QxrHBTdgOBPzPZPL7RYGXbnDoECSm_f_sqLL-zqDr7qj_t6N-w5PP-bnXR1cTVb5YNWGAXMAuWKrdWOCEm2pHs1y3FQAHP70uAmVNPNDDBL2iYclbXkejmNdsQJVMsaASWMMPcAvZQdKFTDQ0qCYbzd5NQMQJZrzN1n5FBf5Pw7HpS7Le6t169aU2nkvwaXBpfzPDsXvwOd5eobXFL0XHkrDS6b8exiDmxEpmSyqRxDEckE8sKklONBV3zvFGoRvUCxs_ccg6CD8ls8vNm-RKbClkJts7bpvAZFXcrnbtj_qurfJ_0EAAD__3Unaqo)) ➤ **Newton Minow** , the former FCC Chairman who famously labeled TV “a vast wasteland,” died at age 97. He made his iconic remark in 1961 at an annual meeting of broadcasters, after daring them to sit through a day of their own TV programming. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnsTei4zgTGBi6ZEvXjhYxR0KFITLIVt--cueOn77lp__Xfb77lFN5fvqVXY919ktPO88wCTAC1YxjcJEZWY3spDZqIg1gxpeTRnsiixatRYoBrDE6RIpIMuD0GJNDQAUTGAkglbqARk0PpRhoslZdBwIOqdft8l1T6S-O-afuvF2Wuo7ZvXp_t0F9DHgb8ObfhY92XufYeloyD3grfPRaxJpKPURI3ETfxe5bF4dvnbMvQSjvLSoiYyJRiPZxjZONBq7IcjFejpsL7yPlnJo-Uc_Vp_yH6P83-Q0AAP__JoZgKQ))
➤ **Tiger Woods** has been accused of sexual harassment in a court filing by his ex-girlfriend, Erica Herman. Herman is seeking $30 million in damages, claiming the golfing legend forced her to either sign a non-disclosure agreement or be fired from her job at his restaurant. Witnesses say the shooter in front of the outlet mall and began firing at shoppers on the sidewalk. Police responded quickly, and efforts to evacuate shoppers were posted on Twitter. (). Very little about the assailant. FBI agents searched his motel room and spoke with his family at the Dallas home where Garcia, 33, lived with his parents. Seven Dead Horses Overshadow Surprise Derby Win Mage, a 15-1 long shot, this weekend after the favorite, Forte, was scratched the morning of the race due to "state veterinary concerns." The Derby went on despite the the week of the race, including two horses being put down after being injured in undercard races that day. Race officials are the unprecedented spate of deaths. The Derby itself boasted an exciting finish on Saturday; if you missed it. Biden Falls to New Low in National Poll President Biden's approval ratings a new low for his presidency, according to a Washington Post-ABC News survey. The share of those who strongly disapprove went up to 47%. The same poll found in a head-to-head matchup by 6 points, with 44 percent for Trump and 38 percent for Biden. Biden faces a continuing set of problems as he pivots to the election, including the fallout from a into his son Hunter Biden's activities. White House advisors say they worry about the toll this could take on the 80-year-old president. ➤ Robert Kennedy Jr. will make his debut as a presidential candidate at a Bitcoin conference in Miami this month. Kennedy is a prominent champion of cryptocurrency, though many Democrats have backed away from the industry after several high-profile failures. () ➤ President Biden named Neera Tanden as his new domestic policy advisor to replace outgoing Susan Rice. Republican senators had blocked the politically combative Tanden from being named head of the Office of Management and Budget, but her new role doesn't require Senate approval. () ➤ The California reparations task force, as expected, approved a plan that could provide payments of up to $1.2 million to every qualifying Black resident. The state still has to vote on the plan; the amount of reparation payments could exceed California's total annual budget several times over. () ➤ Newton Minow , the former FCC Chairman who famously labeled TV “a vast wasteland,” died at age 97. He made his iconic remark in 1961 at an annual meeting of broadcasters, after daring them to sit through a day of their own TV programming. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: McConnell Replacement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican "Leader" since George W. Bush was president. His 16-year tenure has been marked by corporate bailouts, lost wars, Obamacare, the Covid lockdowns, two impeachments of a Republican president, and an unending war against Senate
conservatives.Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement. And several Republican Senators are reportedly angling to run to replace him.

Sen. Mitch McConnell holds a gun at the 2014 CPAC to prevent attendees from booing him. (Photo by Gage Skidmore)

We aren't endorsing any candidate for the job now, but we absolutely endorse new leadership, particularly a new generation of conservative leadership for Senate Republicans.During his entire career, Mitch McConnell has represented the Swamp and its priorities. His idea of
leadership is earmarks, budget-busting spending, ducking policy fights, and producing Republican votes for Democrat bills.McConnell has won plaudits for years for privately and publicly attacking conservatives: Jim DeMint, Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, and others. He constantly complains about
conservative Senate candidates, but the candidates McConnell supports - like Arlen Specter and Charlie Crist - have a curious habit of losing ... and becoming Democrats!The next Republican Leader must understand that the party is not the one McConnell imagines: socially liberal, country club
millionaires. Like the new GOP, the new conservative movement is a working-class party looking out for young families instead of big businesses.The new generation of Republicans wants to fight the Left and win the Culture War. The issues that Republicans actually care about are the issues
McConnell has always shied away from - immigration, abortion, woke indoctrination of our kids, and the corruption of the Deep State. McConnell likes Washington more than he likes actual Republican voters, and that fact will hold back the party and the country as long as he remains in
power.Republican Senators have grumbled for years about McConnell. The difference now is that they're showing signs that they're ready to do something about it.In the 2024 elections, Republicans have a chance for a sweep - to win control of the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White
House. But to truly win, we need more than a change of parties. We need a change of leaders.Senate Conservatives Fund will continue doing our part: supporting conservatives in Senate races, including against McConnell's hand-picked lapdogs. We will continue to hold current leaders accountable,
including in the looming fight over the federal debt ceiling. And finally, we will hold McConnell accountable and keep you updated about the leadership race heating up inside the Senate.If McConnell is on his way out, conservatives could finally be on their way in. With your help, we will work
to give America that opportunity.

Sincerely,

Matt Hoskins
Senior Advisor
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Remaining polar bears in Arctic could face more danger
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760493?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Lonely paws crunch over melting snow. Below, the ice RUMBLES and CRACKS. A mama polar bear scouts for food on the ice shelf, but as more of her habitat disappears, she’s beginning to STARVE! ** **The Arctic is warming TWICE as fast as anywhere else in the world.** Alaska’s Arctic National Wildlife Refuge is one of the last unspoiled places on Earth -- and it’s _**melting!**_ The Indigenous Gwich’in people call this region “the sacred place where life begins,” and many communities rely on this ecosystem’s fragile balance for resources. **Oil and gas developments are threatening to DESTROY the region and accelerate the Arctic’s melting** by spewing climate-warming emissions and toxic pollution. Snowy landscapes and coastal tundras could be _**PAVED OVER,**_ and noisy tanker trucks and drilling rigs could **disturb polar bears, giant caribou, and other animals. ** **These dirty energy projects don’t have to happen -- and they might not with your help.** The insurance giant Chubb has committed not to support projects that threaten the Arctic refuge -- these projects need insurance to get off the ground. **YOU can help push the next insurer to follow in Chubb’s steps and protect the Arctic! [If just 1 of every 9 people reading this email takes action, we can pressure AIG Insurance to OPPOSE fossil fuel destruction in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Please, Friend, take immediate action!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760495?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Gwich’in Steering Committee is asking other insurance companies to follow Chubb’s lead. The Gwich’in people have stewarded these lands since time immemorial. Oil and gas development will not only disrupt that balance -- it will also mean toxic pollution for the people who live here. _**Respiratory illnesses, cancer, and liver disease**_ are just a few of the potential side effects of exposure to fossil fuel pollution.
AIG Insurance has a choice, Friend. It can decide to protect the Arctic from the tyranny of the fossil fuel industry, or it can enable it. **You can help it make the right decision. [Will you tell AIG Insurance to PROTECT the Arctic, its people, and wildlife from oil and gas?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760496?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1760495?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79147%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fQmo6CKP977gZ9EqaMZixg&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79148%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HVM4Z2cKxorxmkno%2fQtqbg&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79149%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RtIJWt4dqFvdgUa9SbqRhg&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79140%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FxU4WdZ6wGk39xuxRRoz0w&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWhSHa7DYN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhSHa7DYN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781230:WhSHa7DYN:m:3:2532013465:4ABADACAB3985DECC5D225E2E18A2C7D:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWhSHa7DYN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhSHa7DYN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Valeria, American Federation for Children
subject: Why I no longer work for the teachers unions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
How did I go from the teacher's unions to school choice? Let me tell you my story.

| | | _****_
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3b0fdkt17rn0tjo04s5r2p6gaivia4f2n613dgo_)
---
| | Friend, I’m Valeria Gurr, a Senior Fellow here at the American Federation for Children. **But I used to work for the teachers unions.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6k05rr83jekc8be0uiejngk5tn5jqlehvgfjeo_)
---
| | [**WATCH MY RECENT INTERVIEW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kj32t6q26nme6c7v1jb83479acto8men2hod78_)
---
| | **How did I go from the teachers unions to school choice?** Let me tell you my story.

As a first-generation Chilean American, I came to the United States seeking endless opportunities.

I was from a disadvantaged and not well-connected family, which means I grew up in the one-size-fits-all public school system.

**My education suffered as a result.** I struggled in large classroom settings, was often bullied, and found myself stuck in an education system that didn't work for me because of our financial situation.

I realized my story was not uncommon and recognized that **the surest way to attain the American Dream is to gain access to a good education. **

I thought the best way to help fix the education system and the next generation of students attain the American Dream was by working for organizations that support education and teachers.

**But, I quickly learned that this teachers union didn’t have the best interests of students or even teachers in mind.** They seemed more concerned with money and maintaining the status quo of the broken system.

That’s when I knew if I was going to make a difference, I had to make a change.

I founded the **Federación Americana Para Los Niños** , which brings information about school choice to Hispanic communities and joined the American Federation for Children as a Senior Fellow.

After leaving the teachers union and joining the school choice revolution, I never looked back.

**[_Friend, now I’m asking YOU to join the school choice revolution by pledging a donation of $20.23 or an amount of your choice today >>>_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi8kuvl056v4n29lbfnsjogbm56pl2rnh0hvispg_)**
---
| | [**JOIN THE SCHOOL CHOICE REVOLUTION: $20.23**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp63knfii2j7dvd56qv15is97t5omdspb30n33rg_)
---
| | Thank you,
Valeria Gurr
Senior Fellow
American Federation for Children
---
| | |
---
| | |
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl10nm2bvtfl5lmjmtnks31e9inmr7pk9k18uoig_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3389uh5dr45sg7nuo90v8npr2nd3mbloj9btfo_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztpdk07dgr24oecdgj613h55fee0cncrgofhs81g_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmt7ntk2gjjb3rk0meo9q6hcrs1b4gjlu5p06eto_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Ten states have banned assault weapons. Sign your name to demand other states follow their lead >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Ten states have banned assault weapons. Sign your name to demand other states follow their lead >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36496573-5209-467b-84c1-136fa26cc09f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbccb6f0c-c9f0-406c-8804-c4d88c0e9a35/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Washington state just became the latest state to ban sales of assault weapons including AR-15s. We applaud the 10 states that have taken action to get these weapons of war off of our streets. The tragic shootings in recent years in Uvalde, Parkland, Las Vegas, San Bernardino, Sandy Hook, and so many more were carried out with an AR-15, a weapon designed to kill many people quickly. There is no reason for any civilian to have these assault weapons in their possession. Since Congress has refused to act after every tragedy we have experienced, these state-level bans are a meaningful way to tackle the gun violence epidemic in our country. And we need more of them. [Sign your name: Demand other states follow the lead of states that have banned assault weapons, and enact bans of their own >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73e37cc2-38cb-4a5e-897f-09920bdbcb87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgupeb429dmgcvilo5pnnppf04s63f78dehdloso_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhmcob2cdh2bs)
---
| | As someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the direction of our country.

I would like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation today by clicking on this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztp5lll63fcbga8dooutqj2njl8feofbvntg7h0g_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhmcob2cdh2bs)

Once you become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to undermine American values.

Thank you for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope to welcome you to our community soon.

Best regards,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. When you activate your membership, you will also receive a personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy update emails. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: McConnell Replacement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican “Leader” since George W. Bush was president.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican “Leader” since George W. Bush was president. His 16-year tenure has been marked by corporate bailouts, lost wars, Obamacare, the Covid lockdowns, two impeachments of a Republican president, and an unending war against Senate conservatives.

Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement. And several Republican Senators are reportedly angling to run to replace him.

---
---
Sen. Mitch McConnell holds a gun at the 2014 CPAC to prevent attendees from booing him. (_Photo by Gage Skidmore_)
---
We aren't endorsing any candidate for the job now, but we absolutely endorse new leadership, particularly a new generation of conservative leadership for Senate Republicans.

During his entire career, Mitch McConnell has represented the Swamp and its priorities. His idea of leadership is earmarks, budget-busting spending, ducking policy fights, and producing Republican votes for Democrat bills.

McConnell has won plaudits for years for privately and publicly attacking conservatives: Jim DeMint, Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, and others. He constantly complains about conservative Senate candidates, but the candidates McConnell supports — like Arlen Specter and Charlie Crist — have a curious habit of losing ... and becoming Democrats!

The next Republican Leader must understand that the party is not the one McConnell imagines: socially liberal, country club millionaires. Like the new GOP, the new conservative movement is a working-class party looking out for young families instead of big businesses.

The new generation of Republicans wants to fight the Left and win the Culture War. The issues that Republicans actually care about are the issues McConnell has always shied away from – immigration, abortion, woke indoctrination of our kids, and the corruption of the Deep State. McConnell likes Washington more than he likes actual Republican voters, and that fact will hold back the party and the country as long as he remains in power.

**Republican Senators have grumbled for years about McConnell. The difference now is that they're showing signs that they're ready to do something about it.**

In the 2024 elections, Republicans have a chance for a sweep — to win control of the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House. But to truly win, we need more than a change of parties. We need a change of leaders.

**[Senate Conservatives Fund](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgvotjrsv4mbc05rg8mpofe7r8f3j3kl9gs771hg_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cth2bs)** will continue doing our part: supporting conservatives in Senate races, including against McConnell’s hand-picked lapdogs. We will continue to hold current leaders accountable, including in the looming fight over the federal debt ceiling. And finally, we will hold McConnell accountable and keep you updated about the leadership race heating up inside the Senate.

If McConnell is on his way out, conservatives could finally be on their way in. With your help, we will work to give America that opportunity. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**
---
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**
---
|
---
---
|
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zki4gr3ararul991claf3kte6cpor21nbams7r8g_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm4pb2cth2bs)
---
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
---
|
---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: If we’re being honest
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The only reason I am here...
#

Hey Peter —
I had an extra few minutes this morning so I wanted to share a few thoughts with you.
Look, there are a number of you receiving this email who have been with me since before my first run for Congress.
There are a number of you who joined at some point in the last few elections.
And, if we’re being honest, there are a lot of folks reading this email simply because I am running against Kyrsten Sinema.
Here’s the truth:
No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.
People like me don’t often make it to Congress.
I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and I joined the Marine Corps after graduating and went to Iraq.
The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.
As a kid, the support from my family.
In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.
In these campaigns, support from people like you.
But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and voting to expand voting rights, protect abortion access, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.
I need your help. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign? We’ve started this month off too slowly, and I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230508&t=1&akid=619%2E734936%2EvrdS7W)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&amount=3&refcode=em230508&t=2&akid=619%2E734936%2EvrdS7W)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&refcode=em230508&t=3&akid=619%2E734936%2EvrdS7W)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in before this deadline ends. It means a lot.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=619%2E734936%2EvrdS7W). name: Hillary Scholten
subject: read with your morning coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I just took a look at our weekend fundraising.

I’m sorry to email first thing on a Monday, but I just took a look at our weekend fundraising and frankly, we’re not where we need to be.

[_**I’ll explain more in a moment, but in case you’re pressed for time here’s a link to give securely right away to ensure we have the resources to defend this seat in 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62964356/405142176/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230508-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzFlNWJlMi1hMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2dP8AHsMUY-OfX0XbQS59Kw5znOBm8CZBa7vwfR1pA=)

With the support of this team, we flipped a 50-year Republican stronghold in 2022, so you can bet they’re eager to take it back – in fact, they’re already spending big on attack ads against me. I wish I could ignore these partisan attacks and focus on advocating for West Michiganders, **but that won’t make them go away.**

The reality is that defending myself requires financial resources – and I’m counting on this grassroots team to have my back. [_**Please, folks, will you invest $10 right away to make sure we can start the week strong and keep West Michigan BLUE?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62964359/405142178/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230508-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzFlNWJlMi1hMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k2dP8AHsMUY-OfX0XbQS59Kw5znOBm8CZBa7vwfR1pA=)

subject: Join me for dinner

body:
I’ll take care of everything, just enter to WIN

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YzadZjwGSGyUbd3Bmjnyg&sysid=1

Friend,

As one of my biggest supporters, I couldn’t be more thrilled to offer YOU this special opportunity.

You could win a trip for two to a once-in-a-lifetime dinner event with me at my beautiful golf club in Bedminster on June 13!

I’ll take care of EVERYTHING for you and your guest:

Flights Accommodations Tickets to the event

And my favorite part, we’ll even take a photo together so that you’ll always remember this amazing evening!

The only thing left to do is enter to WIN. I hope to see you there, Friend!

Please make a contribution to be automatically entered to WIN and YOU could be dining with yours truly before you know it. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YzadZjwGSGyUbd3Bmjnyg&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YzadZjwGSGyUbd3Bmjnyg&sysid=1

Unlike Joe Biden who only courts his left-wing, billionaire megadonors

Biden meets with top donors as campaign courts deep-pocketed Democrats
[Source: NBC News]

the supporters I want to have dinner with are grassroots patriots like YOU.

So, I sincerely hope you’ll enter to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, Friend, because there’s no one I’d rather have dinner with and discuss how we’re going to save our country than YOU.

Please make a contribution to be automatically entered to WIN and YOU could be dining with yours truly before you know it. https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YzadZjwGSGyUbd3Bmjnyg&sysid=1

Thank you,

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YzadZjwGSGyUbd3Bmjnyg&sysid=1

Donald J. Trump

45th President of the United States

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666901%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=96xZJlz4TTfHxfZNy7a88w&sysid=1 . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666902%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5hK6wNf6eaPttq2vfv47kg&sysid=1 or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a June 13, 2023 dinner event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Friend: Under Trump, corporations and the wealthy benefited from massive tax cuts, leaving everyday Americans struggling to make ends meet.

**President Biden's budget seeks to reverse these policies and raise taxes on corporations and the wealthy to cover costs for essential programs, like Medicare and Social Security, that millions of Americans rely on. **

But the GOP is already attacking Biden's plan and using their majority in the House to block these tax increases.

Now more than ever, we need _your_ help to show the GOP that Americans support President Biden's budget.

**As one of our most reliable supporters, we chose you to represent your area in our live survey, but we STILL haven't heard from you! Please, before this poll closes at midnight, tell us:**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18949?t=1001&akid=3218%2E346206%2ER9bAL6 ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230508-3218-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3218_346206_R9bAL6&akid=3218%2E346206%2ER9bAL6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3218%2E346206%2ER9bAL6

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
May 8, 2023
Dear friend,
What a terrific crowd for our first mayoral forum. We are grateful to our hosts, Leor and Lindsey Reef, and all the folks from the neighborhood who came out to meet and hear from the candidates for City of Memphis Mayor.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94287/images/TVP%20Forum%20%282%29.png]
SUPPORT TVP'S VOTER ENGAGEMENT EFFORTS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
TVP is focused on raising voter awareness and supporting progressive candidates for state and local office around our state. Be on the lookout for more to come and, until then, if you want to help, please click on any of the links below.
We'd love your support to host more voter engagement events in the future. Can you send over a contribution of any amount as we plan our next event? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

ComEd Guilty Verdict and the Race to Strike a Deal before Sentencing Spells Big Trouble for Ex-House Speaker Michael Madigan (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/comed-guilty-verdict-and-the-race-to-strike-a-deal-before-sentencing-spells-big-trouble-for-ex-house-speaker-michael-madigan.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

“Nobody’s above the law” was the message that jurors wanted to send on Tuesday evening after former ComEd lobbyist and City Club of Chicago President Jay Doherty; former ComEd executive John Hooker; former ComEd CEO Anne Pramaggiore; and Michael McClain, a former ComEd lobbyist and longtime confidant to ex-House Speaker Michael Madigan were found guilty of bribery conspiracy and falsification of business records, in a trial that pulled back the curtain and exposed the scheme to bribe Madigan in exchange for his support of ComEd’s legislative agenda in the state House of Representatives. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/comed-guilty-verdict-and-the-race-to-strike-a-deal-before-sentencing-spells-big-trouble-for-ex-house-speaker-michael-madigan.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/comed-guilty-verdict-and-the-race-to-strike-a-deal-before-sentencing-spells-big-trouble-for-ex-house-speaker-michael-madigan.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Mayor Keith Pekau Used Fake News Websites to Control the Narrative, Ensuring Favorable Coverage, Publishing Over 70 Stories Since 2017 (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Since 2017, Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau has used a political propaganda website masquerading as legitimate news publications, to control the narrative and ensure positive media coverage – publishing over 70 stories dating back to his 2017 campaign for mayor – and most recently, his failed bid for Congress.

In a Tuesday column written by the
Chicago Tribune (https://www.chicagotribune.com/opinion/editorials/ct-editorial-fake-news-websites-dan-proft-lumen-20230502-rnjyanwlwnc47j5pkiypftaz6e-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) editorial board, this online portal allows elected officials, candidates and their campaigns to submit stories exactly as they want them published – including op-eds, without any fact checking – ensuring, as the Tribune highlighted, “that the finished ‘article’ was about as objective and probing as a campaign flyer.”
Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Di Leo: The Democrats Obsession with Controlling the Climate Change Narrative Is to Ban Everything in Sight (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/opinion-the-democrats-obsession-with-controlling-the-climate-change-narrative-is-to-ban-everything-in-sight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

New York City, to the extent it can, is not only banning normal, efficient, affordable natural gas-powered appliances (furnaces, dryers, water heaters, ovens and ranges) from new construction in the city, they are now attempting to require existing buildings to junk the perfectly good appliances they already have, too and replace them with electric-powered versions.

The state of California, to the extent it can, is not only banning some normal, functional, safe, efficient diesel-powered trucks from the congested seaports that need every truck they can get – they are even trying to find a way to ban strong diesel locomotives from their struggling state. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/opinion-the-democrats-obsession-with-controlling-the-climate-change-narrative-is-to-ban-everything-in-sight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/opinion-the-democrats-obsession-with-controlling-the-climate-change-narrative-is-to-ban-everything-in-sight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Keene: Gun Control Is Not the Panacea Democrats Expect (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/keene-gun-control-is-not-the-panacea-democrats-expect.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=22b5303ccf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_12_38&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-22b5303ccf-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The old saying ‘if the only tool in your toolbox is a hammer, you will begin to see every problem as a nail’ is particularly true in the political world. Pollsters continually advise candidates that they need more polls; media gurus argue more radio and television ads; direct mail consultants claim the key to victory is their message in every voter’s mailbox. Social media experts dismiss all of the above as antiquated and inefficient.

However, few political or real-world problems are susceptible to one-size-fits-all solutions. The tendency to reach for the hammer is nowhere more apparent than in the progressive political approach to crime. Progressives are determined to define crime as a nail and their hammer is “gun control.” They have managed to persuade themselves and each other that if there were no firearms in private hands there would be no crime. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.
