name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Mitch McConnell Retirement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican “Leader” since George W. Bush was president. His 16-year tenure has been marked by corporate bailouts, lost wars, Obamacare, the Covid lockdowns, two impeachments of a Republican president, and an unending war against Senate conservatives.

Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement. And several Republican Senators are reportedly angling to run to replace him.

---
---
Sen. Mitch McConnell holds a gun at the 2014 CPAC to prevent attendees from booing him. (_Photo by Gage Skidmore_)
---
We aren't endorsing any candidate for the job now, but we absolutely endorse new leadership, particularly a new generation of conservative leadership for Senate Republicans.

During his entire career, Mitch McConnell has represented the Swamp and its priorities. His idea of leadership is earmarks, budget-busting spending, ducking policy fights, and producing Republican votes for Democrat bills.

McConnell has won plaudits for years for privately and publicly attacking conservatives: Jim DeMint, Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, and others. He constantly complains about conservative Senate candidates, but the candidates McConnell supports -- like Arlen Specter and Charlie Crist -- have a curious habit of losing ... and becoming Democrats!

The next Republican Leader must understand that the party is not the one McConnell imagines: socially liberal, country club millionaires. Like the new GOP, the new conservative movement is a working-class party looking out for young families instead of big businesses.

The new generation of Republicans wants to fight the Left and win the Culture War. The issues that Republicans actually care about are the issues McConnell has always shied away from - immigration, abortion, woke indoctrination of our kids, and the corruption of the Deep State. McConnell likes Washington more than he likes actual Republican voters, and that fact will hold back the party and the country as long as he remains in power.

**Republican Senators have grumbled for years about McConnell. The difference now is that they're showing signs that they're ready to do something about it.**

In the 2024 elections, Republicans have a chance for a sweep -- to win control of the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House. But to truly win, we need more than a change of parties. We need a change of leaders.

**[Senate Conservatives Fund](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10332%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=npPHIsGpURsoGS3AYJphww&sysid=1)** will continue doing our part: supporting conservatives in Senate races, including against McConnell’s hand-picked lapdogs. We will continue to hold current leaders accountable, including in the looming fight over the federal debt ceiling. And finally, we will hold McConnell accountable and keep you updated about the leadership race heating up inside the Senate.

If McConnell is on his way out, conservatives could finally be on their way in. With your help, we will work to give America that opportunity. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**
---
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**
---
|
---
---
|
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c10333%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n44fYx0Dj%2bo02SbHneGa5g&sysid=1)
---
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
---
|
---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
---
|
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: BIG NEWS 🚨 MARK RONCHETTI LAUNCHES PODCAST
body:
Mark & Krysty Ronchetti starting "No Doubt About It" podcast to talk about a wide-range of topics with intriguing guests! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/06ff8a74bceb/big-news-mark-ronchetti-launches-podcast?e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
|
---
# _Mark & Krysty Ronchetti Launch Podcast!_
|
---
Krysty & I are so excited to announce to you our next venture!
After the Governor's race wrapped up, we considered many different options.
After lots of discussion & prayer, we realized, more than ever before, our country needs strong voices nationwide. Especially in New Mexico.
So, to provide voice to so many who have felt forgotten, Krysty & I are proud to launch:
_**The No Doubt About It Podcast!**_
Our new podcast centers on family, faith, news of the day, and, of course, politics.
We wanted to be the first to tell you we’re releasing the first episode on Tuesday, May 9th.
**CHECK OUT THE TRAILER**
[](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e42a9bc67e&e=567664f14c)
|
---
On _**No Doubt About It**_ Krysty and I will discuss a wide-range of topics and fun spousal banter.
We’ll cover **ANYTHING & EVERYTHING with exciting guests**:
* Behind the scenes stories from the campaign trail
* Current policy being debated from Santa Fe to Washington DC
* Kitchen table issues everyday families face

Our guests will include newsmakers, authors, politicians, faith leaders, and influencers from all across the country.
We want to inform and entertain you on issues where everyday people too often have their _**voices drowned out by media & extremists with big platforms.**_
But, we need you!!!
We need your support to make this podcast a success! We plan on producing & releasing two podcasts each week - but without your help we can’t make this happen.
Between updating you on what’s happening in our community and across the country, we need to have you on our team!
You can visit our website for more information, to buy advertising or to directly donate.

| [No Doubt About It Podcast Website](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cad958f959&e=567664f14c)
---
Also, please listen and "subscribe" or "follow" us on our YouTube Channel and on your favorite podcast platform. The links to the podcast platforms are below.

| | | | | | | | | | [Spotify Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a196e1951c&e=567664f14c)
---
| | [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=47d64ac1ca&e=567664f14c)
---
| | [Stitcher Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c1b83d5a59&e=567664f14c)
---
| | [iHeart Podcasts](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c08f77f973&e=567664f14c)
---
You can also watch the show on our YouTube channel:

| [No Doubt About It YouTube Channel](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ea7990f98f&e=567664f14c)
---

We would be forever grateful for your support. The more you listen to and support the podcast, the more we can share the truth about what happens in our world.
It's time for normal, everyday people to step up and push back on the media & extreme voices in our world.
We look forward to you joining us on our new and exciting journey!
God bless,
Mark & Krysty Ronchetti
|
---
### Follow Us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter!
| | | | [](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ee21c91b54&e=567664f14c)| [](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5c9e65c324&e=567664f14c)| [](https://nodoubtabouititpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=554a1f335f&e=567664f14c)

name: GA Dems
subject: Important Marjorie Taylor Greene update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
This will be quick

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: The scary truth about radicals in education
body:
The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666918%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fQv9Bz%2fF8Zfy%2flbWwfQK9A&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

I’m sure you’d agree that we can’t count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I’ve been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I’m not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

But that doesn’t mean we can’t kick the radicals out of education. There’s been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers’ unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater’s legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666919%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b685F75yyq1PvAMkEfmJcw&sysid=1) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666910%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lknxuDS%2fHPwEcRcHz25bVg&sysid=1)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I’m asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn’t engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>

The reason Goldwater’s school choice movement is so successful isn’t simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It’s because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666918%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fQv9Bz%2fF8Zfy%2flbWwfQK9A&sysid=1)

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers’ unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute’s team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as “racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L5ATm9pbLgr414oguu49Tw&sysid=1)
[Donate $10 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666912%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p7bdcbuKJ214grxCks4gzQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $35 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ekKGtZ5Pgb2z8PezKKI4hw&sysid=1)
[Donate $50 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gQFdbDvC%2f4yTdgpnSF6wbw&sysid=1)
[Donate $100 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666925%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dCdYd9Ku%2fwMEVrbYx24ZuQ&sysid=1)
[Donate $250 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666926%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XH8wbBK2URxl7WjiQ76jTQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666928%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XcmZMLwbv7Qq9LkdN62kDw&sysid=1)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666929%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2y9Cg7e%2fWxEbEJeV7XnvkA&sysid=1)
Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated.

Can I count on you to be the first new donor?

**Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. **

For liberty,

Congressman Andy Biggs

Peter, I’m disappointed but not surprised.
Virginia Democrats said that parents having a choice in education is “crap” and “stupid.”
**Let me tell you: as a father of five, there is NOTHING more important to me than making sure my children get the best education possible - and there’s nothing stupid about that.**
Virginia Democrats see parents as obstacles to woke indoctrination, not partners to help children grow.
_If we’re going to have a say in our children's education, we MUST take a stand and defeat the Left._

[**Pitch in now and DEFEND parental rights in education!**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=f7d18bc3b1c54c499dba37c8f93c292c&_e=MQmy9olLby6ZPiKN3VzswSMuekL-EySCYKl8JYLfXvUqiOv7lBleqLMXaFjTZAn8GJZikJXDiNVVkJ9FsWA_P5PGdRKNcJ0kueVNLxdwOqqoFt2eT-P89D9eYAVeaU5VcyB62HSSqqjNBRtWpLDCPp-TlJbzq6wSF5HgqugDJAEOVDeigBVDoWciQowcEtkrDib-_m-hB8JdRSy8PLv-TJaJmqd9V2rum5-L60eTJD9UIhMOyORxCJX0ocv4qFHuO7gEBlM2PVWth1Wtgt9AhY8p8YJyj7EUiolTrhRadQdgGAcCDZTdtFZ0FjhgYNn70lY2zECCxI8yUHuPM3VAfgAd_caixCBK8Yte4rRZPv-dopA-MuNjpnfnuX6OnQM1)

As parents, our children are our number one priority.

And with so much of their time spent in school, we have every right to know what they’re learning and have a say in their education.

_But Democrats know Virginia parents will NEVER sign onto their woke agenda, so they’re trying to take away our rights and indoctrinate our children._

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m disappointed but not surprised. Virginia Democrats said that parents having a choice in education is “crap” and “stupid.” Let me tell you: as a father of five, there is NOTHING more important to me than making sure my children get the best education possible - and there’s nothing stupid about that. Virginia Democrats see parents as obstacles to woke indoctrination, not partners to help children grow. If we’re going to have a say in our children's education, we MUST take a stand and defeat the Left. As parents, our children are our number one priority. And with so much of their time spent in school, we have every right to know what they’re learning and have a say in their education. But Democrats know Virginia parents will NEVER sign onto their woke agenda, so they’re trying to take away our rights and indoctrinate our children. I’m not about to let that happen, but I can’t stop them alone. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

| | | Peter, This is absolutely despicable.

After I grilled Joe Biden’s Interior Secretary for shutting down a mineral mine as part of her radical climate agenda, she said there were already **too many jobs** in America.

**The Democrats have made themselves clear: they want to ERASE blue-collar America. Their vision is a country of liberal elites, who bow the knee to China’s natural resources, and a hollowed out middle class dependent on the government. **

The Democrats know what blue-collar America stands for: and they absolutely HATE it.

The Left will NEVER respect hard work, family values, and patriotism.

_But it’s not enough for them to send jobs overseas and inject woke into the next generation: they won’t be done until they ELIMINATE blue-collar American altogether._

[**We MUST fight back. name: Team Wexton
subject: We have to get weapons of war off the street
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62974841/405170528/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkwZWViOS1hYWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XA-wR_kr-DZaK7q7Fg4DWtmZZ7bwhimc1WbUBnSlr8Y=)
---
As winter has turned to spring in 2023, our country has sadly seen more mass shootings. From a school in Nashville, to a bank in Louisville, to a house in rural Texas, to a mall near Dallas – assault weapons continue to wreak havoc on families.

This has to stop. The time for excuses has long since passed.

We know that banning assault weapons saves lives. The only reason Congress hasn't acted is because too many members are beholden to the gun lobby. **Jennifer is determined to show that opposing an assault weapons ban in 2023 is a completely unpopular and untenable position.**

[**Will you stand with her now and add your name to help us ban assault weapons? We want to reach 10,000 signatures this week to make sure our voices are heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62974842/405170529/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkwZWViOS1hYWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XA-wR_kr-DZaK7q7Fg4DWtmZZ7bwhimc1WbUBnSlr8Y=&emci=aeda1913-2feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8190eeb9-aaed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62974843/405170530/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkwZWViOS1hYWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XA-wR_kr-DZaK7q7Fg4DWtmZZ7bwhimc1WbUBnSlr8Y=&emci=aeda1913-2feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8190eeb9-aaed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) It's simple: we should not have to fear weapons of war being used in residential neighborhoods or public spaces. And every day we fail to get these weapons off the street, we put more lives at stake.

Jennifer has supported an assault weapons ban her entire career — she co-sponsored one in her first weeks as a Congresswoman. She's proud to have successfully taken on the NRA in every one of her elections in a district that neighbors their headquarters.

She knows that together, our voices are more powerful than a special interest group. That's why she refuses to back down — and she needs as many supporters as possible behind her.

[**It's time we came together to save lives and stop the bloodshed. Please add your name today to support an assault weapons ban →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62974844/405170531/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkwZWViOS1hYWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XA-wR_kr-DZaK7q7Fg4DWtmZZ7bwhimc1WbUBnSlr8Y=&emci=aeda1913-2feb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8190eeb9-aaed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton | **Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62974845/405170532/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230508AWB_N_TW_FULL_8_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTkwZWViOS1hYWVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XA-wR_kr-DZaK7q7Fg4DWtmZZ7bwhimc1WbUBnSlr8Y=)****

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi9gvtt07g591umo2ksntme79jr4v7p8t6di1jh0_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm1o74c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5k9jgmpmif62u2tga6di593r95l04dh4k1hnqfg_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm1o74c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk0met2k7f7t85moe9tn4oicv3kb012ccvv8js80_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm1o74c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmlhcidpo32oqkm4q6hjse16sr45g0dma5f7fgq8_rp22sh2s8i66o76clhm1o74c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Illegal border crossings set to DOUBLE
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)
---

Fellow American,

If President Biden does not act immediately, all hell will break loose.

Title 42 - a critical law in preventing a new wave of illegal border crossings that was enforced under the Trump Administration - is set to expire on May 11th. As soon as this happens, illegal border crossings are set to double!

Look at these numbers:

* Over the last 90 days, Border Patrol has had **_566,136 encounters_** with illegal immigrants.
* That amounts to **_6,300 encounters a day._**
* Without Title 42, this number could rise to over **_1.1 million in 90 days_** based on estimates from Customs and Border Patrol.

...and that's not counting those who don't get caught by Border Patrol!

Title 42 is the Biden Administration's most effective tool in their border security toolbox, and they are taking it completely off the table without any thought of a replacement. This is a purely political decision driven by radicals who want open borders.

******What the heck is it going to take to make the Biden Administration take this seriously?**

Communities across America, and even big city Democrat mayors, are begging Biden to do something, to change course and change the policy. They are overwhelmed by the increase in crime, in drugs, and in human trafficking all as a result of the open border and illegal immigration.

[**Fellow American, I need folks like you to send a strong message to the Biden Administration - don't fix what's not broken, leave Title 42 in place!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)

| [**Tell Biden -
LEAVE TITLE 42 IN PLACE! ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)
---

President Donald Trump did the best job in my political lifetime at protecting our nation and stopping the flood of illegal immigration at our southern border. When he did something, like Title 42, it worked. For Biden to allow Title 42 to expire just because it's a policy from President Trump's Administration is ridiculous.

It's clear that we cannot expect any meaningful enforcement of our laws or defense of our border from Joe Biden and the Democrats, Fellow American - which makes it even more necessary than before to defeat him and **Secure the Senate** in 2024.

[**Add your name to**DEMAND** Democrats in Washington address and fix the pending crisis at our southern border! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)

I know that together, we can make a change.

Thank you,

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)
Lindsey Graham

[**Tell Biden -
LEAVE TITLE 42 IN PLACE! ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61781568:s9Bea7DkN:m:1:877327319:BA27F5CA5BF162FF5C8E08B52869B59C:r)

We must DEMAND that Biden and Baldwin address Wisconsinite's struggles
| [](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=5fbb8ac597754f8eb0def1198850cb9d&_e=oh8-Q4mZaho6GTB-9oTTfPZ353zjZVf_iTY3b8NK2DhNZmzSuToZpaC3agIAnctG1t28z2LJtk0icCWT27BIJ4A4X1SQOiPQAtRulkVK93Myj71a_nZbBjt2eGFNokGouhMqVqJy0JW9_IVv0QEDXLd52tdgSZwnOCqFOcUnQ4cwpVAGxerH7v-EBFSZBfr90G2KQ5fVaxP_XpNVY6ofe5vaDhTkS8vkCvZ1v39GW-w1tPeUooQzEMY7m_CMT9dhD4ar0M2ABWkALY7suExhEuY2ghGCpAS-wrPXpE3PoZskFjw6OupP3j-lIw2kUM_RF_qmZjHYzGLo5U2HqZ-fqbHZJmOMKzqipVc1ZHLRDgs%3D)

Friend,
---
Wisconsinites are suffering as our economy deteriorates due to the Biden-Baldwin agenda that has caused:
---
_
* Rising interest rates
* Increased cost of living
* Cost of goods increasing
* Lower wages
* Savings plummeting
* Increasing fear of recession

_
---
But House Republicans, including our six Republican Wisconsin representatives, have passed a bill that will address the looming crisis and END Biden’s reckless spending.
---
_Unfortunately, Democrat Senators- including Tammy Baldwin- and Biden himself are openly opposing this bill and any attempt to relieve the financial strain on Americans._
---
_That’s why we need you to join us by signing this petition to show Biden and the radical Left that Wisconsinites DEMAND they work on getting our economy back on track._
---
[**Please add your name to our official Debt Petition to show that the people of Wisconsin DEMAND Biden and Baldwin address our nation’s debt crisis to relieve the suffering of Wisconsinites.**](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=5fbb8ac597754f8eb0def1198850cb9d&_e=oh8-Q4mZaho6GTB-9oTTfPZ353zjZVf_iTY3b8NK2DhNZmzSuToZpaC3agIAnctG1t28z2LJtk0icCWT27BIJ4A4X1SQOiPQAtRulkVK93Myj71a_nZbBjt2eGFNokGouhMqVqJy0JW9_IVv0QEDXLd52tdgSZwnOCqFOcUnQ4cwpVAGxerH7v-EBFSZBfr90G2KQ5fVaxP_XpNVY6ofe00hxpInuworD_OUEehCRQoaQQaLCFpLbRMBlJfTZ_eKAZzIxzKkqoQR_utDGkPcwXS5LaYsAbsYJBJY6UhH9FRO5PDWcT-GRQzu8_V9tSEMyWMMMCm-NrUEQo6Xj9pJb4y0kATy-jqiSm8KjlQf4bc%3D)

The pain we feel while pumping gas, buying groceries, and paying bills is a direct result of Baldwin's adherence to Biden's agenda and his reckless spending.
---
_If he had it his way, Biden would have Wisconsin taxpayers continue to fund his reckless spending agenda for another 4 years._
---
And while Biden wants to convince you that our economy is doing well, the truth is that Wisconsin families are worse off today than when he took office.
---
**70% of Americans overall feel the economy is getting worse for their family – the highest percentage in over 20 years!**
---
_It’s time for the people of Wisconsin to put pressure on Biden and his fellow Democrats to work on rebuilding our economy to end the financial struggle of so many people in our state._

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer .
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.
That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).
— Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Important debt ceiling update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| In less than a month, unless Congress acts, the U.S. will default on its obligations.

This would be devastating for Michigan’s working families—defaulting on our nation’s debt could trigger a job-killing recession, mean higher out-of-pocket costs because of rising interest rates, and potentially crash the stock market in a way that would hurt the retirement security of older Americans.

Both parties must come together to both raise the debt ceiling and pass a responsible national budget. Paying our nation’s bills should not be a partisan issue.

But since the start of the new Congress, there have been no serious proposals put forward to address this looming deadline. Instead, Republicans have proposed extreme cuts that would eliminate jobs, hurt our economy and take away health care from veterans.

Congress should not be playing political games with the full faith and credit of the United States. **_[If you agree, will you add your name and let me know which of these proposed Republican cuts you are most concerned about?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62981287/405187771/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230508_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRiMjYxOS1iM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deWvWP_mlqPsQlJdDSjLJEjogzW9yRrP--Ox2HwYOLc=&emci=af10cabb-aeed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=944b2619-b3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Answer Here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62981289/405187773/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230508_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRiMjYxOS1iM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deWvWP_mlqPsQlJdDSjLJEjogzW9yRrP--Ox2HwYOLc=&emci=af10cabb-aeed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=944b2619-b3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
Congress has, dozens of times, raised the debt limit, including under both Republican and Democratic presidents. Under former President Trump, Republicans ran up trillions of dollars of debt and voted to raise the debt limit three times, all while giving a huge unpaid for tax cut to the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations.

Going into default would send the U.S. economy into a tailspin. America wouldn’t be able to pay Social Security and Medicare benefits, the salaries of service members, or for health care of those on Medicaid. It would signal to the world that the U.S. can’t be counted on to meet its obligations.

The time for political games is long over. Congress needs to act immediately to both raise the debt ceiling and pass a responsible national budget that reduces the deficit in the long-term while focusing on working families, not the wealthy and well-connected.

If you agree, I need to hear from you. Please answer my survey today:

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/debtceilingsurvey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62981290/405187776/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230508_SV_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDRiMjYxOS1iM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=deWvWP_mlqPsQlJdDSjLJEjogzW9yRrP--Ox2HwYOLc=&emci=af10cabb-aeed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=944b2619-b3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

Thank you,

Dan

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! Friend,
Last week, a poll showed that we had a 7-point lead over Crooked Joe Biden.
_The Left said it had to be a fluke..._
Well, guess what?
**...Now,_ANOTHER_ poll shows that we’re up by 7! And this poll comes from ABC who NEVER publishes Trump-friendly polls. Let’s just say they don’t like me very much.**
But that didn’t stop ABC’s George Stephanopolous from admitting, _**“this poll is just BRUTAL for Joe Biden.”**_

Hey,

Now that I've been in office for a few months and had a chance to catch my breath, I wanted to remind you of this email I sent a while ago:

\---------
**_Begin FWD Message:_**

Peter,

I'm going to cut straight to it. Our fundraising is sputtering, and we're just not in a position that we need to be.

**I just got to Washington and since DAY 1 on the job, I 've made it clear to the Left that I'm not here to make friends.**

I'm here to fight for Ohio, all Americans, and our God-given rights and freedoms.

Look, there's a laundry list of things that I could say our country needs to be doing right now, securing the Southern Border being one of the top priorities, but I just need you to do one thing: _**[RUSH YOUR SUPPORT.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f671e3fb501543479fba997c92dc0bd6&_e=EZHGXMf2cyhXPgS7-DVtRh9tP_bcJLEq-ChWuBU0RiWqcW1-qSHW-gtRUe8xFYR-Aenskro6zhxaT3TG8A81y-RmyHFFHY-YXugRW0hH9sbHSbSYzxYTCPrgkpTzTE60oyYrnI8btHItfcw0-02s0MIgFErhYmrr7HPIoB98CwBMM05xa1kVeWmVamK2lH1xkH1mVrNPEk2muobLkmZbjcJQNHZkEPFXXz5zmr2QqC45T_ywfQx1jNMwP-dQ7bmPsPTzqlTKSNZv2qR2mku2uG3tx-6Qu07h5HC8LtMhP0UsWLpExI5khpoQ_1NGnC_FvknQpora8mCyYGIeYO2WkMiVFrpSdbt-1wU5FswTnWnVQkx75J5fBjAYqgqvc1EoiGfUZoP-eVB9Z5ib5trIOi0RTS4X8IUHsDIUi86K0IcAcQ3KcQhVihIJUrFeKuGrlyCbTdNJ4-s2hwu2jilnC7UjK1iDazoOoJ6u6vj_1KKETgV2h63QS9KWVrO0XIxg4AjILT5a5PEXMDHntcwetExHiLA7bQ0wqFrc43sBcJdzpzzM4kdwaXPdjJHWb38C)**_
\---------

Now that it's been a few months, **I need to ask for your help again.** I rely on donations from Patriots like you. Without your support, I'm not able to move forward and I am at risk of being defeated by the Left. I set goals every month and it's CRUCIAL that I meet them.

**[So, can you chip in any amount to push me toward my next goal?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f671e3fb501543479fba997c92dc0bd6&_e=EZHGXMf2cyhXPgS7-DVtRh9tP_bcJLEq-ChWuBU0RiWqcW1-qSHW-gtRUe8xFYR-Aenskro6zhxaT3TG8A81y-RmyHFFHY-YXugRW0hH9sbHSbSYzxYTCPrgkpTzTE60oyYrnI8btHItfcw0-02s0MIgFErhYmrr7HPIoB98CwBMM05xa1kVeWmVamK2lH1xkH1mVrNPEk2muobLkmZbjcJQNHZkEPFXXz5zmr2QqC45T_ywfQx1jNMwP-dQ7bmPsPTzqlTKSNZv2qR2mku2uG3tx-6Qu07h5HC8LtMhP0UsWLpExI5khpoQ_1NGnC_FvknQpora8mCyYGIeYO2WkMiVFrpSdbt-1wU5FswTnWnVQkx75J5fBjAYqgqvc1EoiGfUZoP-eVB9Z5ib5trIOhMw4VIezGHOXjyYFYTUUUDECTnvw7jvEwKxMiQ2jG8Uy1ihhBqQuAFK-V7lBIdTZTWYNMtvsJL2Hri3rtRjqCnbRFXAc9nhOFSHdKfIrJcpFMdiU5xUUFnmx4Et_Pfn7rrqlNZ40phfiL5Fqu1Hp-jG6_Eczu8uJb8l3Zlgjxel)** | [**RUSH A DONATION NOW**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=f671e3fb501543479fba997c92dc0bd6&_e=EZHGXMf2cyhXPgS7-DVtRh9tP_bcJLEq-ChWuBU0RiWqcW1-qSHW-gtRUe8xFYR-Aenskro6zhxaT3TG8A81y-RmyHFFHY-YXugRW0hH9sbHSbSYzxYTCPrgkpTzTE60oyYrnI8btHItfcw0-02s0MIgFErhYmrr7HPIoB98CwBMM05xa1kVeWmVamK2lH1xkH1mVrNPEk2muobLkmZbjcJQNHZkEPFXXz5zmr2QqC45T_ywfQx1jNMwP-dQ7bmPsPTzqlTKSNZv2qR2mku2uG3tx-6Qu07h5HC8LtMhP0UsWLpExI5khpoQ_1NGnC_FvknQpora8mCyYGIeYO2WkMiVFrpSdbt-1wU5FswTnWnVQkx75J5fBjAYqgqvc1EoiGfUZoP-eVB9Z5ib5trIOpjzIRfrr7XBei_iaXh9zg8WwcXDCGDL-CYUPFH9xXozCmEM0DxqN2ak32PE326rEhQW_VPORHbViQOcpVpYeMlb4X2H5vS1O3VaDjADINTKHhpUi6bvnLASrMpOfNDSCnFvpfKmtylql4WrzVMBF5xsulymdluJ4bAi2K1fjS5_)

clean_body: Can you help again? | Hey, Now that I've been in office for a few months and had a chance to catch my breath, I wanted to remind you of this email I sent a while ago: \--------- Begin FWD Message: Peter, I'm going to cut straight to it. Our fundraising is sputtering, and we're just not in a position that we need to be. I just got to Washington and since DAY 1 on the job, I 've made it clear to the Left that I'm not here to make friends. I'm here to fight for Ohio, all Americans, and our God-given rights and freedoms. Look, there's a laundry list of things that I could say our country needs to be doing right now, securing the Southern Border being one of the top priorities, but I just need you to do one thing: \--------- Now that it's been a few months, I need to ask for your help again. I rely on donations from Patriots like you. Without your support, I'm not able to move forward and I am at risk of being defeated by the Left. I set goals every month and it's CRUCIAL that I meet them. | I'm relying on you. Thank you, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. name: Dr. Benjamin Abella
subject: Working in ER can be pretty grim. When I read Helen's safety plan, I felt renewed optimism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hi folks,

As an Emergency Room Physician in West Philadelphia, I see the devastating effects of violence in our community every day. And frankly, I am tired.

I’m tired of seeing children on an operating table when they should be at school or on the playground. I’m tired of informing families that their loved one has been shot or killed. And I’m tired of the insufficient effort that has been placed to the underpinning to the violence that plagues this city.

That is why I’m supporting Helen Gym for Philadelphia’s next Mayor, and I’m humbly asking you to join me on May 16th.

Helen's public safety plan is not only practical, but visionary.

Her proposals are specific and action-oriented, and as a longtime medical scholar, I appreciate that they are grounded in science, research, and data. I believe that approach is essential if we’re going to make a real difference in our community.Important steps in Helen’s plan include deploying more mental health first responders on the streets, promoting more detectives to solve crimes, reducing 911 response times, and cleaning and greening neighborhoods.

Working in an Emergency Department can be pretty grim, but when I read Helen's plan, I felt renewed with optimism. I’m confident Helen will be an effective leader — one who will work tirelessly to make our community safer and more equitable.

But Helen and I can't make this change alone. We need your support to make Helen's public safety vision a reality. That’s why I’m asking:

Please add your name to pledge to vote for Helen, and her transformative public safety agenda, on or before May 16th. Every vote for Helen is a vote for safer schools, neighborhoods, and public spaces. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pYtGfRoSBkWWfJ5qTpTxlw2]

PLEDGE TO VOTE → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/pYtGfRoSBkWWfJ5qTpTxlw2]

Philadelphians deserve to be represented by someone who will always put our city first and someone who will prioritize their health and safety.

Emergency medical staff like me see lives cut short by violence far too often, and it doesn’t have to be this way. Please join me to support Helen and her plan to make us all safer.

Thank you,
Benjamin Abella, M.D.
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=96xSotIizjnVT5VRtV3jcO9Jparp0Gpnsj8RTO2hHu9ycRqAvRiPdGEKjfQYvlVobi%2BBoUGhq%2Bec4MxXzsZ7QjvoRYIpTtFfrjP2or5eKGPUTGJhcSCSU%2F9i3sMtYtTvsd4Ny%2B39%2BAQfc1IsY5SPkQSGAc7lQPXm3Wy2L5%2BS7hgigW09%2Ft6hXrH7vTKGUPsEf9kFuNZH4y0cFYKv%2FZUxaca2lR2kDe7WziOThrrZC%2FG%2FpD9ylv3xH2wXilCyejhLUqwNWdNSVH3Fz9RZ5K0UkAHwXc5%2BmeBuGXq5AfwHepBW2jkH7ZDPnI8g8OTrsidnai76txZfKykU%2F%2BIsp3XpqiYtZU3%2BfLCQFYxpA2SJyYbCGncLBhAjEb7KjiB0PThiBIWTDTVPbQ3tasuEv3D%2BAT5ksiChwdLjzIwOB3Nl7IAuzE9AXNqkdlkqU5Nksyqo]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carmen=20Goers?=
subject: Let’s draw a RED line Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
The drug crisis is a matter of public safety. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5634182f225a/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13548687?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=59c7a396b7&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| As drug usage, addiction, and overdoses plague our state, our state legislature hasn’t agreed upon a solution to tackle this crisis.

Across Washington state, countless hours and dollars are being spent on programs to provide services and treatment to those caught up in the throes of drug addiction.

When drugs were decriminalized by the Washington Supreme Court with the Blake decision in 2021, we were left swinging on an extreme pendulum to a reality that our communities cannot sustain.

This led to drug usage being found as a misdemeanor criminal penalty, and this statewide measure will expire on July 1st.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c7171f6069&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Plainly put, it’s a matter of public safety.**
As cheap fentanyl fixes and the new zombie drug called ‘Tranq’ become more prevalent on the streets in our communities _we must protect our youth from being exposed to this travesty_.

It’s time to unite and declare that **public drug usage** is where we are drawing our **Red Line** for the future of Washington. _[**Peter, join me in telling our state officials that the people of Washington expect a****Red Line****to be drawn for public safety:**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=14dbd619ab&e=0e51d1e991)_
---
| [DRAW A RED LINE](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=49df1a88e6&e=0e51d1e991 "DRAW A RED LINE")
---
| [UPHOLD PUBLIC SAFETY](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4b0cb4a246&e=0e51d1e991 "UPHOLD PUBLIC SAFETY")
---
| [<< ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=93884fb86e&e=0e51d1e991 "<< ADD YOUR NAME >>")
---
| Turning this drug crisis around will be a colossal undertaking, but united together we can achieve the impossible! I look forward to taking the fight against drugs entering our state to Congress for the people of Washington.
---
| For Washington,
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=de43873104&e=0e51d1e991)

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: Bad news for responsible Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
If you plan on taking out a mortgage and have a good credit score, we have some bad news for you.

**Joe Biden’s new mortgage rule _INCREASES_ fees on borrowers with good credit scores to help subsidize mortgages for people with bad credit scores. **

**That’s right - Joe Biden is PUNISHING fiscally responsible Americans!**
You shouldn’t have to pay for this, Peter.
We’re working to STOP this disastrous policy and the rest of Joe Biden’s socialist agenda, but we need your help.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Next Tuesday: Pennsylvania’s Democratic state house majority is on the line in these special elections!
body:
What happens in Pennsylvania doesn’t stay there.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fa98ae0-64db-4609-844c-06b36e7305b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **Folks, It's Go Time. There's One Way You Can Make A Huge Difference Today.** _In 8 days there'll be 2 special elections in Pennsylvania to determine if we hold onto our state house majority--to protect democracy, abortion rights & enact gun safety--or lose it to a seditionist Republicans hostile to these essential rights._ [**_We have a 101-100 margin in the state house. Yet, if we lose both races, we'll be down 102-101. WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ee4edab-7600-4195-8d04-b59160830c92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**There are 13 million Pennsylvanians who will suffer if we do. Worse yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics (see Silicon Valley Bank) don't recognize state lines. Tens of millions more Americans live in surrounding states like New York, Ohio and New Jersey. They too, will suffer.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbd6d77e-4e91-43dc-95ab-c51026d4e368/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Please, for the liberty of these tens of millions--and all Americans--support Democrats Heather Boyd, running to "protect women's bodily autonomy" and Trevor S. Finn's, who'll block the permitless carry of guns to protect our children fron the insanity we just saw in the Allen, TX mall._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn to fight for our basic rights, instead of letting MAGA Republicans force dictatorial policies on so many of us?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T210603cc-5946-495a-a4a9-38ece63f8104/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Teachers make everything possible
body:
It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week – and I’d like to stop for a minute and express my gratitude for educators in PA-06 and across the nation.
| | |
---
It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week, Derek – and I’d like to stop for a minute and express my gratitude for educators in PA-06 and across the nation.

My father came to the United States as a refugee, and he instilled in me and my brother that a good education is one thing that no one can take from you. He’s right – and what’s more, education is only possible thanks to the dedicated, steadfast work of our educators.
Do you remember your favorite teachers? I do. Teachers make everything else possible, and investing in education is investing in the future of this country (and the world). In fact, I was at my high school just a few weeks ago and was able to thank a few of them in person!
As a mother and former teacher for Teach For America, I know that access to quality, affordable education for all children is critical. Since entering Congress, I’ve introduced legislation that supports education and educators, like the bipartisan READ Act, which creates a grant program allowing states to help teachers access resources for literacy instruction and for identifying at-risk students.
I’ve also co-sponsored the bipartisan Teacher Diversity and Retention Act and the bipartisan Supporting Early-Childhood Educators’ Deductions (SEED) Act, both of which would support more teachers and educators in their professions, which are highly demanding. I’ve seen the need for a more diverse teacher workforce and for a focus on early childhood education firsthand!
To address the STEAM skills shortage, I introduced the bipartisan Mathematical and Statistical Modeling Education Act, which would advance innovative approaches to support and sustain high-quality mathematical modeling education.
This work is far from over, Derek – there are still so many ways we can support teachers in the classroom and in their communities. This Teacher Appreciation Week, I’m reflecting on all the work we’ve done so far – and all that remains to be done.
If you’re a teacher, thank you. (If you’re not a teacher, thank one you know for me!)

As always, there is work to be done,

Chrissy

clean_body: It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week – and I’d like to stop for a minute and express my gratitude for educators in PA-06 and across the nation. | | | It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week, Derek – and I’d like to stop for a minute and express my gratitude for educators in PA-06 and across the nation. My father came to the United States as a refugee, and he instilled in me and my brother that a good education is one thing that no one can take from you. He’s right – and what’s more, education is only possible thanks to the dedicated, steadfast work of our educators. Do you remember your favorite teachers? I do. Teachers make everything else possible, and investing in education is investing in the future of this country (and the world). In fact, I was at my high school just a few weeks ago and was able to thank a few of them in person! As a mother and former teacher for Teach For America, I know that access to quality, affordable education for all children is critical. Since entering Congress, I’ve introduced legislation that supports education and educators, like the bipartisan READ Act, which creates a grant program allowing states to help teachers access resources for literacy instruction and for identifying at-risk students. I’ve also co-sponsored the bipartisan Teacher Diversity and Retention Act and the bipartisan Supporting Early-Childhood Educators’ Deductions (SEED) Act, both of which would support more teachers and educators in their professions, which are highly demanding. I’ve seen the need for a more diverse teacher workforce and for a focus on early childhood education firsthand! To address the STEAM skills shortage, I introduced the bipartisan Mathematical and Statistical Modeling Education Act, which would advance innovative approaches to support and sustain high-quality mathematical modeling education. This work is far from over, Derek – there are still so many ways we can support teachers in the classroom and in their communities. This Teacher Appreciation Week, I’m reflecting on all the work we’ve done so far – and all that remains to be done. If you’re a teacher, thank you. (If you’re not a teacher, thank one you know for me!) As always, there is work to be done, Chrissy | | = | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Box 222 Devon, PA 19333 United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters...

|
New CBS News Poll
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zooq6lmjbj97498a43500cg9bhgv9lgvs163fri8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)
The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence.

Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**Ramaswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there.**

I am looking to you to help today. **[Any amount you give will help us achieve this goal- even just $1 or $5.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcrtkdkvgu7fc5tdr9le3032euekphbb4bah997o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)**

We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. **[Help however you can, Fellow American.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5v2beovfdhacolh8pv107k7i7tst3qh8i3nuha0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4oc91be0jvo45jiqkl85vge1ujncp4soe0l71eg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znjnqbskjcr45i6odutj63rl1p9bt04ggdr43lro_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zea15g9ln3rrj01m7rm6l640m4jipss8chcbgfc0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o32c1h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf12h0rono8r6hbt2iu92nbq1st8qf0265h9st50_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o36cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq9q16rh11i2hpv75fg5on6ghhhh92engrqu5go_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljm6o36cph2bs)

It’s no shock that under a radical Democrat administration, our country faces crisis after crisis. The two most pressing situations this week are the southern border and the debt ceiling. We are asking you to call your Representative and both of your Senators this week to apply pressure where it is needed.
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._H9AWf7Rw)
---
The House Republicans have put forth a border security bill that is actually good! We need to call the House and tell them to pass it! **When you[call your representative](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), tell him or her to vote YES on H.R. 2, the Secure the Border Act of 2023** **([read the summary](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Bm1BG7_6yZgarCw))**. _**The vote will be held on Wednesday on the House floor, so make sure to call before Wednesday!**_

# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22538%2E3422442%2EVQSoCc)
Katie Porter is the only single mom of school aged kids in Congress, and she’d be the only one in the Senate. **[Can you chip in to help send her to Washington to fight for families?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230508-1?refcode=EMAH08_1_MOM_20230508_V1_F&refcode2=22538_3422442_VQSoCc&akid=22538%2E3422442%2EVQSoCc)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230508-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH08_1_MOM_20230508_V1_F&refcode2=22538_3422442_VQSoCc&akid=22538%2E3422442%2EVQSoCc)**
There’s nothing unusual about being a single parent. But they’ve lacked real representation in Congress, and that has real consequences for kids, parents, and communities. Katie called out the “single parent penalty” in the Child Tax Credit—**a benchmark that made it harder for single parent households to receive support.**
Giving kids what they need to thrive is the best investment we can make in our country. But for decades, politicians whose websites feature a postcard-esque two parent family have decided to punish the children of single parents—even though they often need more, not less, support.
Katie’s family may not look like most of the others that flock to Washington on the day they’re sworn in. But that’s a good thing. **She’s running to shake up the status quo and fight for all Californians.**
Team KP
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230508-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH08_1_MOM_20230508_V1_F&refcode2=22538_3422442_VQSoCc&akid=22538%2E3422442%2EVQSoCc)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH08_1_MOM_20230508_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22538_3422442_VQSoCc&akid=22538%2E3422442%2EVQSoCc)**

Katie Porter for Senate

Ruben is the candidate for Senate that this moment demands. |

The son of immigrants, he was one of four children raised by a single mother working on a secretary’s salary. He overcame those difficult circumstances to attend Harvard University, where he worked multiple jobs to pay for school, and ultimately enlisted in the United States Marine Corps.
He served on the front lines in Iraq, enduring heavy fire and tragic loss of life — ultimately inspiring him to fight for Arizona veterans and working families as an organizer, a State Representative, and a Congressman.
Now, Ruben is running for U.S. Senate to continue standing up for our democracy and fighting for the people who are deciding between rent and groceries, not the rich and the powerful. His legacy of service and commitment to defending our democracy and our values make Ruben exactly the candidate this moment demands, and if elected, he will be Arizona’s first Latino Senator.
**[Peter, join me in supporting Ruben’s campaign for Senate by splitting a donation of any amount today. Ruben has stood with me in Congress in our fight for democracy and justice, and I know he’ll build on that progress in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62984479/405201505/1588853828?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzk3ZWE5Mi1iZGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qlgVSdW7chZhDeULazgP-2vBrCPvsjed5Tn7n7rx52g=)**

subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?

body:

|

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your Supreme Court Survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9bs2fs81ff3r2og78l8d5rjjopmcoftoogp1dgo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze8vv1t1dpt19upphk3e1ihgrfs0im82opf8ic38_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkudufgtjt5913fo4jfhh9m5fj4pmk6088ca3660_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2fnoejh5lchoqudcmta7i0sd35tkc1c9h7dq8n0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0hd3ok1jdnavsping8ts07bmfnhdg2bu31agubg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1gp780qqj83irf7j58hvoa434nheuom6dqspfto_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68o30c9j64oh1k8gn48n24hhm1pj5ctjm1or2c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9jrdvesa929uvrtcng75dkj8l543k1kf0ofcsco_rp22sh2s8i66o76cljmeo73c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqnv94r8oaf78o5fvcm5v7aa1q02urb0oa5fn5qo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0spimepr0sdh649fg)

name: Erin Van Natta
subject: Invitation: Matt Gaetz and Joe Kent Gala!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Gaetz Kent Joint Victory Committee
body:
Dear Peter,
We've got a fantastic event coming up on Saturday, July 1st in Lake Tapps, Washington: The "Great Gaetsby" 1920-Style Gala featuring Congressman Matt Gaetz and our future Congressman, Joe Kent.
We are going all out for an unforgettable evening of gourmet food, top-shelf drinks, and live music set to the theme of the Roaring Twenties - all at a beautiful estate befitting Jay Gatsby himself.
And it's for the best imaginable cause: helping elect Joe Kent to Congress!
We have limited tickets available - get yours today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/03w5r7639892L7W9EwDl892allag/DJhw0zH892il892UoLp9Gu8G3A).
Congressman Gaetz has been a leading warrior for conservative causes and the US Constitution, and we are honored that he took time out of his busy schedule to join us at this event.
Included in ticket options are a VIP reception and catered dinner, seating with Joe and Congressman Gaetz, and an exclusive breakfast with the Congressman and his wife, Ginger.
Get your ticket now at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/bpzhdEUoKWXEFf3AeOsG4g/DJhw0zH892il892UoLp9Gu8G3A).
Thank you and we look forward to seeing you there!
Erin Van Natta
Joe Kent for Congress

Paid for by the Gaetz Kent Joint Victory Committee
