name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am ready to defeat Joe Biden
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscSaf7DNY

Vivek 2024

It's a myth that Joe Biden is actually running for
president. He's not.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscSaf7DNY

Fellow American,

Joe Biden officially announced
that he's running for president.

He's not *really* running - it's
just the managerial class using Joe Biden as a front to advance
its own agenda. To them Biden's cognitive impairment isn't a bug.
It's a feature.

The administrative state more
effectively controls its puppets when they are hollowed-out husks
of themselves. The fact that it's elder abuse is just a cost of
doing business for Biden's handlers. It's revealing that the DNC
refuses to host primary debates this year; they're spitting in
the face of their grassroots base.

Fellow American, that's why it's
so important to me that, on the Republican side, we have a robust
primary - one where we can actually debate the *real* issues
Americans face every day.

But to have a primetime spot on
the debate stage in August, I need your help. We need to build
our team of unique donors to this campaign. That's why I am
asking for just $1 today.

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $24 ➔

We won't anoint a chosen
candidate from day one like the Left. This is how the managerial
class crushes everyday citizens - not with a bang, but with a
whimper.

I am looking to you, Fellow
American. Before the end of the day, will you chip in $1 or more
to not only help offset the millions Joe Biden and Dems are
raising today, but also to help us get one step closer to
securing a spot on the stage for the first Presidential Debate?

The left hides from debate. We
embrace it. Put me at the center of that debate stage.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

DONATE TODAY →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

---
Friend, I'm just following up here because we REALLY can't afford to flub this...
**Trump and the GOP are raising money for the 2024 election HAND OVER FIST. If we want to beat them, our strategy needs to be 100% on point, but without the insights of top Democrats like you, we don't stand a chance. **
Please, friend, I'm standing by as the responses are rolling in – will you take just 60 seconds to let us know your priorities for this election cycle? Here's a good link to use:**[https://surveys.signforgood.com/ab-2023-carville-priorities-2](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62987164/405210889/-1572768985?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2558-su-nd&refcode=jtk2558-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwYmEwYTc5LWMyZWQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ziAe20eAr5O3UalWO4m8EjFs75K3qos0roDJ962eZd4=&emci=d4269f1d-54eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a0ba0a79-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**
Thanks.

– James Carville
\------------Forwarded Message-------------- Sender: **James Carville** Date: May 7, 2023 Subject: I have an exclusive invitation for you, friend
| | | | |
---
Real quick, friend – I just got out of a strategy meeting for American Bridge, and I wanted to update you on the findings of our recent priorities survey!

**We asked our supporters what _they_ think Democrats' TOP priorities should be – here's how they responded: **
📊 89% said **protecting + expanding reproductive health care**

📊 75% said **combating GOP conspiracy theories and misinformation**

📊 72% said **protecting Social Security and Medicare**

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Peter, I need you to read this
body:
| | | Peter, I was there, in the thick of battle, when some of my best friends paid the ultimate price in service to our great nation.

**This is why Joe Biden’s complete and shameful abdication of his duty to protect and defend the United States makes my blood boil.**

Every time Biden kowtows to Communist China’s latest move to supplant America as the world’s #1 superpower or bows to far-left radicals determined to drive the U.S. economy into the ground, I’m more motivated than _ever_ to stop him.

As Chairman of the House Armed Services Subcommittee on Readiness, I’m using every tool at my disposal to strengthen America’s fighting forces.

I’m determined to ensure our men and women in uniform have what it takes to win on the battlefield.

But while I’m working hard to restore U.S. military readiness and expose the inept Biden regime, I must also redouble fundraising efforts for my reelection campaign.

The Federal Election Commission has raised the maximum contribution limit by _**14%.**_

That means liberal mega-donors like George Soros can pour even more money into defeating America First Republican Congressmen like me.

So, to win reelection here in Florida, I’m going to have to lean on grassroots patriots like you more than ever.

**Peter, the richest socialists in America have their eyes laser-focused on Florida.**

They know this is my home and where leaders are born. So please, don’t lay this message aside without first responding to my plea for help. I truly need you on my team.

Whether you can send $5 or $500, please know how thankful I am to have you fighting shoulder-to-shoulder with me for America. **[Mikewaltz.com/securelink/Peter](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=966ada187ffb42d0b4e2e081ced558f5&_e=9Xk8lhRD4thfw1lYbIg1MiSI0-jwXiCa9f866eRfB4LOZiVD7szKRFXk7aLz4FZgSEs-rGuJ-BybwRqpEMyWKZaTvG9ZscRp7I3rXbNtrdxKTlqitONKbYZgeBhfSzzp6xHSFzKto64aMGrcpJig0lgrU6-4f6iQDF-KIoJeulSmjNmKynPYi8n4v60_gF7oCkY44i4B5Tcu0WuiXHekp_w03GPHGeE4PFEYA66As_BXTzYsRev7xPNXNWeXjqqmuouma3V7cUYbTgl0HQW1s9e8Y-e0bYvOb6-PWBK6UaYGRST4_kRIUeR_xL0j-bINSEzyHSnpcBW869kmdEzctn_iVDhzk2pC4I5sx1bt6bZcJBlVkr_hKW3OwDGONWPRRPLps6QZy3Z-fQuQU1C3Ew%3D%3D)**

| | Thank you and God bless you! De Oppresso Liber,

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a639d3f9f84439ea7df5a4352f5e658&_e=grXtr60-BDGTdfALRdZCgA2DIxhzq__mkAQmQlfzh4EeqAcF1yEs4RGYVQEcTZC98ZILk853cI10QJkd-6q4735q3-WC1B97lHUrn5hwIfUjwstDS-ZYCR0ZxqnKmKzgQZPutjl3MY5ibnStcWJHMi86561YzY5-it-IPEc5ADQhJkTRZNOtLt5QnKBjzxYFNGMhjEruu-WGGmDTYuRtDUoYYv7tss0Nce6UioeYuLV5gw5KhsfyuKP_5zfsuaocLDd1HoM5OT8eurBNQJ_PyPAjpubQ8Y_GmgaZdlb_gsSQf7_A38x5IzYNGKW-On4fSNRiF3k38G2clVg80y-pHj4XRDm16ftiRj0YaY3kozdUGbf1aZe0PzWw5Og103vwhA6S9Rh-ZRE7Gz3Q2H95uTqCfF7XRUVoOznKMJgsxB8%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a639d3f9f84439ea7df5a4352f5e658&_e=grXtr60-BDGTdfALRdZCgA2DIxhzq__mkAQmQlfzh4EeqAcF1yEs4RGYVQEcTZC98ZILk853cI10QJkd-6q4735q3-WC1B97lHUrn5hwIfUjwstDS-ZYCR0ZxqnKmKzgQZPutjl3MY5ibnStcWJHMi86561YzY5-it-IPEc5ADQhJkTRZNOtLt5QnKBjzxYFNGMhjEruu-WGGmDTYuRtDUoYYv7tss0Nce6UioeYuLV5gw5KhsfyuKP_5zfsuaocLDd1HoM5OT8eurBNQJ_PyN25r-XsD07Jj-bujOqv2LF2KF3XJCakKL1R_ZjBS0vf1H4uNeINVwWaHQffOdiDbxMTL3NrvjoARc0ODb8qwkwFLk3TdIuuzvbP3hGfEzTxe5zFr8KTU0qSENWYH7cCQXd2gQRla4puf2BT0j18j3s%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a639d3f9f84439ea7df5a4352f5e658&_e=grXtr60-BDGTdfALRdZCgA2DIxhzq__mkAQmQlfzh4EeqAcF1yEs4RGYVQEcTZC98ZILk853cI10QJkd-6q4735q3-WC1B97lHUrn5hwIfUjwstDS-ZYCR0ZxqnKmKzgQZPutjl3MY5ibnStcWJHMi86561YzY5-it-IPEc5ADQhJkTRZNOtLt5QnKBjzxYFNGMhjEruu-WGGmDTYuRtDUoYYv7tss0Nce6UioeYuLV5gw5KhsfyuKP_5zfsuaocLDd1HoM5OT8eurBNQJ_PyBD81X-SNP5gSg5ZCEp3gQ7xfSVWb5v2_miVSiYZHziZ1v-MBuX3c6WTOTZwXROp8JJVKhcHWUAvfyX8SXeR0se178NFuyUCUYE277VmyyWBXFWQBvNpcxe_T8JUOkmhBu02Jw52vGFh5E5UnvkOn2c%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a639d3f9f84439ea7df5a4352f5e658&_e=grXtr60-BDGTdfALRdZCgA2DIxhzq__mkAQmQlfzh4EeqAcF1yEs4RGYVQEcTZC98ZILk853cI10QJkd-6q4735q3-WC1B97lHUrn5hwIfUjwstDS-ZYCR0ZxqnKmKzgQZPutjl3MY5ibnStcWJHMi86561YzY5-it-IPEc5ADQhJkTRZNOtLt5QnKBjzxYFNGMhjEruu-WGGmDTYuRtDUoYYv7tss0Nce6UioeYuLV5gw5KhsfyuKP_5zfsuaocLDd1HoM5OT8eurBNQJ_PyB3wFn5Y6leSNFGo8ZaGGx8jNGbBYeEz9wJIYdWVi5rVFEPW9BZldAvFiF7t3cPkxUNt5qwBgLZPoZLDXLyj00kzOMAno9S50LdeWN1_Vor7OqVXBNQYcACEnfolnpoW6blRAGZ7QSDwW8E_xBIta9E%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Don’t look to D.C. to reform education
body:
I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73b9d7e9b0e4e59918fcbedda86e161&_e=Kj0gg8jz_Jwwt3ewVZvB9snrXFYK6vEEPBw2ONsxQeQ01l7qHpFEg2sK8T5iNXDattEdZP5R3g7u8TNR32_Pxejv9CGJzQ9qpPy9oLgJr0IKhx5PccNONCZQugS6e2OREOrcON077ChBGVktJFV0WN-CIIMPsfbFWScvNUVgVYNxaSXZ0YX5n4ymab6_9hkoYNeRQWORU2FRUMkrxWqPQ-npdbEjrvY-t0_BttPgiicecwE_pX5heRfmDnNVuifBGxiEgMHOrYzC52tkd443pvIFu6fpJw4SeqIk3-QPjE4%3D)

Hello Friend,

I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge.

I've been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I'm not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future.

But that doesn't mean we can't kick the radicals out of education. There's been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: **The Goldwater Institute**.

Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers' unions and the U.S. Department of Education.

The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater's legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards.

[Before I tell you more about why the Goldwater Institute is so incredibly successful, I must ask for your immediate help.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73b9d7e9b0e4e59918fcbedda86e161&_e=Kj0gg8jz_Jwwt3ewVZvB9snrXFYK6vEEPBw2ONsxQeQ01l7qHpFEg2sK8T5iNXDattEdZP5R3g7u8TNR32_Pxejv9CGJzQ9qpPy9oLgJr0IKhx5PccNONCZQugS6e2OREOrcON077ChBGVktJFV0WDlHn-Fhnm0C1qcLQVzDlnK1bW_N-PeXdGJF21CryEm2sTuwrh5b4rkDRPeEPeohiS7W8mJkMkJxxYjY8jQgxF_xK5zlplHypKP9HdD_dHRpjBm-YFl8RaUJTIwpejag9et9C1wlxsEWo3GDPcYkRdk%3D) To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you.

[Will you please donate $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or any amount you can generously spare? Click here to support the Goldwater Institute. >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73b9d7e9b0e4e59918fcbedda86e161&_e=Kj0gg8jz_Jwwt3ewVZvB9snrXFYK6vEEPBw2ONsxQeQ01l7qHpFEg2sK8T5iNXDattEdZP5R3g7u8TNR32_Pxejv9CGJzQ9qpPy9oLgJr0IKhx5PccNONCZQugS6e2OREOrcON077ChBGVktJFV0WH08dlFT7YRdhNZFYWg-_rQA0Dbug18-n5ndlLwrkXkbzkx5MGdIru_p1Dk0p7Duyyy78Njokvru92DMDUro3jrjrDSmfU2Nn9R21f_naXKcuY8AEYpCQQvtEij0kF-y6NCwKITCgTGt2wEA7ynlw_o%3D)

Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I'm asking you for support on their behalf.

The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation.

The Goldwater Institute doesn't engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives.

[Please support the Goldwater Institute with a donation of any amount today. >>

The reason Goldwater's school choice movement is so successful isn't simply because legislation is passing in legislatures... It's because they DEFEND those bills in the courts.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73b9d7e9b0e4e59918fcbedda86e161&_e=Kj0gg8jz_Jwwt3ewVZvB9snrXFYK6vEEPBw2ONsxQeQ01l7qHpFEg2sK8T5iNXDattEdZP5R3g7u8TNR32_Pxejv9CGJzQ9qpPy9oLgJr0IKhx5PccNONCZQugS6e2OREOrcON077ChBGVktJFV0WPNeaIkFWRwcbL6KYTLmLl88yMtRbPnc-CTrrlxpYTbXdVtisBzT9NNNv5S8k0--yk16XtFEa-rxute9vuqviAObv9ErYZnQo8U1ecOGnC7-xzrwmkVN3zDyRV0lxKw4ZHpwQbs6LcSy3jOTNMS-Df4%3D)

The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers' unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute's team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents.

Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. **Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation**. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both.

Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education:
* Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests.
* Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity."
* Woke professors label basic math as "racist."

**You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system.**

The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education.

This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join.

[Please consider supporting the Goldwater Institute this month. Select any amount below to rush your support.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b73b9d7e9b0e4e59918fcbedda86e161&_e=Kj0gg8jz_Jwwt3ewVZvB9snrXFYK6vEEPBw2ONsxQeQ01l7qHpFEg2sK8T5iNXDattEdZP5R3g7u8TNR32_Pxejv9CGJzQ9qpPy9oLgJr0IKhx5PccNONCZQugS6e2OREOrcON077ChBGVktJFV0WCYk4mNzAFBZoX8fOkfqqymJy2NZLpu7M_JUVY71lBnuT5bhq-8BlzgHSgOtFq1WYz0l7Sx0Zd4lc_isXoxjI8Ro5eUZ9yDrcCqtkVh3HMpGmk6nh2WXs7WaHbkvohdRvODvyny0G_x0ey__WI3MMjg%3D)

clean_body: I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge. Hello Friend, I'm sure you'd agree that we can't count on D.C. politicians and bureaucrats to fix our education system by throwing out the radicals in charge. I've been a Congressman since 2017, and as a member of the Freedom Caucus, I'm not ashamed to call myself a conservative. I can tell you that the Beltway Swamp will never apply the common sense steps necessary to do anything positive for our kids and our future. But that doesn't mean we can't kick the radicals out of education. There's been tremendous success at the state level and through the courts, and one organization is leading the battle: The Goldwater Institute. Through school choice, the Goldwater Institute is actively dismantling the power of teachers' unions and the U.S. Department of Education. The Goldwater Institute is defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and the woke nonsense that we see in the classroom. Goldwater's legislative success created the blueprint for conservatives to tie funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to school districts controlled by radical administrators and school boards. To stay in the fight, Goldwater needs the support of Americans like you. Here is what makes the Goldwater Institute different from ALL other pro-liberty organizations and why I'm asking you for support on their behalf. The Goldwater Institute transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country. In fact, they created Education Savings Accounts, which ensures parents can use their own tax dollars to make the right choices for their families. Now, Goldwater is applying this formula across the country, and so far, 22 states have enacted school choice legislation. The Goldwater Institute doesn't engage in abstract theories or unreadable white papers. They focus entirely on results. Their policy research is used by legislators in every single state to pass laws that help Americans live freer, happier lives. The Goldwater Institute is prepared for the teachers' unions and their radical left-wing allies. Whenever conservatives have a victory, you can be certain the unions will sue to try to stop it. But the Goldwater Institute's team of aggressive attorneys is ready to defeat the unions every time they try to overturn the rights of parents. Not only is the Goldwater Institute shaping legislation, but they are defending it in the courts. Conservative victories require both legislation and litigation. And the Goldwater Institute is the ONLY pro-liberty organization that understands this and achieves major victories in both. Extremists are doing everything they can to destroy public education: Radical bureaucrats show students how to organize BLM protests. Administrators lower our test standards in the name of "equity." Woke professors label basic math as "racist." You and I must defeat the radicals who are hijacking our education system. The Goldwater Institute is leading the school choice movement, abolishing Critical Race Theory, and changing the lives of both students and parents by providing children with the best possible education. This is the start of a new movement where conservatives are on the offensive. I am personally urging you to join. Once you complete your gift, the Goldwater Institute will be in touch with you on how to stay updated. Can I count on you to be the first new donor? Please consider this both a personal and urgent favor to the Goldwater Institute and me. ** For liberty, Congressman Andy Biggs The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: We're building the nation's largest left-leaning local news network
body:
How we cut through the noise:
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)
Peter,
From right-wing online disinformation to mainstream media who care more about profits than serving the public good, it’s no wonder that _185 million Americans don’t trust the news._
**At Courier Newsroom, we’re doing something to fix that.**
As the nation's largest left-leaning local news network, we run newsrooms in eight key battleground states (and counting) where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented journalists deliver factual news stories to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to find (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work.
**We fight disinformation by providing trustworthy local news to those who need it most.**
You can power our work by investing in Courier Newsroom with a donation today. [**Will you become a founding donor to Courier so we can expand our network of left-leaning local newsrooms****?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3694?refcode=em-20230508&t=2&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3694?refcode=em-20230508&t=3&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)**
**Your support couldn’t come at a more critical time.** Local newsrooms are disappearing, and right-wing misinformation and disinformation have taken their place. This pattern has become so pervasive that millions of Americans now believe in dangerous conspiracies about our democracy.
**We’re fighting back with an innovative local news model that attacks right-wing propaganda and misinformation at its source. At Courier Newsroom:**
* We focus on audiences without access to quality reporting who are susceptible to misleading or false information.

* We don’t chase profit, and we don’t use jargon or paywalls. We create meaningful, factual content that matters to the lives and communities of our readers.

* We target our news to the spaces where real people spend their time — on social media newsfeeds, across inboxes, and in search engines where people look for information online.

In other words, we’re doing something radically different to fight the spread of bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works.
**Right now, we’re mobilizing a community of founding donors who want to help fight disinformation in their local communities, and we’re hoping you’ll join us.** Together, we can beat the right-wing propaganda machines, reclaim our voices in our local communities, and strengthen our democracy for good.
[**Please, chip in any amount that is meaningful to you and become a founding donor today. With your help, we can grow our network of left-leaning local newsrooms and fight back against dangerous lies and disinformation.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3694?refcode=em-20230508&t=4&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3694?refcode=em-20230508&t=5&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)**
Together,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=954_120351_GszBti&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=954%2E120351%2EGszBti)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

While the rich liberal elite fly around in their private jets and push their Green New Deal agenda, they're taking away our stoves and critical heat sources. Without our gas furnaces here in Western and Upstate New York, this past harsh winter would have created dangerous situations for many New Yorkers. We cannot allow them to get away with this. Peter, this isn't just a New York problem – this is the pilot program for the rest of the country. | Friend
Joe Biden has lied to you on numerous occasions. We're used to it by now.
But this most recent one that he tried to dupe you with about our ongoing debt ceiling negotiations in Washington? It flat-out pissed me off.
He and his fellow Democrats tried to somehow claim that Republicans are seriously cutting benefits for VETERANS in these negotiations...
And Friend I've got to be honest with you... I have never heard more nonsense in my LIFE.
I recorded a message for supporters that breaks down why this claim from Biden is a complete lie. Watch below:
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oOnTlIc5WnWllvgFm6n2DRmRlIzkXThUl6FIL2BJ09LCcfwPmTVa-ENo8UsofzRZJbBAVSgrRb8Ahtm17ox3hU95kx2y8iQqA5z_G9HRxDLdZLH-Mh5N8UBXxWFwvaohCESTsMu3-dSJtYpBQrmiMvDgYUoiiCEzl8nSBKtI3KmveOPVvUOKGlP_rGInMIvDIqzUIds1yWZnlLxpzwT5Jg==&c=8yWAUzBNn1zR95l38j0M3Vk95cUnuhsIQWVGQkK_qF40_R824-E-Kg==&ch=27SuA8X26jMGL9RY0CUZsQF8m3cchvFjQX58k1cMod5BD5NYlybU4Q==)

It's complete and total lies like this that Americans are sick of from Biden and his lackeys. I'm fighting to expose them - but there's only so much I can do alone with the liberal media running cover for Sleepy Joe at every turn.
[That's why I hope you'll consider supporting the work of me and my team today. Derek

I wanted to make sure you saw this email from Nathaniel Block, YDA Convention Management Committee Chair — not only is our convention just around the corner, but the deadline to book a room at the MGM is just a little more than a week away. Check out the details below and get ready for #YDAVegas!

Thanks,

Quentin Wathum-Ocama
President, Young Democrats of America

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Nathaniel Block, Young Democrats of America via yda.org**
Date: Fri, Apr 28, 2023 at 1:21 PM
Subject: Convention is Approaching Fast! 🏃💨

Friend,

My name is Nathaniel Block, and I serve as the Chair of the Convention Management Committee for the 2023 YDA National Convention. As Chair, I have the honor of helping coordinate and plan an event that will be a powerful and impactful experience for everyone in attendance.

Our convention will take place **June 18th** through **June 21st** in **Las Vegas, Nevada,** and over the next few weeks, we will be sharing more information about the convention, but today, I want to highlight several two deadlines that are quickly approaching.

In collaboration with the Young Democrats of Nevada, it has secured one of the _lowest room rates_ for a convention in recent memory. I have had the opportunity to recently tour the **MGM Grand Hotel** , where our convention will be held. _Let me tell you that it is a fantastic facility and will help us create a truly memorable convention experience_. Our hotel room block is open only until **May 19th** — [**_book your room today so you do not miss out on a great deal and a truly great facility_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWr1jYF6kdEXBYBNqgnPeCI6aJnYj-D222IGSe74ZZIW3ihpjoHqvOjqc1qrjxjMsZGxMnacGmMCj1WF9UvlJ8iOZJca8pR8zupwh7yeEI6j0_ADQSIJlroG4bQVesoI-t6j3kbLCmhqwk8nm6ioxI2bdwRVojoPouWsoMcwYIquUy0YZPOyLVsG00nf7M9RVPj8A8v00dM-QPfcbhO-LcBIzPbFXzo67nGYqQW_U0YFELkZ2cIGQ9_kD4awbh6sCbk1gu3cuKASjJxFEaLknUF9b_FAwXe0XAaf3SXkz8voh4rfSS0nbbDyQSWStO2SI8d-u5Mr5_KwBVU_Ebhp_UX-AfOOoK1-UZESDNMFLPsiipr_-xgXFrxxVwhBdpTrEmgozg7VVvfuxauDT0E47uXc/3w0/OVVFXO9CT1e9SowtRFleUQ/h1/MZsIsqOzwwK9ALxH8dQXvfQSAuakxcN2h1CTba6v6wQ). After May 19th, we can't guarantee room rates won't be well over $100 a night more than what they are right now with our room block, **so act fast and book today!****_
_**
Also, I want to remind you to register for the convention at the Early Bird Registration (**$50.00**) before **May 17th**. After **May 17th,** prices will go up, [**s****o register today so you do not miss out on this low rate.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKwk8_6SuZZQmYLPHuT1187xfOAmTDl254R0Aegs_gsa7TMkrAOTaZ2MV4XTRI7-dBUVwIgRGfmRxmp961MF9ilXpFe0BqlBEJEBEN_TGBYbmHwWxlSl-HvqLln4gIiXo_hZavIbxLQZ2OGWZswka2v-hT2Vrv30ZuG6Y7lAzwuUMJ3GbIPVBWaw2Bwe2GTgdZws5c08coLGlLzW9RmAU1ZRDEcavyoRwwrrjDvPevJfdQisT_O0st4WMGJ7J0EbAAyez8zv6yIV8PYH-w2MFjo/3w0/OVVFXO9CT1e9SowtRFleUQ/h2/YBUOTjLzEX4BN-6Ax1ngfphJiBxzoFVFAQvwFV6zgwI)

Our convention is fast approaching, and it is shaping up to be one for the history books. I look forward to seeing you all in Las Vegas!

Nathaniel Block
Convention Management Committee Chair
Young Democrats of America

body:
The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=117b0ca199474e0c8e9f847edc88e90c&_e=Hly66IgoH2HtSp1CeElyCccu7q08jr-Z469E4cEQT6pxNxtplHTv2_OusOCP6NjdCGDsUjvaRQzEqr-kyc0Qn_vr9oAVgTjw7qspo6oU3u0oqP284p2SOfWirQZQcxb_xN4D7G6OMXAFcBJzVG_VeRnVZAvQRvfcKmuOqaDDqO-mv-NjkASDvp-h3vRBLHqXBdfd8nkBVUN8C-OqbcGwqYVDsEBfaXoh7cmkE4Ug1_8wENyAQsmYaVlOK6GdS3HtzHtmW6NZyKB-hL-uwN8aLrO6VMg80fdyGoiVa7WFpVRZfosH4mla7CVpfICc3oK_yggdqLkpAPFZDC3qXa8P9g%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=117b0ca199474e0c8e9f847edc88e90c&_e=Hly66IgoH2HtSp1CeElyCccu7q08jr-Z469E4cEQT6pxNxtplHTv2_OusOCP6NjdCGDsUjvaRQzEqr-kyc0Qn_vr9oAVgTjw7qspo6oU3u0oqP284p2SOfWirQZQcxb_xN4D7G6OMXAFcBJzVG_VeRnVZAvQRvfcKmuOqaDDqO-mv-NjkASDvp-h3vRBLHqXfC0ZYxFhOndxf-18M8h-rnRziH7SFvwXFMcLg7G1GYwn0Z4ngO0SfKdJhjzxgnXXnBspHkUojsIEwNZ9q7l8CbEFi36Shl580zyYWg203LQv59piwpn-WlE-lXSNMdgD3lxG_NmnY0CvV2iqM8tmqA%3D%3D)
---
| | As someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the direction of our country.

I would like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation today by clicking on this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=117b0ca199474e0c8e9f847edc88e90c&_e=Hly66IgoH2HtSp1CeElyCccu7q08jr-Z469E4cEQT6pxNxtplHTv2_OusOCP6NjdCGDsUjvaRQzEqr-kyc0Qn_vr9oAVgTjw7qspo6oU3u0oqP284p2SOfWirQZQcxb_xN4D7G6OMXAFcBJzVG_VeRnVZAvQRvfcKmuOqaDDqO-mv-NjkASDvp-h3vRBLHqXgSbXL5yK-fsd3pRrEZGyrxGVhhWzYxMhONv8UuWJdfytsQLv2m_NMOhS1Jm3aqdYzL_e5gymtVJF2WlNQxZQXguI7FxzTOyC93LtRGBLhuxjqMzuG9MjphGN-mRBEJLMQcz9HjpICuqia4Hhu-FhnQ%3D%3D)

Once you become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to undermine American values.

Thank you for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope to welcome you to our community soon.

Best regards,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. When you activate your membership, you will also receive a personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy update emails. Join us today by clicking on this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=117b0ca199474e0c8e9f847edc88e90c&_e=Hly66IgoH2HtSp1CeElyCccu7q08jr-Z469E4cEQT6pxNxtplHTv2_OusOCP6NjdCGDsUjvaRQzEqr-kyc0Qn_vr9oAVgTjw7qspo6oU3u0oqP284p2SOfWirQZQcxb_xN4D7G6OMXAFcBJzVG_VeRnVZAvQRvfcKmuOqaDDqO-mv-NjkASDvp-h3vRBLHqXhbryAoenL3k6f37xmlGdUWGg2_a22JPnZKB66ZVsfqeDqBvPFPGzbSwH3OPYanwFoK3fUp5Vqu9i_aU5rSIzNI-EPIwQksR4w23VP-NvjxPUYRxAr64r8PjNsGuGgXOnd6M4xmpZ5gXFVC5JBYOH9Q%3D%3D)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Dinner with your favorite president (me)?

body:
I’m hosting a dinner on June 13.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp0vjfkdpadhu7msftmnik0cobbchsu0jqng17o_rp22sh2s8i66o76clge8ob2c3h2bs)
---
Friend,
How would you like to have dinner with your favorite president?
On June 13 (the day before my birthday), I’m hosting a very special dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster – and I’m inviting one lucky winner and a guest of your choice to join me for free.
That’s right – I’ll cover your flight, your accommodations, and your terrific dinner.
_...And we’ll take a picture together so that you can keep a photograph of this incredible memory forever._
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to be automatically entered to win.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3p2i1alhk68edon56ekuanirvnvsjvheamp0kh8_rp22sh2s8i66o76clge8ob2c3h2bs)

| NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking [here](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1t8b6dvd88lnq3ilsaunnip5hnkq0opa7akjeg_). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zja2u2f245cog089a9kbkknef5vjtp6ltteml2l0_) or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. | | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with events at Little Rocky Run Community Center in Clifton, Virginia; an article for Townhall.com on Kaine’s opposition to defense of girls and women’s sports; radio interviews on the John Fredericks’ Show and the Robert Scott Bell Show; voter greetings in support of the state senate campaign of Matt Strickland at the polls and in Stafford, Virginia communities; the Loudoun County Republican Committee Family Fun Day and Potluck at Butterfly Farm in Waterford, Virginia; and the Annual Kentucky Derby Day NOVA GOP fundraiser at Red Rocks Café and Tequila Bar in Centreville, Virginia.
---
| | |
---

| | Date and Time: May 08, 7:00 PM – 9:00 PMLocation: Gourmeltz, 10013 Patriot Hwy, Fredericksburg, VA 22407, USA COVID-19 experts explain why the mandates must end! Those harmed by the jab speak out! Audience Q&A follows presentations.
---
| | | [**RSVP HERE**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a4OVvGDjE/c?w=w9En4Z_ZMN2Rd0J7DW2EnK11-Ly0OI6gME4463Jutx0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vZXZlbnQtZGV0YWlscy9tZWRpY2FsLWZyZWVkb20tZm9ydW0tMSIsInIiOiI3NTU5MmU2OS00MjEwLTRjYjItOTVhMi0xNTgwODI4ZmI5MmYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | On May 1, we had the privilege of addressing 50 dear friends and supporters at the Little Rocky Run Community Center in Clifton, Virginia, at an event sponsored by and catered by Cheri Fox and her team. Cheri is a campaign powerhouse who has established a large volunteer army of Emord for Senate supporters in Northern Virginia.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a4OVvGDjE/c?w=UNgv9M-uy3DsdBPWa2jZ71vgrDq_L_x9JyayaMna-40.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0pFbW9yZDE3NzYiLCJyIjoiZTBkODgyN2UtNjY3YS00NTg3LWVhODUtMzBkODUxNDJmNDU1IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)
---
| | Among her lieutenants who attended the event were Laura Fox, Larry Fox, Christy Pulsipher, John Pulsipher, Linda Miller, Dave Miller, and Chuck Belyea. Among her lieutenants not able to attend are Marilyn and Ron Heiner and Fred and Lori Egbers. I cannot thank each of them enough for their dedication to the cause of liberty and their tireless efforts to save our state and save our nation.
---
| | | [**Check our our upcoming events here!**](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a4OVvGDjE/c?w=WIauJ7NbZia7Jl3hyVzsq5fWVJwN3oCXy4ETUZEQae8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vZXZlbnRzIiwiciI6ImY1MzI1NDg4LTE2NmUtNGZmMi02MWE4LTFiYjM0YWNjNGM5MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjgxMDAxZWYyLTE4OTEtNDBmMC1iZjdkLWIyYTZjNmY1Y2VlMiJ9)

| | On May 1, my article assailing Kaine’s opposition to the Women and Girls in Sports Act appeared in Townhall.com entitled “Kaine Refuses to Protect Girls and Women in Sports.” True to form, Kaine not only opposes all efforts to protect children from transitioning and from Marxist critical race indoctrination, but he also refuses to protect girls and women’s sports, opposing the House bill that would prevent biological males from competing on all-girls and all-women’s teams and from using girls and women’s locker rooms.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a4OVvGDjE/c?w=jPb_RNPwPVFdQ2n-jewWHdPzU5OwAmc39qh50A3KEg0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vcG9zdC9rYWluZS1yZWZ1c2VzLXRvLXByb3RlY3QtZ2lybHMtYW5kLXdvbWVuLWluLXNwb3J0cyIsInIiOiIzMDhkMGY4MS0zNWEyLTRlZDgtYTA2NS0xZTViNzc2NDJmNzEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4MTAwMWVmMi0xODkxLTQwZjAtYmY3ZC1iMmE2YzZmNWNlZTIifQ)
---
| | On May 4, I appeared as I do every week on the Robert Scott Bell Show. I discussed the Biden Administration’s latest atrocities, among them its failure to extend Title 42. That failure is triggering a massive uptick in illegal entries into the United States, adding to the over 15 million illegal entrants since the start of Biden’s presidency. We also discussed ruinous changes in FHFA rules that will tax people with good credit and subsidize people with bad credit, allowing them to obtain mortgages at rates they could not afford.
---
| | [](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a4OVvGDjE/c?w=VGT8_rWT6W546owPuTwGZrN5yOk875iTjKG9TL0PXH8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0pFbW9yZDE3NzYiLCJyIjoiMDUxYTNlMjMtOGVjNS00ZjY1LWVkNjEtMjI4ZmJkMGQyM2EyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODEwMDFlZjItMTg5MS00MGYwLWJmN2QtYjJhNmM2ZjVjZWUyIn0)
---
| | On May 5, we joined the state senate campaign of combat veteran and Gourmeltz restaurant owner Matt Strickland, who I have endorsed for the Virginia state senate (district 27). We greeted early voters outside the Stafford County Government Center as well as at voters’ homes in two Stafford communities. Strickland is a strong advocate of individual liberty, health freedom, parents’ rights, low taxes, and free markets. He is a strong ally who I successfully represented before the Virginia ABC Board (resulting in his liquor license being restored, the alcohol ABC confiscated being returned, and all criminal charges being dropped).
---
| | On May 6, we attended the Loudoun County Republican Committee’s Family Fun Day and Potluck at Butterfly Farm in Waterford, Virginia. There we met over two dozen strong patriots working to save Virginia. I especially appreciate the support voiced by those in attendance for our campaign. On May 6, we also addressed those in attendance at the Annual Kentucky Derby Day NOVA GOP fundraiser at the Red Rocks Café and Tequila Bar in Centreville, Virginia. We met over two dozen strong patriots who welcomed us warmly.
---

clean_body: The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with events at Little Rocky Run Community Center in Clifton, Virgini | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Save Virginia, Save America Weekly Roundup | | | | | | | The campaign to save Virginia and save America continued this past week with events at Little Rocky Run Community Center in Clifton, Virginia; an article for Townhall.com on Kaine’s opposition to defense of girls and women’s sports; radio interviews on the John Fredericks’ Show and the Robert Scott Bell Show; voter greetings in support of the state senate campaign of Matt Strickland at the polls and in Stafford, Virginia communities; the Loudoun County Republican Committee Family Fun Day and Potluck at Butterfly Farm in Waterford, Virginia; and the Annual Kentucky Derby Day NOVA GOP fundraiser at Red Rocks Café and Tequila Bar in Centreville, Virginia. | | | | | | | Date and Time: May 08, 7:00 PM – 9:00 PMLocation: Gourmeltz, 10013 Patriot Hwy, Fredericksburg, VA 22407, USA COVID-19 experts explain why the mandates must end! Those harmed by the jab speak out! Audience Q&A follows presentations. | | | | | | | | On May 1, we had the privilege of addressing 50 dear friends and supporters at the Little Rocky Run Community Center in Clifton, Virginia, at an event sponsored by and catered by Cheri Fox and her team. Cheri is a campaign powerhouse who has established a large volunteer army of Emord for Senate supporters in Northern Virginia. | | | | Among her lieutenants who attended the event were Laura Fox, Larry Fox, Christy Pulsipher, John Pulsipher, Linda Miller, Dave Miller, and Chuck Belyea. Among her lieutenants not able to attend are Marilyn and Ron Heiner and Fred and Lori Egbers. I cannot thank each of them enough for their dedication to the cause of liberty and their tireless efforts to save our state and save our nation. | | | | | On May 1, my article assailing Kaine’s opposition to the Women and Girls in Sports Act appeared in Townhall.com entitled “Kaine Refuses to Protect Girls and Women in Sports.” True to form, Kaine not only opposes all efforts to protect children from transitioning and from Marxist critical race indoctrination, but he also refuses to protect girls and women’s sports, opposing the House bill that would prevent biological males from competing on all-girls and all-women’s teams and from using girls and women’s locker rooms. | | | | On May 4, I appeared as I do every week on the Robert Scott Bell Show. I discussed the Biden Administration’s latest atrocities, among them its failure to extend Title 42. That failure is triggering a massive uptick in illegal entries into the United States, adding to the over 15 million illegal entrants since the start of Biden’s presidency. We also discussed ruinous changes in FHFA rules that will tax people with good credit and subsidize people with bad credit, allowing them to obtain mortgages at rates they could not afford. | | | | On May 5, we joined the state senate campaign of combat veteran and Gourmeltz restaurant owner Matt Strickland, who I have endorsed for the Virginia state senate (district 27). We greeted early voters outside the Stafford County Government Center as well as at voters’ homes in two Stafford communities. Strickland is a strong advocate of individual liberty, health freedom, parents’ rights, low taxes, and free markets. He is a strong ally who I successfully represented before the Virginia ABC Board (resulting in his liquor license being restored, the alcohol ABC confiscated being returned, and all criminal charges being dropped). | | On May 6, we attended the Loudoun County Republican Committee’s Family Fun Day and Potluck at Butterfly Farm in Waterford, Virginia. There we met over two dozen strong patriots working to save Virginia. I especially appreciate the support voiced by those in attendance for our campaign. On May 6, we also addressed those in attendance at the Annual Kentucky Derby Day NOVA GOP fundraiser at the Red Rocks Café and Tequila Bar in Centreville, Virginia. We met over two dozen strong patriots who welcomed us warmly. | | See you on the campaign trail, Jonathan | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us May 8 at 7 pm at Gourmeltz in Fredericksburg for our Health Freedom Forum! | | | | | | | Join us on May 10, in Clifton, for a documentary Screening of The Battle in Loudoun County and a discussion on Ending Woke Indoctrination in NOVA Schools - Forum & Free DVD! | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . Friend, it's Emily from Kirsten's team. I just checked our fundraising numbers and had to follow up with you immediately (please excuse any typos): **We fell $1,249 short of yesterday's rapid-response fundraising goal.**
With Senate control on the line, I know that I don't have to tell you how important it is to protect Kirsten's seat here in New York — especially now that right-wing extremist Lee Zeldin is gearing up to potentially run against her.
That's why I'm turning to you at this critical moment: We decided to extend our fundraising deadline by 24 hours to give dedicated supporters like you another chance to chip in and help us make up this shortfall. **Kirsten doesn't accept any money from corporate PACs, so she's counting on you to dig deep and help make sure she has enough resources to keep the Senate blue.**

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Supporting union workers on strike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress
body:
Team,

Right now, we’re seeing the power of organized labor all across the country. From teachers, to construction workers, to Hollywood writers, people are showing up in droves to fight for fair pay and safe working conditions. For over a century, the American labor movement has fought tirelessly to build a better life for workers, and history proves that when labor organizes, they win.

I’ve been a labor advocate and trade unionist my entire career. I know how important and impactful labor strikes are, and I stand in solidarity with workers fighting for their rights. By engaging in concerted, organized labor action, employees ensure that their employers never take for granted the value they provide every single day they clock in.

Solidarity is a powerful weapon, and striking workers need to know that we have their backs. The Writers’ Guild of America strike has affected TV viewing in households across America, drawing newfound attention to the power of union strikes. When unions succeed, it makes every worker stronger in guaranteeing our power to achieve fair and equitable working conditions.

Will you sign my petition standing in solidarity with striking workers and their efforts to improve pay and working conditions? Organized labor built this country, and they deserve our support when they ask for a fair share of the reward.

STAND WITH WORKERS: https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/petition-union-strikes?refcode=_PT

In solidarity,

Nikki Budzinski

--

Paid for by Nikki For Congress

Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

Please, consider making a one-time contribution by clicking here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-fr?refcode=_PTfooter&amount=10

| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

Peter, House Republicans are committed to __**keeping our promises, every step of the way.**__

_We passed the Parents Bill of Rights_ , which will give parents more control over their children's education and health. Additionally, _we passed the Lower Energy Costs Act_ , which will reduce energy costs for our families.

We have _repealed the proposal of 87,000 new IRS agents_ , which means less government interference in your financial affairs. _Stopped the selling of SPR to China_ , protecting our national interests. And _nullified DC's soft-on-crime bill_ , which will make our community a safer place to live.

But our work is far from done.

[_**I need your support to continue to fight for progress. clean_body: | | | | \- - - | Peter, House Republicans are committed to keeping our promises, every step of the way. We passed the Parents Bill of Rights , which will give parents more control over their children's education and health. Additionally, we passed the Lower Energy Costs Act , which will reduce energy costs for our families. We have repealed the proposal of 87,000 new IRS agents , which means less government interference in your financial affairs. Stopped the selling of SPR to China , protecting our national interests. And nullified DC's soft-on-crime bill , which will make our community a safer place to live. But our work is far from done. | | | | This wouldn’t be possible without your continued support. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

| | [OPTION 2](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c976f5b0cf56491a9cce1e6f666b485c&_e=QPjb45g1cVWsGuvA_9ZsMz_iHIKTqBZm-Cb6Rvfltpz9ectyEPSFQrrf346glfNJBGQ2JmY_tGgEZlCWEtjHnJD1I51BUEAYax5A9owyAq3CjCtp0Qa0eP4Eftk5ogRXaELFoZlD8BRjsUL_IC4Zod0BfY3WxYgopLGTk1LnrtLeDCwckjk0nM3JQV1C7eGrZ-D4UZVe31a1DSMkqfCzA167vjAaJxk2hSwrdQ4h--P7PU2MB0zx0nkupkEpPt2CcjnjHCg7YNxe-HIkkNG2Kc0z5B9JbiA4U5LR5F86L9407_LjwoVUcoxmNtnQpxf6mfErfNYJOtbCF5Vs4ilzdRbVq35GouWHaEmJAL-bSnJOoVz9upVHBWVH09r51ROgL1CvhDWppmaDYbx7clhUYz9gDE2tvadEQ-jN8S3yhXTthi0PwKHtVU9NsWTc7c3yvez2ohEOWNyHOkDMwLET0A%3D%3D)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c976f5b0cf56491a9cce1e6f666b485c&_e=QPjb45g1cVWsGuvA_9ZsMz_iHIKTqBZm-Cb6Rvfltpz9ectyEPSFQrrf346glfNJBGQ2JmY_tGgEZlCWEtjHnJD1I51BUEAYax5A9owyAq3CjCtp0Qa0eP4Eftk5ogRXaELFoZlD8BRjsUL_IC4Zod0BfY3WxYgopLGTk1LnrtLeDCwckjk0nM3JQV1C7eGrZ-D4UZVe31a1DSMkqfCzA167vjAaJxk2hSwrdQ4h--P7PU2MB0zx0nkupkEpPt2CcjnjHCg7YNxe-HIkkNG2Kc0z5B9JbiA4U5LR5F86L9407_LjwoVUcoxmNtnQpxf6mfu42QNoodc7NIwTft8jeVlNLF5EQluLrLzkJJsVkTOT13Sm9JJ2kWIvkWKNe9tfJvx_O62JZzwveQMJXucXRlgOW_hOlQGACvJo1fKusuLRJcThrQEofWqGLmPAC5I-_1CXk_7rTvWH0hkyOs3rKQ%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN'S AMNESTY PLAN](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c976f5b0cf56491a9cce1e6f666b485c&_e=QPjb45g1cVWsGuvA_9ZsMz_iHIKTqBZm-Cb6Rvfltpz9ectyEPSFQrrf346glfNJBGQ2JmY_tGgEZlCWEtjHnJD1I51BUEAYax5A9owyAq3CjCtp0Qa0eP4Eftk5ogRXaELFoZlD8BRjsUL_IC4Zod0BfY3WxYgopLGTk1LnrtLeDCwckjk0nM3JQV1C7eGrZ-D4UZVe31a1DSMkqfCzA167vjAaJxk2hSwrdQ4h--P7PU2MB0zx0nkupkEpPt2CcjnjHCg7YNxe-HIkkNG2Kc0z5B9JbiA4U5LR5F86L9407_LjwoVUcoxmNtnQpxf66ak9_Nve3ox0tN0lMzi__89FLsfer7kqnuM6uWCjNm7XKPDzG7JVhF1bRRVb3Z1t1afxM3N1jU-xP2QS1PB8d2n8M4S789RXDmwcg588ZckVMiskaHh0GNdaz4BCKdeKPNAlqPGbrAgP_Mw0ekjWIg%3D%3D)

name: Al Canata
subject: Tax season under Biden vs. under Trump
body:
In 2017, NTU was a leader in convincing Congress and the White House to deliver tax cuts for the American people.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1ba936e313847759cc806793d024660&_e=dcKCQ7ULqf9Yzq6DSVm_2fCUknSALcsG3VlBHttc2ZSVYCIVeMPO3NWSddLNpHw50ip8JA7V531CeEQ5KyRV00s-Kw1rCS2QrP62B88q8pJz50UC9yHvsDgYYW3NTmMJS0sMeWuIh-xZ_-qOv0C423eWwHgCiCM7x0M-B9fP_ZPD77oWangUbbUErpM5ntVEcDcubXUy38CzV4qGMFSBPrUxhL6GOez5u359XdEPCHigDv28yCWeWpYRYzFVZHOazAPpKQZLf1BUJ113JFF1Xz_a0Ymzr5FRlTUev_1p5OI%3D)

Friend,

In 2017, NTU was a leader in convincing Congress and the White House to deliver tax cuts for the American people. In 2019 we successfully made the case to leaders of both parties that taxpayers needed more rights when dealing with the IRS.

Unfortunately, in 2021, Congress and the White House took a very different approach that has the potential to badly slant the IRS against taxpayers.

**The 2021 $80 BILLION supplemental appropriation to the IRS was the largest one-time taxpayer investment in the IRS in its history! **

For months, NTU warned lawmakers that the IRS wasn't prepared for the sudden influx in funding... and we were right.

My name is Al Canata, the Vice President for Strategic Partnerships with the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). **As the voice for taxpayers in D.C., NTU is working with lawmakers to ensure the IRS acts in the best interest of the taxpayer,_not the Biden administration 's goal of letting the IRS loose on the economy instead of having a debate about tax policy_.**

I've set a goal to connect with 800 new supporters this week to join the thousands of others who help to drive our efforts to reform the IRS.

[Your urgent gift goes a long way toward our next victory over the IRS. Please consider giving your first donation of $100, $50, or even just $25 now by clicking here >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f1ba936e313847759cc806793d024660&_e=dcKCQ7ULqf9Yzq6DSVm_2fCUknSALcsG3VlBHttc2ZSVYCIVeMPO3NWSddLNpHw50ip8JA7V531CeEQ5KyRV00s-Kw1rCS2QrP62B88q8pJz50UC9yHvsDgYYW3NTmMJS0sMeWuIh-xZ_-qOv0C423HhAJcy0Q3ZdT870s1Fi0AAcMf4CQmek9MHKnOfcCILP89gEEJzIHzf8zVjb0qyYXfr_Hbd1lX6aCCcejl5JnwyvOuUKbVaDn9UruUQNziAreP0BkHyU-Fto1jvt1tW4Sl3b1D9Pr8JAzjN_VQ2IIE%3D)

If spent wisely, the IRS could use redirected resources and a shift in its priorities to
* Revitalize customer service efforts
* Modernize decades-old information technology infrastructure
* Provide enhanced digital services for taxpayers
* Better manage the tax filing seasons

But we've seen what this administration is willing to consider to cover its massive spending agenda. And, unfortunately, **taking more money from taxpayers is their go-to solution.**

They could use these funds to hire an army of auditors, lawyers, data miners, and even criminal investigators that disregard taxpayer rights and due process to **ensnare innocent taxpayers or those who made honest mistakes**.

Not only would it further erode the public's trust in the IRS _(if that 's possible)_, the results would do more harm than good.

But with your support, **we can ensure the IRS does its job properly while respecting taxpayers ' rights. **

[Take action now to STOP the IRS. clean_body: In 2017, NTU was a leader in convincing Congress and the White House to deliver tax cuts for the American people. Friend, In 2017, NTU was a leader in convincing Congress and the White House to deliver tax cuts for the American people. In 2019 we successfully made the case to leaders of both parties that taxpayers needed more rights when dealing with the IRS. Unfortunately, in 2021, Congress and the White House took a very different approach that has the potential to badly slant the IRS against taxpayers. The 2021 $80 BILLION supplemental appropriation to the IRS was the largest one-time taxpayer investment in the IRS in its history! For months, NTU warned lawmakers that the IRS wasn't prepared for the sudden influx in funding... and we were right. My name is Al Canata, the Vice President for Strategic Partnerships with the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). As the voice for taxpayers in D.C., NTU is working with lawmakers to ensure the IRS acts in the best interest of the taxpayer,not the Biden administration 's goal of letting the IRS loose on the economy instead of having a debate about tax policy. I've set a goal to connect with 800 new supporters this week to join the thousands of others who help to drive our efforts to reform the IRS. If spent wisely, the IRS could use redirected resources and a shift in its priorities to Revitalize customer service efforts Modernize decades-old information technology infrastructure Provide enhanced digital services for taxpayers Better manage the tax filing seasons But we've seen what this administration is willing to consider to cover its massive spending agenda. And, unfortunately, taking more money from taxpayers is their go-to solution. They could use these funds to hire an army of auditors, lawyers, data miners, and even criminal investigators that disregard taxpayer rights and due process to ensnare innocent taxpayers or those who made honest mistakes. Not only would it further erode the public's trust in the IRS (if that 's possible), the results would do more harm than good. But with your support, we can ensure the IRS does its job properly while respecting taxpayers ' rights. In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. The Taxpayer Defense Center has already helped hand the IRS two major defeats in the Supreme Court! And NTU is working with members of Congress to support numerous bills that would trim misguided IRS funds, require more attention to improving taxpayer services, and protect taxpayers' rights. This legislation needs to move forward now, as annual appropriations season begins along with a debate on the national debt ceiling. I am calling on your immediate support to help with our crucial mission. Will you be one of the 800 new supporters who will help NTU win another victory against the IRS? Click any link below to show your support! Thank you, Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d21a25b06f9c4a4ca4b4e15d1bf94ee1&_e=qLo1bkajfrI_9ys7nJPSTeUe_GauOtF1QwoO04fRdZxwSeutDvkuLQLGUry5jEbTtri7CMUAg_-DzZPvroNY3T9TesetAYeTU4js1YQWDEy-I8gfAxPKFuhiOklN4RSp-7sRqt7dlC1SNoWqdfkKhFRMgiXJHldvpCCa1oGaMqqx1PlShHAOyN4X3g6woVn-Z4hzFZgkmGROMQyLLDYMCO6BPUhUTH6Xm_c19OtZMicPC-XW5XKHVJptluf8MBbYQTOm4DSOW94ICQw5DHjOrev5UJyaRgPdbzThiK-9ACjJ7gvg9JYv06qEV4al9XsOd_7Sz4vfCy3xRlRlHd-fWKa2jYDkuHe_oyxA8Efcqcq6Fhq1OKv961p-yzxA4zMUvOYVLzsf_CJTEHR_pHSVsw%3D%3D)

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-746Zq67MrQ)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Hi team, One of them used to work for Trump. Another was endorsed by him. A third has promised to ban all abortions. All of them want to defeat my colleague and friend, **Governor Andy Beshear of Kentucky.** Andy's been holding the line against extreme Republicans in the Bluegrass State – vetoing anti-trans attacks and a Don't Say Gay bill. He's lowered the cost of prescription drugs and vetoed a pay raise for himself while fighting for higher teacher pay. Four years ago, Andy flipped the Kentucky governorship by just 5,000 votes. Now, he needs our help to hold onto it. **The Kentucky primary is just a week away, and we need to make sure Andy has all the resources he needs to take on _whoever_ makes it through as his Republican opponent.** **[Chip in $20.23 (or whatever you can) to help Andy win one of the most competitive races in the country this year. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Peter: welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
The GOP majority in Congress has proven to be the most partisan and regressive in recent memory. >From countless attempts to destroy reproductive rights, to attacks on Social Security and Medicare at a time when seniors are most vulnerable, they’ll stop at nothing to bulldoze us with their agenda of control and division. _You are receiving this email because you believe we need more honest, solutions-oriented leaders in Congress. Madeleine Dean is a mother, grandmother, professor, lawyer, and advocate representing Pennsylvania’s 4th district and we’re excited to have you join our team. If you wish to unsubscribe, you can do so here:[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/m39uBPW2vUSIrb7nvy835w2?unsubscribedata=ilT3vf0uYsj9TM%2Fn7KAOiNwsZVCQKqjE4YwsDaUzAHQPTbeRMFnq8bqP6Eyjglr0cwlm94iV11M6FxvxmrH9HAKAxx0PeVQTDqOz3JDhOAgixYnwUHyC%2BElBQ8P40q%2B%2FMrddFfqRfmXAVFKYoVh8Bvx0qiu20AzxY8QRjzEaAD0jIhV0nMPmgjOiqMb3uMpUx3GbxPkCy03CvpP8o4uiJaMx6bHmDRoFlaNP2GyS3DuRkcGB2aNdz7711IxzXEdGxugL1DAnUIgyD%2BEs2MHXPFxN6%2BRMV6jXGwWnFMuMci7PwpTPMwrov4hIMqbzRioIHO9Or0DrZyYXgmqXZQDaLnSaHddTt9m8gsOoYP0%2F8AUSp%2FQk3D0xUxXwyiaXdLOP%2F0qHmXhY6RHcn6%2BD3d7vm%2F1dynY8G5TqRsoDTGKvlgbKr5AzvtouL%2BlZd73RgJMi)_ The GOP majority in Congress has proven to be the most partisan and regressive in recent memory. **From countless attempts to destroy reproductive rights, to attacks on Social Security and Medicare at a time when seniors are most vulnerable, they’ll stop at nothing to bulldoze us with their agenda of control and division.**

_But I am not one to back down when things get tough._ I’ll always stand in defense of our rights and our democracy.

Right now, Americans are counting on their elected officials to serve with courage and compassion – while offering serious solutions to the challenges and opportunities ahead. That’s what I’ve been doing since I was elected to represent the Philadelphia suburbs in 2018.

2024 will be here before we know it, so I’m focused on growing this team – retaking the majority next year will be a group effort. **[What do you say – will you join Team Dean?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992134/405226689/125774387?amount=25&refcode=md_onboarding_en_1_5&refcode2=e6a2c587-d2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEyYzU4Ny1kMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QILRPBiofl709L3yiiob8xIETHhbQyDyoWU9Y9uAYw=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992137/405226692/125774387?amount=25&refcode=md_onboarding_en_1_5&refcode2=e6a2c587-d2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEyYzU4Ny1kMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QILRPBiofl709L3yiiob8xIETHhbQyDyoWU9Y9uAYw=) | | [ **JOIN TEAM DEAN** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992141/405226695/125774387?amount=25&refcode=md_onboarding_en_1_5&refcode2=e6a2c587-d2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEyYzU4Ny1kMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QILRPBiofl709L3yiiob8xIETHhbQyDyoWU9Y9uAYw=)

As a mom, grandmom, and former PA State Rep, I’m committed to fighting for the future all Americans deserve.

From curbing gun violence, to improving healthcare access, from treating the opioid crisis with compassion, to taking real action on climate change – I’m standing up for our values in Washington and for the security and wellbeing of _all_ Americans.

**If you’d consider joining my team, I would be most grateful – and we promise only to reach out with the most pressing updates.[Join me and the rest of Team Dean to stay up-to-date with our work both in DC and the all-important Philadelphia suburbs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992146/405226700/125774387?amount=25&refcode=md_onboarding_en_1_5&refcode2=e6a2c587-d2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEyYzU4Ny1kMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QILRPBiofl709L3yiiob8xIETHhbQyDyoWU9Y9uAYw=)**

Thank you for considering becoming part of our team.

Warmly,

_Madeleine Dean_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992150/405226705/125774387?amount=25&refcode=md_onboarding_en_1_5&refcode2=e6a2c587-d2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEyYzU4Ny1kMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QILRPBiofl709L3yiiob8xIETHhbQyDyoWU9Y9uAYw=)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. clean_body: The GOP majority in Congress has proven to be the most partisan and regressive in recent memory. >From countless attempts to destroy reproductive rights, to attacks on Social Security and Medicare at a time when seniors are most vulnerable, they’ll stop at nothing to bulldoze us with their agenda of control and division. You are receiving this email because you believe we need more honest, solutions-oriented leaders in Congress. Madeleine Dean is a mother, grandmother, professor, lawyer, and advocate representing Pennsylvania’s 4th district and we’re excited to have you join our team. If you wish to unsubscribe, you can do so here: The GOP majority in Congress has proven to be the most partisan and regressive in recent memory. From countless attempts to destroy reproductive rights, to attacks on Social Security and Medicare at a time when seniors are most vulnerable, they’ll stop at nothing to bulldoze us with their agenda of control and division. But I am not one to back down when things get tough. I’ll always stand in defense of our rights and our democracy. Right now, Americans are counting on their elected officials to serve with courage and compassion – while offering serious solutions to the challenges and opportunities ahead. That’s what I’ve been doing since I was elected to represent the Philadelphia suburbs in 2018. 2024 will be here before we know it, so I’m focused on growing this team – retaking the majority next year will be a group effort. = = | | = As a mom, grandmom, and former PA State Rep, I’m committed to fighting for the future all Americans deserve. From curbing gun violence, to improving healthcare access, from treating the opioid crisis with compassion, to taking real action on climate change – I’m standing up for our values in Washington and for the security and wellbeing of all Americans. If you’d consider joining my team, I would be most grateful – and we promise only to reach out with the most pressing updates.= Thank you for considering becoming part of our team. Warmly, Madeleine Dean = Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.** We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. But sadly, Crooked Joe Biden will officially REVOKE one of my most successful immigration policies – “Title 42” – on Thursday, May 11. Title 42 allowed for INSTANT EXPULSION of any illegal alien who crossed our border. Period. End of story. If you thought the border was bad now, just wait until the end of the day on Thursday... | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Josh Hawley
subject: “Too many jobs?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, This is absolutely despicable.

After I grilled Joe Biden’s Interior Secretary for shutting down a mineral mine as part of her radical climate agenda, she said there were already **too many jobs** in America.

**The Democrats have made themselves clear: they want to ERASE blue-collar America. Their vision is a country of liberal elites, who bow the knee to China’s natural resources, and a hollowed out middle class dependent on the government. **

The Democrats know what blue-collar America stands for: and they absolutely HATE it.

The Left will NEVER respect hard work, family values, and patriotism.

_But it’s not enough for them to send jobs overseas and inject woke into the next generation: they won’t be done until they ELIMINATE blue-collar American altogether._

**[We MUST fight back. Join me today and DEFEND blue-collar America!](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=e0bbc73951034b7b9fcf217a1ae1da46&_e=tLRDjRo4i9qomxilNTz0ItXJoRYn-fmRbj8XDki8TblcB6XZxE6iqVm3hMhQOV1EYPRbsKcwIDH8MZqWG1PDrCDh4BJp2-8-dx7CMTCI9yOgiA4iZ4Tn5Uv73HwK29Mkx1Fbkj2ICKOhqD8n6JFcUdAqqzEloAkvenyIF7Sc3te1Y2jrDGoyRIZgjxX_YDntbodvxXXgqwvrLnfW4I8mt9iiqilG9wAvmb4RgPVYZhN21Xeo8kmvih_GHIKpobe0kspZwZoJfAi7zDttO1yXy41JtKgFUi-5iLdmG5HC0hwh4rdtIXv19deqZPlPyzr2Mt_NmJkR3WqzE34qXJ-C6WRfTKskVqVfd0BvHUDQKtDKP7R_dudMtZUh8LZZnei5Wt1LH5WNXbJW-Au9d7uS8nC4QnTOaidrWiYyjNhAuUk%3D)**

name: Indiana Dems
subject: This movement is real
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, After a slow few months to start the year, our movement is starting to show real momentum. We are pleased to announce that we ended up exceeding our fundraising goal for the first quarter of 2023, laying a strong foundation for the future of the Indiana Democratic Party. And we have no intention of stopping now, because we are only getting started in the fight for the future of Indiana. [**Early fundraising is the primary determining factor in the success of a political campaign. When we have resources early, we can make informed, intelligent decisions about where to allocate our resources. Rush a donation right now and be a part of the next step forward for Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62992641/405227916/1643342139?refcode=230508-Movement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODYxMGVhNS1kM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UfSv6IgHH8qoHrAUAsPJqmK4VdMl5V9POeG0a3VWkSo=) In cities like Carmel, Indianapolis, and Ft.
