name: Mike Pence
subject: Preserving Our Faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
In God We Trust

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bdc3227bab0641909c31620c94c17a7e&_e=1NSXmMWSxcsPqmr6bc70SSvJ2qA4EGsFJLH5tVGhrltszKquK89M5nHw-l6neh0WILRCG3-N9mpNmC8PFOG0nxvtwrytMP5cvQ2DkpwZr2s64BWSSMH8CBz8ojeNQCNpEzGnKdydyNSeEyM4ZpkAZhuXgusfCv0a_vie2QuWxXkkvdKwnSQNHbwDmFTuM_Q1n-aPNdcCm7Onmuw-JYLJPWSwX-uJz6S6NchfxLUtBV1KgTkQO4aaHlpPXAlo3OEDxMnsMZxLmkvEgKxx_ZD3vJDHvgsnrTo4z7CPKCs10f1LgCKBCH3Q5CBEu1k4iSwYpj_LvCCuU_-szPF9iefzsEjjjFTZ1-h3LWcIqOEwvCmUl1C8Be8GLefN8u7eq0Gbb_rGd7OFGxVa7vVwJMgJ8kca1TF2Po8AniaWEe9c-fw%3D)
---
This is Mike Pence.

**As a Christian, I 'm deeply saddened to see the villainization of our Christian values by the radical left.** Persecution against God's children has been ongoing since the beginning of time but never has a mainstream political party in America taken such a radical stance against the Judeo-Christian values this nation was founded on.

---
| | [HELP SAVE OUR VALUES](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bdc3227bab0641909c31620c94c17a7e&_e=1NSXmMWSxcsPqmr6bc70SSvJ2qA4EGsFJLH5tVGhrltszKquK89M5nHw-l6neh0WILRCG3-N9mpNmC8PFOG0nxvtwrytMP5cvQ2DkpwZr2s64BWSSMH8CBz8ojeNQCNpEzGnKdydyNSeEyM4ZpkAZhuXgusfCv0a_vie2QuWxXkkvdKwnSQNHbwDmFTuM_Q1n-aPNdcCm7Onmuw-JYLJPWSwX-uJz6S6NchfxLUtBV1KgTkQO4aaHlpPXAlo3OEDxMnsMZxLmkvEgKxx_ZD3vOgEidG24FX9F43aq5vfa8uIk2tUtKGWe6IwCHq8I5gHAkKNMPIkDLyqyg2tAzFg-m7LKE5ahXZTYCgZvoqRUm9uZ7AZ0mwtdG9_zYTPK76KlNfRi-Nuu0FegqrOevEHK36hxZsdH6XYDMaQGWsk3so%3D)
---

**These faithless liberals are gaslighting our children.** They want them to believe God's guidance is noninclusive and harmful. The day our children no longer look up to God, our Kingdom will be lost. We cannot let that happen. It's time to bring back the America that celebrates religious freedom, protects the right to life, and encourages a culture that walks with Jesus, not in spite of Him.

**Returning to God and the Constitution is the only way we can ensure a better tomorrow for future generations, but it won 't happen unless we open up about the real struggles we face as believers and as a nation.**

---
| | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bdc3227bab0641909c31620c94c17a7e&_e=1NSXmMWSxcsPqmr6bc70SSvJ2qA4EGsFJLH5tVGhrltszKquK89M5nHw-l6neh0WILRCG3-N9mpNmC8PFOG0nxvtwrytMP5cvQ2DkpwZr2s64BWSSMH8CBz8ojeNQCNpEzGnKdydyNSeEyM4ZpkAZhuXgusfCv0a_vie2QuWxXkkvdKwnSQNHbwDmFTuM_Q1n-aPNdcCm7Onmuw-JYLJPWSwX-uJz6S6NchfxLUtBV1KgTkQO4aaHlpPXAlo3OEDxMnsMZxLmkvEgKxx_ZD3vJxsTb__PXe7xjvuxO3L0gF3-lJ7AIogxaqAQLugdELd-rRC5-Ow-DBv4IrI1AyQ2D0tErPqwNycWfNeNf9oPjZXLX4yeyPHpeObc4al5LbA1CDufyx1S6H0Qqc0y2Zu6ec4j4y-vkFJEvAnM4dZcUk%3D)
---

**I 've devoted my entire career to fighting for the values that we hold dear as Americans.** From my time as Governor of Indiana to my service as Vice President, I have always stood up for faith, family, and freedom. But I can't do it alone.

**We can continue down the path of socialism and decline, or return to the foundational freedoms and opportunity this nation was founded upon.** Together, we can ensure that America remains a shining beacon of faith, hope, and freedom for generations to come.

**[Join us TODAY and do your part to help protect and preserve the values we hold dear. We cannot afford to let common sense, faith, and conservatism be pushed into the hands of the far left any longer, it's time to take a stand.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bdc3227bab0641909c31620c94c17a7e&_e=1NSXmMWSxcsPqmr6bc70SSvJ2qA4EGsFJLH5tVGhrltszKquK89M5nHw-l6neh0WILRCG3-N9mpNmC8PFOG0nxvtwrytMP5cvQ2DkpwZr2s64BWSSMH8CBz8ojeNQCNpEzGnKdydyNSeEyM4ZpkAZhuXgusfCv0a_vie2QuWxXkkvdKwnSQNHbwDmFTuM_Q1n-aPNdcCm7Onmuw-JYLJPWSwX-uJz6S6NchfxLUtBV1KgTkQO4aaHlpPXAlo3OEDxMnsMZxLmkvEgKxx_ZD3vMjgKW3V3MvazRChpHDR0Oed8j90KZfA8kE4n3SqK12jB7PBsLyBcLuRPIs0wacgjPPr4dqQqYwVZuuBG7KQEpIQWIRy5MRN7kIgQaH70BBCxxABBeWyMIfNfNObz9vBaGi26B3QyJsrM79v0l3q7ew%3D "Join us TODAY and do your part to help protect and preserve the values we hold dear. We cannot afford to let common sense, faith, and conservatism be pushed into the hands of the far left any longer, it's time to take a stand.")**

I hope we can count on you to join us in our mission to return our great nation back to the guiding light of God and the Constitution.

---
| | | [RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=bdc3227bab0641909c31620c94c17a7e&_e=1NSXmMWSxcsPqmr6bc70SSvJ2qA4EGsFJLH5tVGhrltszKquK89M5nHw-l6neh0WILRCG3-N9mpNmC8PFOG0nxvtwrytMP5cvQ2DkpwZr2s64BWSSMH8CBz8ojeNQCNpEzGnKdydyNSeEyM4ZpkAZhuXgusfCv0a_vie2QuWxXkkvdKwnSQNHbwDmFTuM_Q1n-aPNdcCm7Onmuw-JYLJPWSwX-uJz6S6NchfxLUtBV1KgTkQO4aaHlpPXAlo3OEDxMnsMZxLmkvEgKxx_ZD3vOiYerbbSPiua_yyn08CD86C2bulK0ZiX5Js0NKqGT9k3R5koUE4TIMn6CoSPgQsupatQh5m6uuypzEnjjpfwrJOG9_XExCdQdChZ2vduY6u8tc582Mshro8bGVWuRCR60Uq2GvysmzSdeL7hPcoIfk%3D)

Thank you and God Bless,
Mike Pence

clean_body: In God We Trust | | | | | | This is Mike Pence. As a Christian, I 'm deeply saddened to see the villainization of our Christian values by the radical left. Persecution against God's children has been ongoing since the beginning of time but never has a mainstream political party in America taken such a radical stance against the Judeo-Christian values this nation was founded on. | | These faithless liberals are gaslighting our children. They want them to believe God's guidance is noninclusive and harmful. The day our children no longer look up to God, our Kingdom will be lost. We cannot let that happen. It's time to bring back the America that celebrates religious freedom, protects the right to life, and encourages a culture that walks with Jesus, not in spite of Him. Returning to God and the Constitution is the only way we can ensure a better tomorrow for future generations, but it won 't happen unless we open up about the real struggles we face as believers and as a nation. | | I 've devoted my entire career to fighting for the values that we hold dear as Americans. From my time as Governor of Indiana to my service as Vice President, I have always stood up for faith, family, and freedom. But I can't do it alone. We can continue down the path of socialism and decline, or return to the foundational freedoms and opportunity this nation was founded upon. Together, we can ensure that America remains a shining beacon of faith, hope, and freedom for generations to come. "Join us TODAY and do your part to help protect and preserve the values we hold dear. We cannot afford to let common sense, faith, and conservatism be pushed into the hands of the far left any longer, it's time to take a stand." I hope we can count on you to join us in our mission to return our great nation back to the guiding light of God and the Constitution. | | | Thank you and God Bless, Mike Pence | | Paid for by Advancing American Freedom 801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930 Washington, DC 20004

Friend,
How would you like to have dinner with your favorite president?
On June 13 (the day before my birthday), I'm hosting a very special dinner at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster - and I'm inviting one lucky winner and a guest of your choice to join me for free.
That's right - I'll cover your flight, your accommodations, and your terrific dinner.
_... And we'll take a picture together so that you can keep a photograph of this incredible memory forever._

name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Activate your membership
body:
The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8722d9f08d78468a8d4fffb7c49ce8ec&_e=HPTOrhXKyjCVSBIcqvbaATWN81hF9xb3kzhl9sTjN9BAC7MlVsbM_vkcwAxKlMowKw2z70PX8bT1mqQmkAQ0FEUwrnRlU--JIFZGW6sTH64hl-F8QZK5jQE9wYVcSB1mHbb9_xfTdZ1QJo_DiqBnuPYitbztVLw-POwsnGdu9eQnu4HDp8uif5UMxlJaZGmV6XhJQ8bKHw-u1bcSgUbFy7pUUIgwRcD_ivHUC9S4jm2fTTV7wsqxLtntbqzutz766f9GSGxVHXx04FWiPtHZEbMurbuitQykWy7Xpv4jiqeygkuphCm9CoCkpaOFheRUCSZRMCmQa7UzMCh-O8CG9Q%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8722d9f08d78468a8d4fffb7c49ce8ec&_e=HPTOrhXKyjCVSBIcqvbaATWN81hF9xb3kzhl9sTjN9BAC7MlVsbM_vkcwAxKlMowKw2z70PX8bT1mqQmkAQ0FEUwrnRlU--JIFZGW6sTH64hl-F8QZK5jQE9wYVcSB1mHbb9_xfTdZ1QJo_DiqBnuPYitbztVLw-POwsnGdu9eQnu4HDp8uif5UMxlJaZGmVO7BXxQ8JfWUNzIO1OF8jfrIfguyvjwaL0xIPbq2Kif_pgFelqC5UcoxUe96EQEiRUHXRy0Wol1a3Wjy5sszzvJqnnbnSKuSLxkU_aSG6YLWvDcjDsOBwE-0Vt7dEnzIkNEncHAw13RuSul8gG3CVmQ%3D%3D)
---
| | As someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the direction of our country.

I would like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation today by clicking on this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8722d9f08d78468a8d4fffb7c49ce8ec&_e=HPTOrhXKyjCVSBIcqvbaATWN81hF9xb3kzhl9sTjN9BAC7MlVsbM_vkcwAxKlMowKw2z70PX8bT1mqQmkAQ0FEUwrnRlU--JIFZGW6sTH64hl-F8QZK5jQE9wYVcSB1mHbb9_xfTdZ1QJo_DiqBnuPYitbztVLw-POwsnGdu9eQnu4HDp8uif5UMxlJaZGmVd8YP3N-y0doPIObaoF785QKah5MUxxhkPQpcX3ihPqt1kQKcajvm8nhhPnfeRP5SMLcix9XsiRslYh_M_rAixDbCzY9wW_QYJlgKz9x2SFQGoYjPuXswskBaTdTfNvZnJN2CHMJXKw5QACP06ezu4w%3D%3D)

Once you become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to undermine American values.

Thank you for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope to welcome you to our community soon.

Best regards,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. When you activate your membership, you will also receive a personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy update emails. Join us today by clicking on this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8722d9f08d78468a8d4fffb7c49ce8ec&_e=HPTOrhXKyjCVSBIcqvbaATWN81hF9xb3kzhl9sTjN9BAC7MlVsbM_vkcwAxKlMowKw2z70PX8bT1mqQmkAQ0FEUwrnRlU--JIFZGW6sTH64hl-F8QZK5jQE9wYVcSB1mHbb9_xfTdZ1QJo_DiqBnuPYitbztVLw-POwsnGdu9eQnu4HDp8uif5UMxlJaZGmV61Ek010r9V4U0ue0S4XZDJZ4Gzl_d7kVUycEJUL-V1BLRAEZP0fdfV7biIoBWnaiIUXMoAcEkLLa4WTBZqAuoTxyVHO3fWPlVVkTkf3_RMTXt7iIDNLHKXEGiDbY64mOw9oZ7FkfMSRKu5KMFqnEug%3D%3D)**

name: Team Jayapal
subject: We’re tired of corruption and exploitation in our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As progressive activists, we have a moral and ethical obligation to call out corruption and hold our leaders accountable for exploiting their power.
#
More news on Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’s exploitation and corruption has surfaced, and Peter, we’re tired of it.
**As progressive activists, we have a moral and ethical obligation to call out corruption and hold our leaders accountable for exploiting their power.** And the only way we’ll be able to eradicate this corruption once and for all is by supporting dedicated leaders who are determined to work for the people, not for special interests and profits.
**[Peter, we must strengthen our grassroots base to pave the way for just and equitable leadership. Please chip in today to support Pramila and her progressive leadership in Congress as we work to build a fair democracy.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41900?refcode=em20230508-2460&t=1&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41900?refcode=em20230508-2460&t=20&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)**
From international yacht trips and political favoritism, to allowing Harlan Crow — a GOP mega donor — to pay for Thomas’ family’s private school tuition, his greed and actions knows no bounds. It’s clear that Clarence Thomas is boldly exploiting his connections in the highest court in the nation.
**Pramila is dedicated and determined to get corruption out of our government and democracy once and for all.** For years, Pramila has been fighting to overhaul our national judicial ethics laws and restore public trust and faith in our court systems, and she will never give up in that fight.
Clarence Thomas does not have the moral and ethical drive that we need from our Supreme Court Justices. He has shown that he is not willing to put into place the ethical standards that Americans expect. **He must resign.**
[**If you stand with Pramila in our collective fight to build a stronger, more just democracy, please chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give to build our momentum.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41900?refcode=em20230508-2460&t=21&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230508-2460-footer&t=22&refcode2=2460_420207_7j24E_&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2460%2E420207%2E7j24E_)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Cori Bush
subject: Re: Do you have a few minutes to read my story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
It's important you know why this work matters to me.
#
Hi Peter,
ICYMI: Last month, I shared my story with you so you know why this important work matters to me. My team set a goal of raising $30,000 by the end of April and unfortunately we fell short.
The truth is not many people in Congress have lived the struggles that I and millions of others in this country have. And that's why I decided to run for Congress in the first place.
It's time we elect folks to Congress who acutely understand the difficulties and challenges that communities face across our country. This will allow us to advance an agenda that works for everyone—including those who have the greatest need.
I hope you will read my story below and when you're finished, [**I hope you can chip in $5 to ensure our movement has the resources it needs to advance progress in Congress**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230508.SUokr0&refcode=em20230508-2655&t=1&akid=2655%2E1082990%2E2b9N1S)
Thank you,
Cori
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Cori Bush [teamcori@coribush.org]
Date: Fri, Apr 28, 2023 at 6:45 PM
Subject: There aren't many people in Congress who have lived the struggles that I have
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
We have a goal of raising $30,000 this month, and my team told me we’re pacing behind on reaching it before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline.
They suggested I reach out to explain why I hope you'll chip in to support the progressive movement we’re building in Congress.
**So I’m going to share my story with you.** It’s important that you know why this work matters to me.
**[When you finish reading, I hope you can chip in $5 to help us reach our $30,000 fundraising goal and ensure our team has the resources we need to make progress in Congress.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230508.SUokr0&amount=5&refcode=em20230508-2655&t=2&akid=2655%2E1082990%2E2b9N1S)**
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230508.SUokr0&refcode=em20230508-2655&t=21&akid=2655%2E1082990%2E2b9N1S)**
There aren’t many people in Congress who have lived the struggles that I have, Peter.
_I’ve been evicted, unhoused, and lived in a car with my two babies._ I will never forget the nights when I was unhoused where my eyes would water as I fought to stay awake, worried about what would happen to my children if I fell asleep. When I used McDonald's bathrooms to mix baby formula and wash my body because I had no other options.
_I’ve been on the ground brutalized by police violence._ When Michael Brown Jr. was murdered by police just six minutes from where I lived in 2014, I didn't take to the streets for a title or a name. I was sent by my employer to serve as a triage nurse and to assist with grief and trauma work. But, I showed up to protest the day after Michael Brown was killed, and I came back every day for the next 400 days.
_I was sexually assaulted at 17 and chose to have an abortion._ I saw up close how Black women are treated by our health care system and the challenges we face in accessing abortion care.
There are very few members of Congress who understand what this is like, **but I know that there are millions of people in our communities who share these experiences.**
That’s why I decided to run for Congress: It’s past time we elect folks who understand first-hand the challenges everyday people face. But now, I’m up against a Republican-controlled Congress and we must make sure we continue building our movement for meaningful, people-first change.
Today, I’m asking for a favor: **[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach our fundraising goal before our deadline on the 30th? Every dollar gives us the resources we need to write a new chapter in politics centered in justice, love, and compassion.](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230508.LT46xZ&refcode=em20230508-2655&t=22&akid=2655%2E1082990%2E2b9N1S)**
Thank you for all of your support.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230508?refcode=em20230508-2655-footer&t=23&refcode2=2655_1082990_2b9N1S&akid=2655%2E1082990%2E2b9N1S) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

But, I showed up to protest the day after Michael Brown was killed, and I came back every day for the next 400 days. I was sexually assaulted at 17 and chose to have an abortion. I saw up close how Black women are treated by our health care system and the challenges we face in accessing abortion care. There are very few members of Congress who understand what this is like, but I know that there are millions of people in our communities who share these experiences. That’s why I decided to run for Congress: It’s past time we elect folks who understand first-hand the challenges everyday people face. But now, I’m up against a Republican-controlled Congress and we must make sure we continue building our movement for meaningful, people-first change. Today, I’m asking for a favor: Thank you for all of your support. Your Congresswoman loves you, Cori Follow us on , , , and . This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121. Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress *

name: VoteVets
subject: Responsibility
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
In the Military, weapons access is highly regulated
#
Hey there, Derek,
We’ve seen a lot of people parrot a right-wing, NRA talking point lately. The gist of it is: If we trust 18 year olds in the military to handle assault rifles, why shouldn’t we do it with civilians?
Now, the short answer is: Weapons of war have no place on our streets. [**And if you want to join us in telling Congress that they need to take action and ban weapons of war, add your name here.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230508_vv_em_wow/?source=em230508-1-15&refcode2=8421.3013755.yaf_9y&t=1&akid=8421%2E3013755%2Eyaf_9y)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230508_vv_em_wow/?source=em230508-1-15&refcode2=8421.3013755.yaf_9y&t=2&akid=8421%2E3013755%2Eyaf_9y)
---
But if they want to have a conversation on weapons in the Military, let’s do that. Because access is highly regulated.
First, when you join the Military you have to undergo a background check. Novel concept.
Second, you spend WEEKS training at basic before you ever fire a weapon. Physical and mental drills that reinforce the deep responsibility of operating these weapons of war. Then you go off to technical school, where you do even more training.
Third, you have to regularly re-qualify on your weapons.
And finally, for the most part, weapons aren’t carried around on base. They’re safely stored in the armory, alongside the ammunition.
But again — there’s just no reason why anyone should be able to buy a weapon that was designed for the battlefield. It’s completely irresponsible, and incredibly dangerous.
If you agree, we’re collecting signatures — [**join us and tell Congress that they need to take action and ban these weapons of war.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230508_vv_em_wow/?source=em230508-1-15&refcode2=8421.3013755.yaf_9y&t=3&akid=8421%2E3013755%2Eyaf_9y)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230508_vv_em_wow/?source=em230508-1-15&refcode2=8421.3013755.yaf_9y&t=4&akid=8421%2E3013755%2Eyaf_9y)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Josh Hawley
subject: “Too many jobs?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, This is absolutely despicable.

After I grilled Joe Biden’s Interior Secretary for shutting down a mineral mine as part of her radical climate agenda, she said there were already **too many jobs** in America.

**The Democrats have made themselves clear: they want to ERASE blue-collar America. Their vision is a country of liberal elites, who bow the knee to China’s natural resources, and a hollowed out middle class dependent on the government. **

The Democrats know what blue-collar America stands for: and they absolutely HATE it.

The Left will NEVER respect hard work, family values, and patriotism.

_But it’s not enough for them to send jobs overseas and inject woke into the next generation: they won’t be done until they ELIMINATE blue-collar American altogether._

**[We MUST fight back. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, This is absolutely despicable. After I grilled Joe Biden’s Interior Secretary for shutting down a mineral mine as part of her radical climate agenda, she said there were already too many jobs in America. The Democrats have made themselves clear: they want to ERASE blue-collar America. Their vision is a country of liberal elites, who bow the knee to China’s natural resources, and a hollowed out middle class dependent on the government. The Democrats know what blue-collar America stands for: and they absolutely HATE it. The Left will NEVER respect hard work, family values, and patriotism. But it’s not enough for them to send jobs overseas and inject woke into the next generation: they won’t be done until they ELIMINATE blue-collar American altogether. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am committed to reviving the American Dream and taking the America First movement further than President Trump. | | We’re making history in 2024, Fellow American! I am committed to reviving the American Dream and taking the America First movement further than President Trump. We have a long road ahead. Our first goal is to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage in August where I can offer my vision for our country and its revival. But, there are certain numbers I have to hit, which include strong polling numbers and importantly invested unique grassroots donors. | I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It’s time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Protecting Emilia Sykes’s seat in Ohio will help us take back the House in 2024!
body:
Democratic House majority 2024!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49f6a6e5-1d51-42a3-b74a-89fabff59e6f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**If we plan on winning back the House in 2024, we can 't lose this race.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3eedebc3-6167-4bb1-924b-ac28ee46b9c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _You may recall in Ohio in 2022 a billionaire and Mitch McConnell dumped in $50 million to elect cro-magnon J.D. Vance.__Yet, something else happened. There were 3 House races in key Ohio swing districts. We swept all three._ **_One of the races was won by Emilia Sykes. Sykes hails from a politically active family in Northeast Ohio, joined the OH State House in 2015 and became State House Minority Leader in 2019._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe5d106b-b6cf-427b-840f-502240361309/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Sykes entered the Ohio-13th District congressional race in 2022, bringing smarts, charisma & diversity, and winning the close district by an impressive 5%. **_She's fought for voting rights, abortion rights and gun safety, and will continue to fight if we do our part and keep her in DC.__ [**_Like the DCCC, Emiily's List & Swing Left--all of whom endorsed her early--we know there's no Democratic House majority w/out Sykes. But Republicans know it too. _****_They're targeting her now with the kind of racist dog whistles you'd expect. So can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight their filth and reelect Rep. Sykes?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55157195-9c8f-45fc-8645-d107665b41c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us take back a House Majority from the GOP jackals._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta457396c-a267-42fa-92a8-e223e23ab9b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63011315/405281419/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4142-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYwMjc3Yy0wMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AuIvjDkWGuYpPwBwwX9jQeFRNoteo1f_2koTWP7IOPs=)
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**
**[_Can you split a donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our fundraising goal. Anything you can give helps._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63011316/405281420/73003207?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4142-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYwMjc3Yy0wMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AuIvjDkWGuYpPwBwwX9jQeFRNoteo1f_2koTWP7IOPs=)**

Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet. These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d6d21ba911740238186214a938e6a66&_e=EUYsRLAxfThDSRlIb2Q_qe2I7pFyHdRK77ELnUE1DxhMW05V2Ou510KM2MCEGL8uS6ZkfmsoRzH_jsQ65NbikebWaRcLkHfkiF6Tt1Gs46QFzOPkJkj6t2mZNwz2oD7TnXezx2BBZCwincovve_WffWC0dfS5hzvhkIPRo7SWLxXSTq9xmlqoMM389Xt5QI7UvCh5POtgO420Cn9Rygg1yWFZAsYnyelkVyUT2HxB7kcP3NIyR64RyieI0qblx0zTxgT0WJcxzVZCXPn7kxJ7GXEzuWbcKb451Ym9rjjdSOZjswmtg4l9P7XnXw8cayY88Rhxcs-8O6B0FcY67D1cNDGyOH1CdS_tsJ7noHDnTBNBvH4OSrb2PpzMrmPpB2FxeFAzrVeeJVKV-Il4nBaxw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d6d21ba911740238186214a938e6a66&_e=EUYsRLAxfThDSRlIb2Q_qe2I7pFyHdRK77ELnUE1DxhMW05V2Ou510KM2MCEGL8uS6ZkfmsoRzH_jsQ65NbikebWaRcLkHfkiF6Tt1Gs46QFzOPkJkj6t2mZNwz2oD7TnXezx2BBZCwincovve_WffWC0dfS5hzvhkIPRo7SWLxXSTq9xmlqoMM389Xt5QI7UvCh5POtgO420Cn9Rygg1yWFZAsYnyelkVyUT2HxB7kcP3NIyR64RyieI0qblx0zLgNY9Q0I2lyJ57FgU2YjZCUf220-s8Lwh4sPvp7hyMmg9nQqu15zVxVwHiLOTKefoPOrYHtX22rOto3fCUyQ-sSHG1cyT4u1lCZWsSOz-2Y92_eOWlM07SC-m8pCE427UE9a5QEk-BA3qpC03gtW_w%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9d6d21ba911740238186214a938e6a66&_e=EUYsRLAxfThDSRlIb2Q_qe2I7pFyHdRK77ELnUE1DxhMW05V2Ou510KM2MCEGL8uS6ZkfmsoRzH_jsQ65NbikebWaRcLkHfkiF6Tt1Gs46QFzOPkJkj6t2mZNwz2oD7TnXezx2BBZCwincovve_WffWC0dfS5hzvhkIPRo7SWLxXSTq9xmlqoMM389Xt5QI7UvCh5POtgO420Cn9Rygg1yWFZAsYnyelkVyUT2HxB7kcP3NIyR64RyieI0qblx0zhGAbfFPQ4Awa32y-svG_f6uGUPTfpavAFEkC8-61gO0uMX7e0CKwE_PdZzXcAnYSWYsM7dbIMhsqpROmeHAKdozbKojyA1K55S0T02w_jlmm7ZiJIr5xEt7o2iwGn96rigp8Cm83Fw8H5re-Da3qWQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=9d6d21ba911740238186214a938e6a66&_t=m26h8wCQMh4kNGVvA3F_NL84su1X6NKifXHoWg69TttTRxMkiSf6wmnQjV7YHedaKdPIvI4QgC9Jwba5ITra9-XZ9ZqcC513LpyO8-TQWRk%3D)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: You can help reunite families for Mother’s Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail is keeping families apart this Mother’s Day. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvaWyHwMMM9bTGsiHNyyQQ-jd2BhiDNWb3z42ojcdKlbpJdZ12jztnaR5uZpI611aQnsb_gemUSgk4rTN3mWrQmalUf2-ez9PkG-apew94oo1HQdyAPTxKtVinfCVGgliGvvJr8sjZyeKeOtpd1RACEuz6CiumKg2kTe6GflwNRsbxTembxgOq3pGCr_ujbnTEjARt2JbzO6iRn8hwoDXorg/3w0/J_NVLcXASA6sjcxHspPKgg/h0/o2X2aGDgq4zLqUMu0VmHBNOpmIrKNmwmuZW1lP-3hKI)
---
Friend, Each year, families are kept apart on Mother’s Day because of the United States’ immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail. This system punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail. Here in Michigan, Michigan Liberation has done incredible work on the ground to free mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford to post bail, highlight the role of profiteers in the bail bonds industry, and expose the massive underlying social inequities leading to contact with the legal system. [**Please donate today so Michigan Liberation Education Fund and the coalition can pay the bails, fines, and fees of mothers who are sitting in jail because they cannot afford bail. Your donation will help reunite families this Mother’s Day and beyond.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbivvXNdXZq5g_-sjFRKU3z0efMaMgVV6YBJB01esDCyd6YDUeCodL6Mnw2a3hNijvdQR0OWyws0vNFXQGjAYz0z3R46oD8mWill941Hs3H-WR60Oh2nueinT89Cyzc-rvDfwqqYiOiHK4YEMCxDUwqm6ATqcCHcf_H1qYqnb7hgbVQZQABNUUgRNcsSHB3Ig_3vj8feL00xC5mLQ_9poXPt_I85OAq8UPZI5PHOrbWMQN79tvqCbsc9dgFruRc_S1hLW_x80wSh3Ne8REgFDgz9Tbb2nIjpy6VQIUpzLTkUb7BY2VXk1wZ8Q0Lc8aLAdj5Bk9AiiPJvPc1yBt8Ugysw/3w0/J_NVLcXASA6sjcxHspPKgg/h1/o7hgjRrDdCSYNIPoVPnnuqE2QW1zwjsTJr7VNEoLnOc) | [DONATE TO BAIL FUNDS TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbNHbPipgmZh7h0z96BiEV-Qmv5Sx979ny5WW_AoliSdC9vOdziYPrxLTVOKE8PJQLJSEkWkNGmgoWlye70_orS4CJ0xzWc4SLLFlYNKQMXxjHeNf1CQQXk2murN3OetTqNhOlCm4QSFjuxIarfA8n81xB-njaBtsaN7ZGZyzQ5D_JQPdW9pqy9kv-ntLmxtsFa7wqtPv8O8PCdDDHDWub5404olKUoardbxSW01KUnut9q8-0DNBdljzsOl7GXMhLTgg0HeNX4YBz-UlhMpSAUScysTH9PxKBD0Damqefsutpvyc-LToYzCiciS_eQV0mWh740j3WFdIaywswrswd-w/3w0/J_NVLcXASA6sjcxHspPKgg/h2/plRyzloIKveUfsIkN98kvwdYSzZMFl-4BSGmVeys3u4)
---
Due to a long history of systemic racism, there’s a huge racial wealth gap, and Black people are also much more likely to be targeted for arrests. Black folks are disproportionately impacted by unjust money bail.
**What started as a bailout, which our campaign has helped fundraise for since 2019, has evolved into a quest for transformational change across the legal system in Michigan.**
This is important, game-changing work. And it’s urgent.
When caregivers are locked in cages, entire families and communities suffer. Even a few days behind bars can result in irreparable physical, emotional, and financial harm: Parents may lose their jobs, housing, and even their children.
[**Please donate as generously as you can today to help mothers and caregivers post bail before Mother’s Day. clean_body: The immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail is keeping families apart this Mother’s Day. | | | Friend, Each year, families are kept apart on Mother’s Day because of the United States’ immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail. This system punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail. Here in Michigan, Michigan Liberation has done incredible work on the ground to free mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford to post bail, highlight the role of profiteers in the bail bonds industry, and expose the massive underlying social inequities leading to contact with the legal system. | Due to a long history of systemic racism, there’s a huge racial wealth gap, and Black people are also much more likely to be targeted for arrests. Black folks are disproportionately impacted by unjust money bail. What started as a bailout, which our campaign has helped fundraise for since 2019, has evolved into a quest for transformational change across the legal system in Michigan. This is important, game-changing work. And it’s urgent. When caregivers are locked in cages, entire families and communities suffer. Even a few days behind bars can result in irreparable physical, emotional, and financial harm: Parents may lose their jobs, housing, and even their children. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Michigan Liberation Education Fund, a project of Mothering Justice: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. With love, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

clean_body: 14 states have active abortion bans on the books. North Carolina could be the next, so we’re fueling up to fight back → | | Ballot measures have become the last line of defense for abortion access in many states across the country, team. We’re gearing up for the fights ahead, but we need you with us —= = Team: An extremist-packed state legislature just passed a 6-week abortion ban making North Carolina the next state that could enact dangerous restrictions on reproductive freedom. Here’s what we know: FACT: 8 in 10 Americans wanted to see abortion remain protected in the aftermath of the Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization SCOTUS decision. FACT: 14 states currently have TOTAL abortion bans on the books while 5 more have bans on abortion anywhere from as early as 6 weeks to 20 weeks after conception. FACT: 10 states remain where ballot measures could be used to protect abortion access permanently — and in some states, they could strike down active abortion bans. Now, unless Gov. Roy Cooper vetoes this ban, North Carolina could become the next state to enact dangerous restrictions on abortion. After major wins to protect abortion access at the ballot box last November, voters proved that the best way to permanently secure their reproductive freedom wasn’t to rely on politicians,but to do it themselves. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your continued support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, did you see this over the weekend? We almost couldn’t believe our eyes when we did. Congressman Colin Allred announced a groundbreaking campaign to take on Ted Cruz — and finally elect a black US Senator from Texas. In a fundraising text over the weekend, Ted Cruz included a picture of Alvin Bragg — who is most definitely NOT Colin Allred — in his fundraising text — because the Senator clearly has trouble telling two different black people apart. See for yourself below ⬇️⬇️⬇️ | | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005090/405245482/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20230508_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_SupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmMjIwYy1lMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkllWzfSNdQSSbSNgCciM8wbvq-_2HHHIxoZaL1TpFw=&emci=2f931ba9-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e07f220c-e2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) | Bonnie held a press conference in Trenton, **shining a light on the extremist rulings coming from the Supreme Court.**

Together with the former President of Planned Parenthood, Bonnie advocated for reforms such as instituting a code of ethics and expanding the court — which would restore balance, accountability, and ethical processes.

Following a string of corrupt rulings and scandalous revelations, Americans are having a crisis of faith in our judicial system, leading to the lowest approval rating in the Court’s history.

[If you stand with Bonnie’s demand for a fair and ethical court, will you add your name now? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005092/405245485/1034788928?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20230508_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_SupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmMjIwYy1lMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkllWzfSNdQSSbSNgCciM8wbvq-_2HHHIxoZaL1TpFw=&emci=2f931ba9-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e07f220c-e2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005093/405245486/1034788928?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20230508_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_SupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmMjIwYy1lMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkllWzfSNdQSSbSNgCciM8wbvq-_2HHHIxoZaL1TpFw=&emci=2f931ba9-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e07f220c-e2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) **Bonnie’s made it clear:** it's time we stand up to the Supreme Court and the slippery slope of shady dealings and unethical rulings.

[If you agree, show your support by adding your name to Bonnie’s petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005094/405245488/1034788928?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20230508_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_SupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmMjIwYy1lMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkllWzfSNdQSSbSNgCciM8wbvq-_2HHHIxoZaL1TpFw=&emci=2f931ba9-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e07f220c-e2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005095/405245490/1034788928?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20230508_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_SupremeCourt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdmMjIwYy1lMmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkllWzfSNdQSSbSNgCciM8wbvq-_2HHHIxoZaL1TpFw=&emci=2f931ba9-c2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=e07f220c-e2ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30096098) Thanks for all your support,

Together with the former President of Planned Parenthood, Bonnie advocated for reforms such as instituting a code of ethics and expanding the court — which would restore balance, accountability, and ethical processes. Following a string of corrupt rulings and scandalous revelations, Americans are having a crisis of faith in our judicial system, leading to the lowest approval rating in the Court’s history. Bonnie’s made it clear: it's time we stand up to the Supreme Court and the slippery slope of shady dealings and unethical rulings. Thanks for all your support, Team BWC Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community. Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave, SE Washington, DC 20003 United States **

[**May 8, 1846:** The Battle of Palo Alto occurred during the Mexican-American War, near the Rio Grande in Texas. The battle was fought between the United States Army (under Zachary Taylor) and the Mexican Army, resulting in a victory for the US, despite being outnumbered. The battle was significant in establishing the U.S. as a formidable military power and paved the way for further U.S. territorial expansion.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e57gVA8DMWrOuR0C39DTSV90YMdnPXtrJfpA2dui9_IcJMBcx-1g2avyf37DNGQLvXPxa1HKgDS3AbLPUpIqheE0hikQYNAvRNBxTp5kHigYF72k6ZFmTro5O2xuuHpnuFp1CiBDvzZhLE4y2j80tBJ0veILXhQhXO1Yy5fUUG5MFVMolo7vqpvi20ggbh7-DAfNl2ZBAf3nW6MZVW5y_Rx0%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e57gVA8DMWrOuR0C39DTSV90YMdnPXtrJfpA2dui9_IcJMBcx-1g2avyf37DNGQLvXJgwVOoysZMATKSOOOVA-9kawLmRMp2ryJgkDJQFlWoIv2rnaGZPfKf_cEsJzetTETFQ5TlHRGx9hMRj9FAxUo4TET8k4TLehhkJBvbHuN7vo8WeoVyccgbR2_al0LGlhBX5UPKbBVPwB_3H1cD7EdM%3D)**

[**May 8, 1877:** The first Westminster Kennel Club Dog Show (then known as the First Annual New York Bench Show of Dogs) began. It attracted large crowds over four days and is one of the oldest continuously running sporting events in the United States, second only to the Kentucky Derby.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e50L5tOHtAYTD3ecWOukE0kgAC2Y_CZCTfBzqeSkyZWR1vG-UxDC1rVOGU4jrzqpDPHzvmhmi9eLHkTw5X_E52TIbD9B8r3H_mqiBQzbAjvgTGExJWx5DwDubNcIYSjUiPEalcvkBEzrGiMSJgmvVwAyjba-1XaTUDqPTaQtlG8gh4tOFyhDesb4djTFXJ4IEuT89EtROG0L7HSNfnLkdxvaUhG6SN_jQu36GZAgsdQKx7lE-iVb3GoElFns4kYe8qQ%3D%3D) **Source -[todayinhistory.blog](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e50L5tOHtAYTD3ecWOukE0kgAC2Y_CZCTfBzqeSkyZWR1vG-UxDC1rVOGU4jrzqpDPHzvmhmi9eLHkTw5X_E52TLDbqCpnQVw6kVT8VcwghJFf1-TBS3QNU4mPko9cCKB4TI8aMwVM5WrFCoZIieQCMBD-dlhGoHMyUUc36PtUVUyAgxJun9XcjF3EKAvTc20FngPHGSfWJRDggN_ffpYpbT0RdrdVW8AGoEhJ5I8o9pZrqNw7o2U2sbadffwK_AXXg%3D%3D)**

[**May 8, 1886:** Dr. John S. Pemberton, a pharmacist and inventor of patent medicines, made history by serving the first-ever Coca-Cola at Jacob's Pharmacy in Atlanta, Georgia. Since then, Coca-Cola has become a beloved and popular beverage that people have enjoyed for over a century.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e5_qXqjrMY07JbFLDo4F16caS3LBf9pYks_ZMSFjsbe_GT185TZ_VAUb3VAXDTQnq3CfLdVAIb_6lDxJtWldM_oJWJqOXDr-0XGnBsneu528BjY6aOkgaPNF5umMHatnt3TbImQXnkHGsiHNJe7xgB6zUtFSTfemU0oSEZPtOw25siOWUcCR8Ul1rGdGv8umyuT_TzU-ZE2S93NKEzGaeK1MF--FlK5o2CtW-m7IMVyqZ) **Source -[americaslibrary.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=708f77fda62a4ed08f007a538a97b752&_e=Q_ghYPR6pf7jqdGOGc_e5_qXqjrMY07JbFLDo4F16caS3LBf9pYks_ZMSFjsbe_GT185TZ_VAUb3VAXDTQnq3CfLdVAIb_6lDxJtWldM_oI6QkojQ13o0SUISb7I4ORtM8k6FbTQuh4SQVcRrIWO-YVZpPsS8S1w268pnLHl5IYQMcAfKie-0PWpG3CSFxkDi2fjLsbcc5qwHKqqNRL3bkbycOtxA5A_3wt-zdUwcpyM5N_xUiPaYrWhXsFVJzCE)**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I am coming to you with this important ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of the election there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.
| | |
---
Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.

Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt.

We’ve made progress paying these bills, but we’ve still got a ways to go.

You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: **[Please chip in $3 or as much as you can so that our (victorious!) campaign can pay these remaining bills and I can continue to focus on serving Granite Staters in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005587/405247247/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2269-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzhlNjE0Yy1lM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWsmOZpv0D8-f5DEfA3kXHGnvaF56KgZ52fCAFWjmQk=) **

I’m proud of the work that this team put in to hold on to New Hampshire’s Senate seat. We were scrappy, we didn’t take anything for granted, and we connected with voters in every corner of the state.

I hate sending emails like this one, but the reality is that we left it all on the field. Fortunately it paid off – now we just have to wrap up this one final piece.

If you can, please chip in $3 right now to help pay these bills: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005592/405247252/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2269-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzhlNjE0Yy1lM2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FWsmOZpv0D8-f5DEfA3kXHGnvaF56KgZ52fCAFWjmQk=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Katie Hill
subject: I want to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005605/405247376/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk1OGZiYWItZTNlZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gLAiHYN0-kUzQihl8yoffz0gqIAZ4KI4i2N6gioH0bc=)
---
I know we ask you to chip in to this work a lot, so [_**before I ask you to make another donation toward our mid-quarter fundraising deadline coming up,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005606/405247377/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTk1OGZiYWItZTNlZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gLAiHYN0-kUzQihl8yoffz0gqIAZ4KI4i2N6gioH0bc=) I wanted to explain what it truly means to be a donor to HER Time: When you make a donation to HER Time, you’re sending a message to Kevin McCarthy and the political establishment that we’ve had enough of their system that’s not working — and we’re ready to build a new one. When you chip in $5 here or $10 there, you’re rejecting the status quo of Washington. You’re saying enough to men making deals behind closed doors that leave women and people of color in the dust. When you pitch in whatever you can afford, you’re powering HER Time’s work to elect more women and advance our interests — especially because the money we raise from these emails are the **main** way we raise what we need to operate. [_**If you’re with us in this fight, I would really appreciate it if you would add a donation now toward our mid-quarter goal coming up quickly. | | **Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Ben Shapiro, and that 's me (Ryan Girdusky). ** **_You might be wondering what the four of us could possibly have in common ..._** Well, the truth is, we didn't actually go to school together. But when it comes to the way we see education today, we're in the same class: **You see, what all of us have recognized is that the radical leftist assault on our children has never been more aggressive and more dangerous than it is today. ** [_**Friend, that 's why I wanted to ask if you would make a critical investment in America's future today.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c60fabce28745b3a43d5506fa112f7a&_e=eORimW3fRN-qb7MeTTQoM1DDK5gHuElRl0hMMhvy8FIjfaKDmHSDFjFTME0dVuzzHOyh-MchqZiqVrDDUeCKDOsAr0HPowq8H48eRzWmatyq9bEYtCPd3uslXcjKQBC2BRSSlPPUkn2SHfV6-Ca_bl3XOsMk8CZEUJP_Dmqbx8TB2zAPzU9StQ1H09A0unpqQl_zARkoCloJVTledwQWXAjKfx19yEHG5Z1HSarkjgNrQNGRIIGpMMMXUVkBWwhU8z101l6llO4LlR13D1HMLggMhrQnbopeMEsD5PSHoPtbirn68gbKL4vd8EShUqNIholc5lQnk2jd31p9y7LAAud1L7-eEJMU6szzw1bO4OPkQOvURy6N-xKJcW90NiZCnHDw2ZPAzhdvKBhwoZ7zBUucF_c3V5bGNbxm_r5GJcKOeDPDJneAvLpExvoywoQfL-LffaOMBdWQh0pb-12kew%3D%3D) Let me explain: Over the last 40 years, leftists have completely taken control of our school systems- even down to the local level. As a result, our children are being taught RADICAL left wing ideas like Critical Race Theory, and Radical Gender Ideology. I knew there had to be a way our children and our children's children could achieve a future that wasn't tainted by indoctrination in the classroom. That's why less than two years ago I decided to do something no one had ever done before... I founded an organization alone out of my apartment in New York called the 1776 Project PAC, the first political action committee created to take back our schools from the radical left by getting SANE conservatives elected to school boards NATIONWIDE. **As for Tucker, Laura, and Ben - they 've been some of my BIGGEST supporters and cheerleaders from the very very beginning. ** I still look back on their words of encouragement to this day...

Undoubtedly, some of these faces will look familiar to you. | | | | | | | Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Ben Shapiro, and that 's me (Ryan Girdusky). You might be wondering what the four of us could possibly have in common ... Well, the truth is, we didn't actually go to school together. But when it comes to the way we see education today, we're in the same class: You see, what all of us have recognized is that the radical leftist assault on our children has never been more aggressive and more dangerous than it is today. Let me explain: Over the last 40 years, leftists have completely taken control of our school systems- even down to the local level. As a result, our children are being taught RADICAL left wing ideas like Critical Race Theory, and Radical Gender Ideology. I knew there had to be a way our children and our children's children could achieve a future that wasn't tainted by indoctrination in the classroom. Peter, can I be candid with you for a second?

**_I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege._** I didn't attend a fancy private school or have connections to New York's elite. I didn't have a way to communicate with the people in power to tell them about the ways their decisions were _directly_ impacting my family and me. To be frank, I felt voiceless and powerless.
I'm telling you all of this not so you can take pity on me but to get you to understand _why_ I created this priorities survey in the first place. When I made history in 2018 and became the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _never_ let another person feel as invisible as I once did – and my monthly priorities survey is part of how I am upholding that vow.

body:
I'm asking you to have a little faith in me, rumpled suit and all.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005816/405248340/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk100-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkMjEwMi1lNGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rEkJaWn9TP_DBvxvILCFDwiBfP7x2pNd9dcn7GXAU4=)
_"Rumpled." "Disheveled." "Wrinkled."_

Each morning when I wake up, the first thing on my mind is fighting for Ohioans and the Dignity of Work – not competing for the Senate’s best dressed. That’s why sometimes, “rumpled,” “wrinkled,” and “disheveled” are the words used to describe me.

And I get it, friend. Most days, you're much more likely to find me in a Guardians sweatshirt or t-shirt than a suit and tie.

I'm running for reelection to continue fighting for the Dignity of Work – all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, work for tips or earn a salary, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'll fight for you. And fighting for all workers doesn’t require the perfect wardrobe.
**Today though, I'm asking you to have a little faith in me and our campaign, rumpled suit and all. Because the truth is, I'm in the fight of my life to defend Ohio's seat and our Democratic Senate majority._CNN_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot and a GOP millionaire just launched his campaign to defeat me.**
**That's why I'm personally asking for your help today, friend: [Will you chip in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue? Contributions from grassroots supporters like you are critical to powering our campaign to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63005817/405248341/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk100-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJkMjEwMi1lNGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rEkJaWn9TP_DBvxvILCFDwiBfP7x2pNd9dcn7GXAU4=)**
Thanks for being on our team.

In disheveled, but earnest solidarity,

name: Becca Balint
subject: Before I was a Congresswoman, I was a teacher.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63006014/405249056/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE1YWFkNy1lNGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuBBTgCaXkwLuMyxDJY-4JmkSY0AYqvTLbNpo9EFBkk=&emci=c616eaa4-b6ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=8615aad7-e4ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter: It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week! Before I was a Congresswoman and state legislator, I was a teacher. I taught history and social studies at Marlboro Elementary, Guilford Central School, Flood Brook School, and the Community College of Vermont. I also taught library studies and tech at Washington Village School. **There is no job more important than the one teachers do. Sure, we teach curriculum and help students learn important material – _but we also mentor, coach, support, engage, inform, and mold the next generation of informed citizens. _** There’s no doubt that the past few years have fundamentally changed the jobs of America’s teachers. Over the course of the pandemic, we watched as they stepped up to do the impossible: Diving head-first into remote learning, endless zoom meetings, constant phone calls with parents and kids – all while having to look out for their own health and safety on the job. America’s teachers have gone above and beyond their job description to deliver quality education to the next generation – and they continue to do so today. So during this Teacher Appreciation Week, let’s not just thank our educators and school personnel – let’s commit to continuing the fight to make sure they get the respect, fair compensation, and safe and healthy schools they need to help their students thrive. Thank you, teachers! – Becca Balint P.S. If you’re reading this email, it’s likely that there was a teacher who changed the way you thought about yourself, your potential, and the world around you. If you are able, I strongly encourage you to reach out to the teacher or educator who comes to mind for you, and let them know how they impacted your life!
---

clean_body: It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week! | | Peter: It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week! Before I was a Congresswoman and state legislator, I was a teacher. I taught history and social studies at Marlboro Elementary, Guilford Central School, Flood Brook School, and the Community College of Vermont. I also taught library studies and tech at Washington Village School. There is no job more important than the one teachers do. Sure, we teach curriculum and help students learn important material – but we also mentor, coach, support, engage, inform, and mold the next generation of informed citizens. There’s no doubt that the past few years have fundamentally changed the jobs of America’s teachers. Over the course of the pandemic, we watched as they stepped up to do the impossible: Diving head-first into remote learning, endless zoom meetings, constant phone calls with parents and kids – all while having to look out for their own health and safety on the job. America’s teachers have gone above and beyond their job description to deliver quality education to the next generation – and they continue to do so today. So during this Teacher Appreciation Week, let’s not just thank our educators and school personnel – let’s commit to continuing the fight to make sure they get the respect, fair compensation, and safe and healthy schools they need to help their students thrive. Thank you, teachers! – Becca Balint P.S. If you’re reading this email, it’s likely that there was a teacher who changed the way you thought about yourself, your potential, and the world around you. If you are able, I strongly encourage you to reach out to the teacher or educator who comes to mind for you, and let them know how they impacted your life! = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . Peter, **We're reaching out to you today to ask you to take the pledge to support Shawn Wilson for governor of Louisiana in the upcoming election.** This election is crucial for the future of our state and country. The leader we elect will be responsible for improving infrastructure, health care, and the economy for the next several years. So, it is essential to know that Democrat Shawn Wilson has the support to win in a few months. Shawn has over 25 years of experience in working for the people of his state. As the former Secretary of Transportation and Development, he worked hard with people all across the state to improve decades-old infrastructure and implement new projects. **_We’re in a sprint to election day, and there are only a few months left in this race. clean_body: = Peter, We're reaching out to you today to ask you to take the pledge to support Shawn Wilson for governor of Louisiana in the upcoming election. This election is crucial for the future of our state and country. The leader we elect will be responsible for improving infrastructure, health care, and the economy for the next several years. So, it is essential to know that Democrat Shawn Wilson has the support to win in a few months. Shawn has over 25 years of experience in working for the people of his state. As the former Secretary of Transportation and Development, he worked hard with people all across the state to improve decades-old infrastructure and implement new projects. We’re in a sprint to election day, and there are only a few months left in this race. Can we count on you to take the pledge to support Shawn Wilson for governor of Louisiana? | Thank you for your support, Team Wilson | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been _incredible,_ and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas Blue!

Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. _We’re so close to hitting our $3,000,000 launch week goal!_

[**Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you and we just need $5,225 more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $10 to power my Democratic campaign and Upset the Setup? Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63006955/405253025/2071237055?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230508_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1OWYyZDk0LWU5ZWQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qsZMd3bP7L6zGfofeNtlNPTyScfm1Z_RurS4inR63aY=)**

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
