name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Stop brutally killing harmless wolf pups
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1761443?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, if you were a wolf pup, here's how a typical day might look: ● You wake up after a long, restful sleep inside the cozy den that your family (your pack) has built to keep you sheltered from the dangers of the outside world until you and your litter mates are strong enough to fend for yourselves. ● Next, it's time to bond with your siblings! When you grow up, you will rely on each other for survival and find prey together. But for now, you leave that to the adults while you roll around with your brothers and sisters, learning to play and communicate. ● All of this playtime is exhausting! You're getting hungry... ahh, perfect timing! Mama wolf has just returned home with family dinner. ● After a fun day, it's time to crash. You gather round and nuzzle up to your siblings and pack members, sharing body heat to keep you warm. _**But as you blissfully nod off to sleep, little do you know that despite being inside the comforts of your den, you are FAR from safe.**_ If your mama wolf goes out to locate more food, there's a likely chance that cruel trophy hunters will be waiting to _**BRUTALLY MURDER**_ her, which would leave you and your orphaned siblings alone to _**die of starvation or hypothermia.**_ And at any given moment, even while you and your siblings are fast asleep, these same vicious hunters could blow up your den with**_DYNAMITE_ \-- leaving behind nothing but shreds of carcasses and splashes of blood scattered throughout the forest floor.** Fortunately for you, Friend, you are not a wolf pup. But innocent wolf pups ARE suffering these tragic murders as you're reading this. **_However, you DO have the power and the voice to speak out against these atrocious wolf slayings._ [So the only question is: Will you take action today to help save helpless wolf pups?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1761444?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1761445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If these stories upset you, that means that you care. Maybe it's because wolves are one of North America's most treasured native animals, or maybe you are just sensitive to all living creatures. But there are even more reasons that you should care about the fate of wolves too, Friend.
Wolves play an essential role in keeping our ecosystems healthy and are often regarded as "keystone species." They keep deer and elk populations in check, and the carcasses of their prey redistribute nutrients. This provides food for other wildlife and helps many other plant and animal species survive while often even altering the land itself and promoting balance overall.
But blood-thirsty hunters don't see these ecological benefits. Instead, they are willing to go to extreme and gruesome lengths to massacre these iconic animals for sport -- including torturing them with choking snares, leg traps, and recklessly running them over with snowmobiles!
Trophy hunters are rapidly wiping out the wolf population, and GOP lawmakers like Lauren Boebert are propping up the hunting lobby even further by proposing aggressive anti-wolf legislation. These beloved animals are running out of time, and they urgently need us on their side. **_But if we're going to persuade the Biden administration to act immediately to protect gray wolves, we need to_ demonstrate strong public support by getting 8,003 signatures by 11:59 P.M. [Will you step up now and defend these precious animals before they're wiped out forever?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1761446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1761445?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for defending voiceless wolves,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Flying the Unsafe Skies
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quudkdk-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! Ted Cruz thinks there is[ _enough info on Joe Biden to impeach him._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-t/) **The Unsafe Skies** A **[former airline CEO is sounding the alarm on issues facing the air travel industry,](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-i/)** and it makes you wonder what else the US has failed to keep up to date. **Will Joe Pardon Hunter?** As DOJ weighs a potential indictment for Hunter Biden, **[his dad is setting the stage to pardon his son. ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-d/) **In a recent interview with MSNBC, Biden said that**[Hunter has done nothing wrong](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-h/).** **Passing the Burden** NYC Mayor is **[sending migrants from the sanctuary city to a hotel in the suburbs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-k/)** that is not equipped to handle the influx.

**Shooting in Texas** The **[suspect in a deadly mall shooting in Texas](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-u/)** over the weekend that left eight people dead **[has finally been identified.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-o/) **_What took so long_**?** **Just Say No** **[Riley Gaines is urging female athletes to boycott competing against transgirls](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-x/)** to ensure sports return to being fair and reserved for biological females. **Racism in Denver** Denver City Council member is suggesting that **[white-owned businesses be taxed at a higher rate than black-owned businesses](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-m/)** , and the extra revenue be given to the black businesses. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-c/)!**
* Do you **[know the difference](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-q/)**?
* My emotional **[support animal](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-a/).**
* A**[story](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-f/) **about fishing**,[tips ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-z/)**for fishing, and a **[unlucky](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-v/) **day.

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quudkdk-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

subject: a humble ask

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63007528/405254908/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTFmZGVjZS1lYmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwMVhXzsiM4XW55plhqBkeyG-Z3olnw6woKSp-9svo4=&emci=cbce1c02-a9ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a91fdece-ebed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

$10.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $10.

$10 because last year, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes.

$10 because I’m running again, but our race was the closest race in the entire country.

$10 because the first poll of the campaign shows I am tied with Boebert, 45% to 45%.

And $10 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.

I know $10 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. We cannot stop here or let up.

We’ve set a goal to raise another $100,000 to defeat Boebert, and we are just $4,586 away.

[**_Please, can I count on you to split a donation of $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia – before my next fundraising deadline – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert and restore some sanity to Washington?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63007529/405254909/729998634?refcode=20230508.2_AF_5P&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTFmZGVjZS1lYmVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwMVhXzsiM4XW55plhqBkeyG-Z3olnw6woKSp-9svo4=)

It means the world to know I have the support of people like you on this journey again.

Thank you so much in advance.

With gratitude -
Adam

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My legislation in the House would end gun manufacturers’ legal immunity from civil lawsuits
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The multibillion-dollar gun industry enjoys a shield of legal immunity afforded to no other industry. The gun liability shield prevents victims and their families from having their day in court.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)
Derek,
California’s senior U.S. Senator Dianne Feinstein has been a giant on the issue of gun safety.
One reason that is so is because of Sen. Feinstein’s leadership in passing a nationwide assault weapons ban in 1994, which expired in 2004.
During those 10 years, gun violence and mortalities across this country dropped precipitously.
Sen. Feinstein approached this legislation through a lens we have seen too often from today’s leading gun safety activists — personal experience.
As a member of the San Francisco Board of Supervisors, she discovered the bodies of her murdered colleagues, Mayor George Moscone and Harvey Milk, who were slain by gun violence.
She arrived in the Senate as a powerful advocate for gun safety and succeeded in passing legislation that saved lives.
But in the years since George W. Bush and congressional Republicans allowed that ban to expire, I am afraid you know the answer to what has happened as well as I do.
Gun violence is a daily horror, and what’s more, victims and their families have virtually no legal recourse to hold accountable the manufacturers who so wantonly market these guns or act negligently in their sale.
**The multibillion-dollar gun industry enjoys a shield of legal immunity afforded to no other industry. The gun liability shield prevents victims and their families from having their day in court.**
As California’s next U.S. Senator, not only will I do everything in my power to take weapons of war out of civilian hands — I will fight to pass the legislation I’ve written in the House, the _Equal Access to Justice for Victims of Gun Violence Act._
**[If you agree that we need to restore the assault weapons ban and end legal immunity for gun manufacturers, add your name as a citizen cosponsor of my _Equal Access to Justice for Victims of Gun Violence Act_ today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230508-gun-liability-shield.t_QRxk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230508-gun-liability-shield.t_QRxk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)
---
No other country suffers from the deadly frequency of mass shootings and broader gun violence that we experience in the United States.
It doesn’t have to be this way. It shouldn’t be this way.
We have the power to change it. Thanks for raising your voice with mine on behalf of all victims of gun violence and their families today.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230508-gun-liability-shield.t_QRxk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1807?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230508_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2185%2E5257348%2EPE2In8)**

subject: Horrific
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
Peter — I wanted to make sure you saw my note from last week.

Ron DeSantis came to Wisconsin on Saturday and touted his extreme agenda.

DeSantis has enacted some horrific policies, including a six-week abortion
ban and the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which limits what teachers can say about
LGBTQ identities.

Whether DeSantis or Donald Trump is on the presidential ticket for
Republicans, the party is growing more extreme and divisive in its
stances. And whoever they support for the Senate against me is going to
tout these extreme ideas too.

Given how close recent elections have been in Wisconsin, this is going to
be a top battleground state next year — and it’s going to take all of us
to protect this seat.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM2_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=266%2E35263%2Ecu8_MQ ]Peter, I will do
all I can to defeat these extremist GOP candidates. Please, pitch in what
you can to support our work to keep Wisconsin blue!

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=266%2E35263%2Ecu8_MQ ]DONATE

Thanks,

Tammy

--------------Forwarded message--------------From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Friday, May 5
Subject line: Ron DeSantis is coming to Wisconsin

[3]Tammy Baldwin for Senate

My team just shared some big news with me, folks: Florida Governor Ron
DeSantis is coming to Wisconsin this weekend to headline a big fundraiser
for the Wisconsin GOP. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=266%2E35263%2Ecu8_MQ ]Will you rush a donation to help us keep
Republicans like DeSantis from flipping Wisconsin red? I’ll explain more
in just a moment.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM2_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=266%2E35263%2Ecu8_MQ ]DONATE

Here’s why this matters so much:

Right now, Ron DeSantis appears to be gearing up to challenge Donald Trump
for the Republican nomination to the White House. No matter if it’s Trump,
DeSantis, or another Republican nominee, the GOP is desperate to win
Wisconsin in 2024.

In 2016, Wisconsin delivered the 10 electoral college votes Trump needed
to win the White House. He won by 0.7%.

Then, four years later, thanks to this grassroots team, we voted for
President Biden and sent Trump packing. But the truth is, the GOP only
lost Wisconsin by 0.6% in 2020.

And last year, Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by 1%.

The path to the White House and to the Senate majority in 2024 runs right
through Wisconsin — so you can bet dollars to doughnuts that Republicans
like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump will do (and spend!) what it takes to
win here and help flip my Senate seat red. We’ll need your help to fight
back.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may23.WiYufF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230508_PM2_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=266%2E35263%2Ecu8_MQ ]Will you rush a donation to help us prepare for the parade of
high-profile Republicans visiting our state, attacking my record and
propping up the Wisconsin GOP? Anything you can give will help us keep
DeSantis from flipping Wisconsin red.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

While it might seem far away, GOP dark money groups are already hard at work spending thousands attacking President Biden in an attempt to take back control of the Executive Branch. _That is why we need to start the work to win in 2024**now.**_ **_[**Will you chip in and split a donation between myself and President Biden ahead of the 2024 election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63007640/405255424/-723854876?refcode=mw_em_230508_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZjODM2NC1lY2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qEnTNLSb2eA0b9d-EcuW3VidjpVRVWsOOXB3MIPrk4c=)_** President Biden has made great progress and delivered for the American people since he set foot into office. * AND we hit a record-low unemployment rate.

clean_body: Re-electing President Biden = more progress. | | | Derek, In 2024, voters will have the opportunity to re-elect President Joe Biden. While it might seem far away, GOP dark money groups are already hard at work spending thousands attacking President Biden in an attempt to take back control of the Executive Branch. That is why we need to start the work to win in 2024now. = President Biden has made great progress and delivered for the American people since he set foot into office. Here’s just a few things my fellow Democrats and I have been able to achieve under his leadership: We cut prescription drugs for families everywhere and made historic investments in our climate and our economy with the Inflation Reduction Act. Revitalized our communities with the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law by expanding highways, upgrading airports, fixing buildings, and building new bike paths. We passed legislation to remove firearms from dangerous individuals and make our communities safer. Expanded benefits and services for Veterans. AND we hit a record-low unemployment rate. But our work isn't done. From codifying Roe v. Wade into law to safeguard access to abortions, reforming the corrupt Supreme Court, and protecting voting rights – there is still a lot of work ahead. That’s why we need you to = The Republican Party has already shown they will spare no expense to win this election, and your support of any amount is critical to giving us the resources we need to win in 2024. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Joe Biden and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Together, we will re-elect President Biden and continue making progress that counts for the American people. Thank you, Mark Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
this is just flat out EVIL...
| | **We’re absolutely appalled–** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230508_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7590%2E878179%2EqCUqPT) | [**35,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION NOW TO DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230508_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7590%2E878179%2EqCUqPT)

Millions of Americans rely on Social Security. It is NOT an entitlement like Lindsey Graham seems to think!!

**Ultra-wealthy, out-of-touch Republicans like Senator Graham were never going to protect average Americans. They're even willing to default on our national debt to destroy it!**

_That’s why we have to step up to save Social Security today._

[**We can stop the GOP’s shameful scheme, but only with your help today – please, sign our urgent petition now demanding Congress protect Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230508_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7590%2E878179%2EqCUqPT)

clean_body: As we celebrate key climate victories up and down the ballot from last year and so far this year, we’re ramping up our efforts to elect even more in 2023 and beyond. | = | At the Jane Fonda Climate, we’re building a movement to elect climate champions up and down the ballot and rid our government of the fossil fuels industry’s influence. As we celebrate key climate victories up and down the ballot last year and so far this year, we’re ramping up our efforts to elect even more in 2023 and beyond – we need your help. | As a volunteer you can: ✊ Knock on doors to show your support for a local climate champion ☎️ Make phone calls and text voters in your district ✍️ Write letters to the editor of a local newspaper on the importance of electing climate champions 📱 Help amplify our message on social media ✅ Be among the first to know when new volunteer opportunities come up And much more! | Let’s fight to protect our planet together, Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Federal Hearing in Civil Rights Lawsuit for High School Teacher Fired for Preemployment Social Media Posts
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a court hearing will be held before Judge Denise J. Casper of the U.S. District Court for the District of Massachusetts on Tuesday, May 9, 2023, in the civil rights lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media that predated her employment at Hanover High School

Casper of the U.S. District Court for the District of Massachusetts on Tuesday, May 9, 2023, in the civil rights lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media that predated her employment at Hanover High School | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 6, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that a court hearing will be held before Judge Denise J. Casper of the U.S. District Court for the District of Massachusetts on Tuesday, May 9, 2023, in the civil rights lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of Kari MacRae, a Massachusetts high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media that predated her employment at Hanover High School. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch recently announced that District Court Judge Maame Ewusi-Mensah Frimpong will hold a hearing on Thursday, May 11, 2023, at 10:00 a.m. PT on a Motion to Dismiss brought by the California Secretary of State in the lawsuit. ---|--- | | | | | “Now we know why terrorist-linked Qatar has fought us in court to hide its financial support for Texas A&M; – which we just found out is nearly a half billion dollars,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that a Bucks County, PA judge ruled the county acted “in bad faith” in withholding records that are, by law, public from Megan Brock, a parent represented by Judicial Watch who was sued by Bucks County to prevent the release of documents related to COVID restrictions and the re-opening of the county’s schools that she requested under the commonwealth’s Right-to-Know Law. ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller Daily Caller News Foundation reporter Megan Brock secured a victory last week after she was sued by Bucks County, Pennsylvania, in 2022 to prevent the release of documents she requested related to the county’s school reopening plans and COVID-19 restrictions. RealClearInvestigations Congress and RCI are not alone in being stonewalled by Kerry’s office. Judicial Watch, a conservative government watchdog group, also filed a FOIA request for information on Kerry’s spending and staff, and they followed that up with a lawsuit last October. Breitbart Catholic Vote and Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) on Thursday, demanding they comply with records requests related to agency actions targeting Catholics. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Martin Glusker
subject: opposition research
body:
A look at our initial opposition research report. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63008151/405257286/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlYmQ5NGUtZWZlZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4rh8XRz2mnHgmo1UJxK0FTb6V_nQrYeuZPTzIpRi0Xw=) | Peter, As you know, Kevin McCarthy is desperately trying to flip Josh’s seat red. That’s why opposition research is such an important part of our strategy. We have to know what the GOP is doing at all times so we can respond effectively. I was recently tasked with the job of researching what Republicans are up to in our race and I wanted to give you a brief summary of our findings (if you can chip in to help us fight back with a new ads campaign, I’ll leave a link [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63008153/405257288/-199947250?refcode=E21417-20230508-OppositionResearch-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmVlYmQ5NGUtZWZlZC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4rh8XRz2mnHgmo1UJxK0FTb6V_nQrYeuZPTzIpRi0Xw=).) Here is what our opposition research report found:
1. **ATTACKS:** Over the past 2 months, Josh has faced nearly a dozen attacks from the National Republican Congressional Committee. This is a marked increase from last cycle so clearly they believe hitting Josh early in the press is a strong strategy.

2. **OPPONENT:** Our first GOP opponent jumped into the race and did his first round of local press this past week. It’s still too early to know how much money National Republicans plan on pumping into his campaign.

3. **MISINFORMATION:** We continue to see misinformation spread quickly online in the district, especially in Spanish. This trend is something that could be easily manipulated by local Republicans as well as outside groups to disenfranchise latino voters or persuade them to vote Republican.

It’s a sobering report. When I presented it to Josh he insisted that we double down on our rapid response capabilities. This means both increasing our resources for responding to attacks, and also proactively funding positive information about Josh. **[That’s why I'm coming to you for help launching a new ads campaign - it costs $10,000 to reach 100,000 voters with Josh's message. clean_body: A look at our initial opposition research report. | = | Peter, As you know, Kevin McCarthy is desperately trying to flip Josh’s seat red. That’s why opposition research is such an important part of our strategy. We have to know what the GOP is doing at all times so we can respond effectively. I was recently tasked with the job of researching what Republicans are up to in our race and I wanted to give you a brief summary of our findings (if you can chip in to help us fight back with a new ads campaign, I’ll leave a link =.) Here is what our opposition research report found: 1. ATTACKS: Over the past 2 months, Josh has faced nearly a dozen attacks from the National Republican Congressional Committee. This is a marked increase from last cycle so clearly they believe hitting Josh early in the press is a strong strategy. 2. OPPONENT: Our first GOP opponent jumped into the race and did his first round of local press this past week. It’s still too early to know how much money National Republicans plan on pumping into his campaign. 3. MISINFORMATION: We continue to see misinformation spread quickly online in the district, especially in Spanish. This trend is something that could be easily manipulated by local Republicans as well as outside groups to disenfranchise latino voters or persuade them to vote Republican. It’s a sobering report. When I presented it to Josh he insisted that we double down on our rapid response capabilities. This means both increasing our resources for responding to attacks, and also proactively funding positive information about Josh. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- We have to stay vigilant! \- Martin Glusker Finance Director, Josh Harder *

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: How many more people need to lose their lives for Congress to act?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends - there have been many questions on my mind since Saturday's tragic shooting in Texas, and one of them is this:
_**How many more Americans need to lose their lives for Congress to act?**_
On Saturday, 8 people were killed at an outlet mall in Allen, Texas, nearly a year after the mass shooting at an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. This marks the 199th mass shooting since the start of this year.
It's more clear than ever that we need to take action, which is why I am asking supporters like you to make your voice heard on this issue.
[**Gun violence is a public safety crisis, so please join me in calling on Congress to pass an assault weapons ban by adding your name to my petition today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230508_ban_assault_weapons/?source=em230508-1-t3&refcode2=4418.196590.G5QYwz&t=1&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230508_ban_assault_weapons/?source=em230508-1-t3&refcode2=4418.196590.G5QYwz&t=2&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
Gun violence is an issue that is personal to me. I've had multiple friends die as a result of gun violence. A friend of mine was shot and killed in Milwaukee, robbed for a pair of shoes.
Whether at a mall in Allen, Texas, a medical office in Atlanta, Georgia, or a birthday party in Alabama City — no person in our country is safe with the mass availability of assault weapons.
This is a terrifying reality to live in. A reality where every American is unsafe from the dangers of a mass shooting no matter where they go. A reality where lawmakers continue to prioritize money from the NRA and the gun lobby over protecting their constituents from gun violence. A reality where elected officials will do everything they can to protect the life of a fetus, but not children in schools.
[**Enough is enough. Please join us in calling on Congress to pass an assault weapons ban.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230508_ban_assault_weapons/source=em230508-1-t3&refcode2=4418.196590.G5QYwz?t=3&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
We are powerful togetherand there is much more we can do to combat this crisis.
While conservative lawmakers send their thoughts and prayers after every mass shooting rather than support policies that will save lives, we are going to elect candidates that can flip seats and will fight for legislation to protect the lives of Americans.
So we must continue to organize and unseat every single one of those NRA-controlled lawmakers, no matter how long it takes.
I hope you will continue to stand with me in our fight to elect candidates that will stand up to the gun lobby and protect Americans from the dangers of gun violence.
Thank you for listening,
Mandela
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230508_ban_assault_weapons/?source=em230508-1-t3&refcode2=4418.196590.G5QYwz&t=4&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4418_196590_G5QYwz&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4418%2E196590%2EG5QYwz)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

Peter, I’m so proud to have served as Chairman of the Veterans Committee. Together we were able to do so much good work for America’s veterans.
* **I was proud to author the PACT Act** which provides critical healthcare benefits to veterans who were exposed to burn pits and other toxins. This bipartisan bill was signed into law by the President recently!
* **I advocated for vulnerable veterans** who are being targeted by far-right extremism online.
* **I fought to end the terrible deportations** of US veterans.

But sadly, since the GOP took over the House majority this year, it’s been chaos. They removed Democrats from committees, passed extremist legislation, and now it’s hitting closer to home.

**I will no longer be the Chairman of the House Veterans committee.** However, as the Ranking Member of the committee _I will keep fighting for veterans reform every single day._

[**Peter, Republicans are desperate to hold on to their razor-thin majority. But we won’t let them win. Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63008769/405258774/1367965908?amount=20&contactdata=Lh3l12Ju5IjLx+GkymDzFQq72Nh/KhAOmg/M75r8v/W7157U4sIqSmAkxo7Un/Am5csgPtTlicsUjYse5MItdF7muLNFx84Eo1k8v19P4B4cnicXORu3rk/0Ntano8mSrEC0It2tzvglQn7vzdD81w==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230508_FR.Allred.1.2_0_3MO_Allred_Allred_NA_Allred.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmEzNmE5MS1mMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_fsSXXoTI1cr_gBTIKcUvSRRYX0G7SfWIIPtCDOHHE=)

Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority — and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Sharice Davids' campaign to help reach my ambitious $3,000,000 goal?[Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63008770/405258776/1367965908?amount=20&contactdata=Lh3l12Ju5IjLx+GkymDzFQq72Nh/KhAOmg/M75r8v/W7157U4sIqSmAkxo7Un/Am5csgPtTlicsUjYse5MItdF7muLNFx84Eo1k8v19P4B4cnicXORu3rk/0Ntano8mSrEC0It2tzvglQn7vzdD81w==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230508_FR.Allred.1.2_0_3MO_Allred_Allred_NA_Allred.rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmEzNmE5MS1mMGVkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_fsSXXoTI1cr_gBTIKcUvSRRYX0G7SfWIIPtCDOHHE=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Sharice Davids and Colin Allred.

---

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream — from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy — and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz — when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. clean_body: Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz | = Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority — and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $20 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Sharice Davids' campaign to help reach my ambitious $3,000,000 goal?= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Sharice Davids and Colin Allred. | = | = | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream — from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy — and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz — when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Addressing this weekend’s tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]Peter,
It breaks my heart to write yet another email about gun violence. This weekend, our country experienced another tragic shooting, this time in Allen, Texas. This shooting has left us all deeply shaken and grieving for the 8 lives taken, and the families affected.
It’s hard to know what to do in these situations. When you look at your children, and fear for their future, it’s hard to feel like we’re making any progress. So I’m doing all I can.
In Congress, I’ve been a vocal advocate for common-sense gun safety legislation. I’ll continue to work tirelessly to build bipartisan support for solutions that prioritize the safety and well-being of our communities.
As we approach the 1-year mark of the devastating Uvalde shooting, it’s sobering to think of another community in the state of Texas, and in our country, torn apart by gun violence. But now is the time for us to come together as a community and work towards change. We owe it to the victims of the Allen shooting and countless others whose lives have been affected by gun violence. I encourage you to join me in this fight by supporting candidates who prioritize the safety of our neighborhoods and who are committed to finding solutions that will make a difference.
Additionally, here are a few organizations advocating for safer gun laws in the United States.
*
Everytown
for
Gun
Safety
[https://www.everytown.org/]
*
Moms
Demand
Action
[https://momsdemandaction.org/]
*
Giffords
[https://giffords.org/]
Together, we can build a safer future for our children and our great nation.
With sincere condolences and unwavering determination,
Wiley Nickel
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

name: Team AOC
subject: Are you graduating this month?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Advice from AOC on taking this next step
#
Are you graduating this month? Or perhaps you know someone who is?
A few days ago, a supporter asked Alexandria if she had also felt lost and scared when she graduated from college. Check out her response below:
In our capitalist society, it can be so hard to separate our sense of self-worth from the job that we do or what we produce. But, we must be gentle with ourselves and look at our career path as just one piece of our development as a whole, complex person.
Please be gentle with yourself 💕,
Team AOC

clean_body: Advice from AOC on taking this next step Are you graduating this month? Or perhaps you know someone who is? A few days ago, a supporter asked Alexandria if she had also felt lost and scared when she graduated from college. Check out her response below: In our capitalist society, it can be so hard to separate our sense of self-worth from the job that we do or what we produce. But, we must be gentle with ourselves and look at our career path as just one piece of our development as a whole, complex person. Please be gentle with yourself 💕, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Voter Reference Foundation
subject: Should dead people be allowed to vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation |
body:
The issues we face are larger than voters may realize... | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov8e-QFMSSDT9wN7aOghDcg8dKIlB7F7ahfTHZGjenjbqzNQwtvxjuSN2zeAEnUNYYIZj4ZiafoR2PmaFjIDa-MMX7y6H5XGQvA-f4Y4zfDJZT4KKeil-r9kBF1oIiQ8LchPK6P8MgoWAos3gRcL9ejR)
---
Peter, Can you believe this actually happened?!
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov9sY1DmskkMS6OS7qI4MDVCL5EVwvCliAKT_i6veCQRuWTDJTM4LBU9ofzK4F058ozkYP5ybwtRQwn53pJBZb8VZCEBXpAcru1l6_jg0wfftmdFYexZQ9VKOQbkM095SEFt_Qa235beO1klKh4UoDkm)
---
Now would you believe us if we told you that this problem is not as uncommon as you think? **Most states in the U.S. have poorly maintained, severely outdated voter lists, meaning that issues like this happen far too frequently.**
---
[**HELP US FIX THE PROBLEM**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov8rL-bv89aRKgqx_tAszhA2MPYaw7wWndNe65GzsGGkK_A4jnGMp5sdExmFz05jCgsjdzO-EFxlgeD5baodpJRS6XfklqlIfPm8rP1hj5emcgP1jUyANFjdAoEr929FRyNKC6Dm_u_HZy1EYJKRuQhF)
---
In fact, there are a lot of issues that occur with America’s elections... Take a look:
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov_vAnh3zR840_Qmp-dUpBXkRpdGhrM5c9OakwifwDdMlNiSd0Hg2hdOfzr-vP9jIn9wiVNDK5wH0-BXivFr77NUvhMaAwThqk-_FTIGSQtIcBjvQOiVt6xmB3WEFnrnodRN8ywVlTijZCd4WhZnBz-P)
---
Voter Reference Foundation is working on a way to fix this growing problem. We’re doing it by restoring public oversight of our elections. Here’s what that means: **1\. UPDATING VOTER LISTS** The Motor Voter Act established that oversight of voter lists belongs to the public, but states have made it complicated and expensive to access the data. Because of this, issues like what happened in Virginia are popping up nationwide. We are the first organization to collect, sort, and distribute the data to the public free of charge. [_**HELP US DO IT >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov-MwuVmxXxjWbr_6ppYCQn2P3sol36GfkK-OsYEZ2aG26ped_ml2je9F9t9XQ-uBvJo42fD6R9iWi8bt9oZcfgyNmVWGKcBNaOG3q7WJ46_YZMKYdbNjjedH1UURGCudOugb1NqW_h9Q59XXI2mgxTY) **2\. FIXING ISSUES WITH MAIL-IN BALLOTS** Our data shows that states nationwide are experiencing issues with mail-in ballots. Some get counted too late, some include potentially invalid signatures, and others allow unmonitored dropboxes, destroying voter confidence and leaving gaping holes in the security of our elections. [_**HELP US FIGHT FOR CHANGE >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov_EVDMbiG5M2QzBNayUI-a7Oz83FTbXmJMV2YL-JAEemdgwMszRzdzFRJTtw-x9p_6989H3vLzhQT0RApeHV_92P1_mKEdiYviFVQCo-LGBHbmZ8pw95e61kdRMuymw2-q4iR-HKf5VMFmHRIZx5H9-) **3\. IMPROVING OUR ELECTIONS PROCESS** We won't stop fighting until every election in America is fair, free, and transparent. [_**JOIN THE FIGHT >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov85MUgg2BflsLn_oYoREbkbWNFV0T5finW53R1mCfn1-Dv-BdiIUvJZLBOrEY2TQ9oioixCT8dlDx0dSq6v9i8gKcoTgIRnYkIdlpO6f66s83mfGOroS9qyNJz55euj6FuY7IzSbTBQtnhQFbOGZjhj)
By donating to our Election Security Fund, you can play a direct role in restoring election integrity and gain access to exclusive updates and briefings about the state of America’s elections.
---
[**CHIP IN TO SECURE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b92d8653d9b74da1b467f1bbec10c9fd&_e=0D7RR4x4AAw6lNKU5wHz013Vs8DWbyGubKSIs5p5O0D1-S4gK241qAQyyiEdQD66YRqyhTEfs-8MoZ2SVQLFnxxG0gPmeH84xgLy70zgmx81x8K0CoEVLC2CdWnjqFvO9HkIkEUcGp_7XEwqNahZswLq51VZAAzVLgtpC-kJKBmw37ylE4Y6vWtTtVT1mtMMyYgX3jhtaeJVoqJKTxnBg6jIZJpSl51hrj_Zvoveov_PQSvGL_jQ2_9zwoUja3JZHVq7vazcm_GvI8juUUdoL2YyCAj9mDGIodk9eA1UcQUY3mOz7lz0rhctvBh_cP0P9Y6ymd1J1vfr5sT_pfBnStGNBj7cTLJKV_g6U2U7kvoFUQaDlciR5WygXtKE7zS7)

Thank you, Voter Reference Foundation

FIXING ISSUES WITH MAIL-IN BALLOTS Our data shows that states nationwide are experiencing issues with mail-in ballots. Some get counted too late, some include potentially invalid signatures, and others allow unmonitored dropboxes, destroying voter confidence and leaving gaping holes in the security of our elections. - 3\. IMPROVING OUR ELECTIONS PROCESS We won't stop fighting until every election in America is fair, free, and transparent. By donating to our Election Security Fund, you can play a direct role in restoring election integrity and gain access to exclusive updates and briefings about the state of America’s elections. Thank you, Voter Reference Foundation | | | | | | | Paid for by Voter Reference Foundation | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Chicago Teens Exchange Guns & Ammo for Jobs
body:
"It’s easy for them to get weapons of mass destruction, but they can’t get a GED."

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0ac3b8f0f1f0/breaking-chicago-teens-exchange-guns-ammo-for-jobs?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/local-teens-turn-in-assault-rifles-thousands-of-rounds-of-ammunition-to-southside-violence-prevention-organization-in-exchange-for-job-opportunities.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ECCSC founder Tyron Muhammad speaking to NBC 5 Chicago during a press conference at his Chicago southside headquarters on May 8, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)

Local Teens Turn in Assault Rifles, Thousands of Rounds of Ammunition to Southside Violence Prevention Organization in Exchange for Job Opportunities (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/local-teens-turn-in-assault-rifles-thousands-of-rounds-of-ammunition-to-southside-violence-prevention-organization-in-exchange-for-job-opportunities.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Monday, southside-based violence prevention organization, Ex-Cons for Community and Social Change (https://www.eccsc.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (ECCSC) held a press conference at their Chicago headquarters to exhibit multiple assault rifles and thousands of rounds of ammunition that were recently turned in by local teenagers to ECCSC’s founder, Tyrone Muhammad.

“There was enough ammunition to take out the entire southside of Chicago,” Muhammad shared with Illinois Review, with the backdrop of the guns and bullets displayed on a table in a large classroom inside his organization’s southside headquarters.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/local-teens-turn-in-assault-rifles-thousands-of-rounds-of-ammunition-to-southside-violence-prevention-organization-in-exchange-for-job-opportunities.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Assault rifles and ammunition line a table at the ECCSC headquarters on the southside of Chicago on May 8, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)

The teenagers, ages 15-19 years old, struck a deal with Muhammad that they would only turn in the weapons and ammunition, if he promised to help them find jobs, or assist them with job training programs.

“How is it so easy for young boys, 15 years old, to get this [weapons], but they can’t get a job. It’s easy for them to get weapons of mass destruction, but they can’t get a GED. Man, something wrong with that – either they smart or we stupid,” said Muhammad during his press conference.

https://youtube.com/shorts/GTr1DTI1bqM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

ECCSC founder Tyrone Muhammad speaking during a press conference at his southside-based headquarters on May 8, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)

Muhammad spoke in front of a table displaying the guns and ammunition, while local teenagers and violence prevention activists stood behind him – many wearing masks to hide their identities.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/local-teens-turn-in-assault-rifles-thousands-of-rounds-of-ammunition-to-southside-violence-prevention-organization-in-exchange-for-job-opportunities.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Assault rifles and ammunition line a table at the ECCSC headquarters on the southside of Chicago on May 8, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)

During his remarks, Muhammad pleaded with elected officials to “give us the tools – give us the resources. Create the safe spaces for these young men to go thrive and learn new habits.”

“I had to transform their habit, for them to give me this,” Muhammad said as he pointed to the guns and ammunition.

It wasn’t an easy task for Muhammad to convince the teenagers to hand over their guns and ammunition – because in the streets, these guns are their tools – it’s how they survive, “and to give up your tool, in the streets, that’s treacherous, is to really commit suicide.”

Following the press conference, a group of Chicago Police officers arrived, at Muhammad’s request, to take inventory of the assault rifles and ammunition; collect it, and take it back to the police department to be destroyed.

Last
October (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/violence-prevention-group-conducts-safety-patrols-on-the-cta/2971157/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Muhammad and 40 members of his violence prevention group spent a week patrolling the CTA Red Line and conducting safety patrols, in an effort to drive down CTA-related violence.

Muhammad and his organization are working without any financial assistance from Gov. JB Pritzker or Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot, for their violence prevention efforts.

And while ECCSC was due to receive funding from Pritzker last year, that funding never arrived – leaving Muhammad scrambling to find other ways to fund his violence prevention programs and initiatives.

And as for Pritzker and his fellow Democrats – they are nowhere to be found. Perhaps they prefer spending their money protecting big donors during the 2024 Democratic National Convention, instead.

As Muhammad so often says, “it’s going to take us, to save us.”
https://www.eccsc.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://youtu.be/hEVUuxLlzW0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former NRA President David Keene joins Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas live on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss how to secure our schools.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=3b0fc5cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_08_10_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-3b0fc5cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

_“After months of refusing to offer any solution to the approaching default date, the Speaker is now pushing a reckless plan. His proposal: a slew of far-right policies that would cripple middle-class Americans for an agreement to raise the debt ceiling for just one year.”_

It’s true. McCarthy is playing a dangerous game, and working families across the country will be on the receiving end.

Instead of raising the debt ceiling - like they did three times under Trump – the Republican party is choosing to jeopardize working families by leaving our communities with less funding for schools, veterans’ benefits, and first responders.

**It’s time to end this dangerous game.**

I’m running for Congress because I know Arizona deserves better. Corrupt career politicians like David Schweikert aren’t looking out for you. They’re looking out for their own bottom line. We need a fighter in Washington to advocate for us.

My career has been dedicated to leadership and service and putting people over profits. From the Make-A-Wish Foundation to the American Red Cross, where I served as the CEO in Arizona, I have been motivated by my passion for helping others.

Now, I’m ready to help everyday Arizonans by being a voice for them in Congress.

subject: There have been more than 200 mass shootings in America this year.

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=zXiSiVD0AfR20hXogZBF87yJEb%2Fl2AbdsSFhfYdbtUZK%2B8FmJwpdStuQDX%2FHj%2FfZb%2BMEoUzPjX7WFV6Xl11eM3sCNXqzHhNLgDMB%2FS8bO%2Fceaf2Mpq9PkukvUv92eP7vAcFl5Vx3%2F3qS0fn0YKCFqoxfBlEvjzpMI7yUnMv0MvCAv828mcNbEnmhBDnZ8n9wQp0EaAYrNR3tg4WGc8wSlIXzfdzkz1xbwZDah%2FvAagrtjmu8MXJF%2BCI71O%2F3lNf2lyUYbLWDFSZ19C4rIRc%2BloUCtBuClss%2BHSJI2ozGffd8P2h8YWYn%2BsQBAk2IGWt84CMyP45SF4O8wGz%2FqYfHffAHDOXQd%2Fru9o%2Fno2eWIo6Q8PYmSoJcn15t58j3vzAHuWtp8fryR3Fath2CUecHXWdSGqeNHqy08YYdlo855r1UaiZa8SqupmMkWf556INR)

Peter,

Last month, I wrote to you about the need to enact common-sense gun safety legislation following the tragic mass shooting at the Covenant School in Tennessee. When I sent you that email in early April, according to the Gun Violence Archive, there had already been over 140 mass shootings in America in 2023. **Now, just a few weeks later, the number of mass shootings in America this year has risen to over 200. 1**

Every day, lives are lost and families are torn apart because we still haven’t taken the necessary steps to enact common-sense gun safety legislation that would keep all of us safe. **We need to act, and we need to act now.**

Congress must take up legislation immediately that bans assault weapons, requires background checks, enacts safe storage requirements, bans bump stocks, and regulates high-capacity magazines. [I want to see this legislation passed immediately, and I need to know if you are with me. Do you agree that we must enact common-sense gun safety legislation as soon as possible? Answer here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63009731/405262613/1689668690?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230508_SV_guns_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_guns&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTI0MDIyNC1mN2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9VlV9Kwvnfo4BRCaCmlVnIs13zQJiK26CSpQQtKgPrY=&emci=1d293855-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=da240224-f7ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Remember, record profits = unpaid wages. ✊
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, all workers
deserve a livable wage! Bernie Sanders just introduced legislation to
raise the minimum wage to $17 per hour.

We stand with Bernie 100% and support a $17 minimum wage for all workers.
There is no such thing as unskilled labor.

Over the past several decades, the cost of living has increased
significantly while workers’ wages have remained relatively stagnant.
While CEO’s compensation soars, most workers’ wages aren’t even keeping up
with inflation and affordable housing remains out of reach. We must win a
minimum wage of $17.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/20230508-bernie/?source=em20230508-28861&t=1001&akid=28861%2E1203867%2EzB9LQh ]Will you add your name right now to share your support for Bernie’s
legislation for a $17 minimum wage?

Remember, record profits are just unpaid wages. ✊

In solidarity,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230508-28861-footer&t=1002&refcode2=28861_1203867_zB9LQh&akid=28861%2E1203867%2EzB9LQh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=28861%2E1203867%2EzB9LQh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Don Huffines
subject: i found avalanche of spending increases in TX budget...
body:
The Texas Legislature is hiding about $36 billion worth of spending increases.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Budget Gimmicks Hide an Avalanche of Spending Increases in Texas**
## _" The Texas Legislature is hiding about $36 billion worth of spending increases."_
[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-y/) DALLAS, TX, May 8, 2023 -- The Texas Legislature and Gov. Abbott are [on the verge of passing a two-year budget of more than $300 billion](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-j/), larger than any budget it has adopted previously. However, you wouldn't know it from looking at the numbers the Legislature provides.Through a series of budget gimmicks, some old and some new, the Legislature has managed to hide $36.3 billion of spending increases. The Legislature's tricks include using billions of dollars of increased property tax revenue to boost state spending.While the gimmicks make the state budget opaque, it is crystal clear that the Legislature is far more interested in increasing funding for Medicaid and health care ($12.9 billion) than it is in bringing true property tax relief ($9.8 billion) to Texas taxpayers. Texans who want real property tax cuts should let Texas politicians know that they want their money back.Not only does HB 1 spend too much taxpayer money and provide far too little property tax relief, but it is also being used by the Texas Legislature to hide $36 billion of increased spending. Texans should tell Texas politicians that they want less spending and more transparency.The path away from this and [toward prosperity](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-t/) for all Texans is twofold:

1\. First, the Texas Legislature should tell the truth and be transparent, ending the duplicitous nature of the gimmicks designed to deceive Texas taxpayers.

2\. Once that is out of the way, the second step is simple: reduce government spending. Capping annual state and local spending growth to 3 percent or less would create ongoing annual surpluses to first buy down property taxes and later the sales and business franchise taxes. This will create unimaginable prosperity for all Texans. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-h/) [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-k/) Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" Texas government doesn't earn money. It takes your money. The best and only way to truly limit government in Texas is to limit the money."_Huffines further added:_" Liberty and prosperity do not come cheap; one of those costs is a reduced reliance on government. Texans can have this future if they want it."_ [Read Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-u/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.###
### _Help us advance liberty and prosperity in Texas:_
[Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-o/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-n/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-p/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-zpkkik-yuddtktydi-e/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-zpkkik-l-s)
